The results show that our proposed unified multimodal alignment framework achieves favorable performance for both scenarios: (i) aligning a 3D encoder with pretrained CLIP encoders, and (ii) pretraining all encoders from scratch.
tldr: The paper introduces Contrastive Tensor Pre-training (CTP), a novel framework for unified multimodal representation learning in autonomous driving, using a tensor loss to jointly align text, images, and point clouds.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了对比张量预训练（CTP），这是一种用于自动驾驶中统一多模态表示学习的新框架，使用张量损失来联合对齐文本、图像和点云。
summary_zh: 对比语言-图像预训练(CLIP)在对齐视觉和文本表示方面表现出令人印象深刻的性能。 近期研究已将此范式扩展到3D视觉，以提升自动驾驶的场景理解能力。 一种常见的策略是利用模态对间的余弦相似度来指导3D编码器的训练。 然而，考虑到个体模态对之间的相似性，而不是所有模态的联合考虑，这无法确保整个多模态空间中一致且统一的对齐。 在本文中，我们提出一个对比张量预训练(CTP)框架，该框架在一个统一的嵌入空间中同时对齐多个模态，以增强端到端自动驾驶。 与成对余弦相似度对齐相比，我们的方法将2D相似度矩阵扩展为多模态相似度张量。 此外，我们引入了一种张量损失，以实现跨所有模态的联合对比学习。 为了对我们的框架进行实验验证，我们构建了一个源自现有自动驾驶数据集的文本-图像-点云三元组数据集。 结果表明，我们提出的统一多模态对齐框架在以下两种场景中均取得了良好的性能：(i) 将3D编码器与预训练的CLIP编码器对齐，以及 (ii) 从头开始预训练所有编码器。

title: OrdinalBench: A Benchmark Dataset for Diagnosing Generalization Limits in Ordinal Number Understanding of Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have advanced across multimodal benchmarks but still show clear gaps in ordinal number understanding, i.e., the ability to track relative positions and generalize to large indices. We present OrdinalBench, a diagnostic benchmark that standardizes ordinal number understanding as an evaluation task for VLMs. The core task is N-th object identification, defined by a starting reference and traversal rule. Task difficulty is controlled along three axes: (i) ordinal magnitude, from small numbers to extreme cases up to 300; (ii) arrangement complexity, from single loops to maze-like paths; and (iii) object count. The benchmark provides 39,000 question-answer pairs, each annotated with a ground-truth reasoning trajectory and balanced across difficulty levels for controlled large-scale testing. Beyond answer-only evaluation, our framework requires models to generate structured stepwise traces of the counting process and provides an open evaluation toolkit that measures both final accuracy and step-level path consistency. Zero-shot evaluations of GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite, Qwen2.5-VL, InternVL3.5, and Molmo reveal sharp degradation under large-ordinal and complex-path conditions, highlighting weak generalization despite strong scores on standard multimodal tasks. By framing ordinal number understanding as a core target, OrdinalBench provides a reproducible benchmark and diagnostic framework for developing VLMs with stronger sequential reasoning. All data and code are available at https://ordinalbench.github.io/
tldr: The paper introduces OrdinalBench, a new diagnostic benchmark for evaluating the ordinal number understanding capabilities of Vision-Language Models (VLMs), revealing their limitations in generalizing to large ordinal numbers and complex arrangements.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 OrdinalBench，这是一个新的诊断基准，用于评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）的序数理解能力，揭示了它们在推广到大序数和复杂排列方面的局限性。
summary_zh: 视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在多模态基准测试中取得了进展，但仍然在序数理解方面表现出明显的差距，即跟踪相对位置和推广到大索引的能力。我们提出了OrdinalBench，一个诊断性基准测试，将序数理解标准化为VLMs的评估任务。核心任务是第N个对象识别，由起始参考和遍历规则定义。任务难度沿三个轴进行控制：（i）序数大小，从小数字到高达300的极端情况；（ii）排列复杂度，从单循环到迷宫状路径；以及（iii）对象计数。该基准测试提供39,000个问答对，每个问答对都标注了真实推理轨迹，并针对受控的大规模测试在难度级别上进行了平衡。除了仅回答的评估之外，我们的框架还要求模型生成计数过程的结构化逐步跟踪，并提供一个开放的评估工具包，用于测量最终准确性和步骤级别的路径一致性。对GPT-5、Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite、Qwen2.5-VL、InternVL3.5和Molmo的零样本评估显示，在大序数和复杂路径条件下性能急剧下降，突出显示了在标准多模态任务上取得高分的同时，泛化能力薄弱。通过将序数理解构建为核心目标，OrdinalBench为开发具有更强顺序推理的VLMs提供了一个可复现的基准测试和诊断框架。所有数据和代码均可在https://ordinalbench.github.io/获取。

title: How Far Can Unsupervised RLVR Scale LLM Training?
summary: Unsupervised reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (URLVR) offers a pathway to scale LLM training beyond the supervision bottleneck by deriving rewards without ground truth labels. Recent works leverage model intrinsic signals, showing promising early gains, yet their potential and limitations remain unclear. In this work, we revisit URLVR and provide a comprehensive analysis spanning taxonomy, theory and extensive experiments. We first classify URLVR methods into intrinsic versus external based on reward sources, then establish a unified theoretical framework revealing that all intrinsic methods converge toward sharpening the model's initial distribution This sharpening mechanism succeeds when initial confidence aligns with correctness but fails catastrophically when misaligned. Through systematic experiments, we show intrinsic rewards consistently follow a rise-then-fall pattern across methods, with collapse timing determined by model prior rather than engineering choices. Despite these scaling limits, we find intrinsic rewards remain valuable in test-time training on small datasets, and propose Model Collapse Step to measure model prior, serving as a practical indicator for RL trainability. Finally, we explore external reward methods that ground verification in computational asymmetries, showing preliminary evidence they may escape the confidence-correctness ceiling. Our findings chart boundaries for intrinsic URLVR while motivating paths toward scalable alternatives.
tldr: The paper analyzes the scaling limitations of unsupervised RLVR for LLM training using intrinsic rewards, showing a rise-then-fall pattern due to model prior, and explores external reward methods as a potential solution.
tldr_zh: 本文分析了使用内在奖励进行无监督 RLVR 训练 LLM 的扩展限制，表明由于模型先验，存在一个上升然后下降的模式，并探索了外部奖励方法作为潜在的解决方案。
summary_zh: 具有可验证奖励的无监督强化学习 (URLVR) 提供了一条扩展大语言模型训练的途径，使其超越了监督瓶颈，通过在没有真实标签的情况下推导出奖励。 近期工作利用模型内在信号，展现了富有前景的早期收益，但它们的潜力和局限性仍然不明朗。 在这项工作中，我们重新审视了 URLVR，并提供了涵盖分类法、理论和广泛实验的全面分析。 我们首先根据奖励来源将 URLVR 方法分为内在方法和外在方法，然后建立了一个统一的理论框架，揭示了所有内在方法都收敛于锐化模型初始分布。 当初始置信度与正确性对齐时，这种锐化机制会成功，但在失调时会惨遭失败。 通过系统的实验，我们表明内在奖励在各种方法中始终遵循先上升后下降的模式，且崩塌时间由模型先验而非工程选择决定。 尽管存在这些缩放限制，但我们发现内在奖励在小型数据集上的测试时训练中仍然有价值，并提出了“模型崩塌步”来衡量模型先验，作为衡量强化学习可训练性的实用指标。 最后，我们探索了基于计算非对称性来验证的外在奖励方法，初步证据表明它们可能突破置信度-正确性的天花板。 我们的发现标定了内在 URLVR 的边界，同时激发了通往可扩展替代方案的途径。

title: Integrating Lagrangian Neural Networks into the Dyna Framework for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) is sample-efficient but depends on the accuracy of the learned dynamics, which are often modeled using black-box methods that do not adhere to physical laws. Those methods tend to produce inaccurate predictions when presented with data that differ from the original training set. In this work, we employ Lagrangian neural networks (LNNs), which enforce an underlying Lagrangian structure to train the model within a Dyna-based MBRL framework. Furthermore, we train the LNN using stochastic gradient-based and state-estimation-based optimizers to learn the network's weights. The state-estimation-based method converges faster than the stochastic gradient-based method during neural network training. Simulation results are provided to illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed LNN-based Dyna framework for MBRL.
tldr: This paper integrates Lagrangian Neural Networks (LNNs) into a Dyna-based MBRL framework for improved sample efficiency and adherence to physical laws, addressing limitations of black-box dynamics models. They show faster convergence using state-estimation-based optimizers compared to stochastic gradient methods.
tldr_zh: 本文将拉格朗日神经网络（LNNs）集成到基于 Dyna 的 MBRL 框架中，以提高样本效率并遵守物理定律，从而解决了黑盒动力学模型的局限性。结果表明，与随机梯度方法相比，使用基于状态估计的优化器可以实现更快的收敛。
summary_zh: 基于模型的强化学习(MBRL)具有样本效率，但依赖于所学习动力学的准确性，而这些动力学通常使用不符合物理定律的黑盒方法建模。当遇到与原始训练集不同的数据时，这些方法往往会产生不准确的预测。在这项工作中，我们采用拉格朗日神经网络(LNNs)，它强制执行底层的拉格朗日结构，在一个基于Dyna的MBRL框架内训练模型。此外，我们使用基于随机梯度和基于状态估计的优化器训练LNNs，以学习网络的权重。在神经网络训练期间，基于状态估计的方法比基于随机梯度的方法收敛更快。提供了仿真结果，以说明所提出的基于LNNs的Dyna框架对于MBRL的有效性。

title: MJ1: Multimodal Judgment via Grounded Verification
summary: Multimodal judges struggle to ground decisions in visual evidence. We present MJ1, a multimodal judge trained with reinforcement learning that enforces visual grounding through a structured grounded verification chain (observations $\rightarrow$ claims $\rightarrow$ verification $\rightarrow$ evaluation $\rightarrow$ scoring) and a counterfactual consistency reward that penalizes position bias. Even without training, our mechanism improves base-model accuracy on MMRB2 by +3.8 points on Image Editing and +1.7 on Multimodal Reasoning. After training, MJ1, with only 3B active parameters, achieves 77.0% accuracy on MMRB2 and surpasses orders-of-magnitude larger models like Gemini-3-Pro. These results show that grounded verification and consistency-based training substantially improve multimodal judgment without increasing model scale.
tldr: The paper introduces MJ1, a multimodal judge trained with reinforcement learning using grounded verification and counterfactual consistency, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy on the MMRB2 benchmark without increasing model scale.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MJ1，一个通过强化学习训练的多模态判决器，它使用基于扎根验证和反事实一致性的方法，在MMRB2基准测试上实现了最先进的准确率，且没有增加模型规模。
summary_zh: 多模态评判器难以将其决策扎根于视觉证据。我们提出了 MJ1，一个通过强化学习训练的多模态评判器，它通过结构化的扎根验证链（观察 $\rightarrow$ 断言 $\rightarrow$ 验证 $\rightarrow$ 评估 $\rightarrow$ 评分）和惩罚位置偏差的反事实一致性奖励来强制视觉扎根。即使没有经过训练，我们的机制也能使基础模型在 MMRB2 上，图像编辑任务提升 +3.8 个百分点，多模态推理任务提升 +1.7 个百分点。经过训练后，MJ1 仅使用 30 亿个活跃参数，便在 MMRB2 上实现了 77.0% 的准确率，并超越了 Gemini-3-Pro 等体量级更大的模型。这些结果表明，扎根验证和基于一致性的训练可以在不增加模型规模的情况下，大幅提升多模态判断能力。

title: Diff-Muscle: Efficient Learning for Musculoskeletal Robotic Table Tennis
summary: Musculoskeletal robots provide superior advantages in flexibility and dexterity, positioning them as a promising frontier towards embodied intelligence. However, current research is largely confined to relative simple tasks, restricting the exploration of their full potential in multi-segment coordination. Furthermore, efficient learning remains a challenge, primarily due to the high-dimensional action space and inherent overactuated structures. To address these challenges, we propose Diff-Muscle, a musculoskeletal robot control algorithm that leverages differential flatness to reformulate policy learning from the redundant muscle-activation space into a significantly lower-dimensional joint space. Furthermore, we utilize the highly dynamic robotic table tennis task to evaluate our algorithm. Specifically, we propose a hierarchical reinforcement learning framework that integrates a Kinematics-based Muscle Actuation Controller (K-MAC) with high-level trajectory planning, enabling a musculoskeletal robot to perform dexterous and precise rallies. Experimental results demonstrate that Diff-Muscle significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in success rates while maintaining minimal muscle activation. Notably, the proposed framework successfully enables the musculoskeletal robots to achieve continuous rallies in a challenging dual-robot setting.
tldr: The paper introduces Diff-Muscle, a hierarchical reinforcement learning framework that leverages differential flatness to enable musculoskeletal robots to perform challenging table tennis rallies more efficiently than existing methods, showcasing potential for complex, coordinated movements.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Diff-Muscle，一种分层强化学习框架，利用微分平坦性使肌肉骨骼机器人能够比现有方法更有效地进行具有挑战性的乒乓球 rallies，展示了在复杂、协调运动方面的潜力。
summary_zh: 肌肉骨骼机器人在灵活性和灵巧性方面具有卓越优势，使其成为具身智能领域一个极具前景的前沿方向。然而，目前的研究主要局限于相对简单的任务，限制了其在多段协调方面的潜力探索。此外，高效学习仍然是一个挑战，这主要是由于高维动作空间和固有的过度驱动结构。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了Diff-Muscle，一种肌肉骨骼机器人控制算法，该算法利用微分平坦性将策略学习从冗余的肌肉激活空间重新表述为显著降低维度的关节空间。此外，我们利用高动态的机器人乒乓球任务来评估我们的算法。具体来说，我们提出了一个分层强化学习框架，该框架集成了基于运动学的肌肉驱动控制器（K-MAC）和高层轨迹规划，使肌肉骨骼机器人能够执行灵巧而精准的连续击球。实验结果表明，Diff-Muscle在成功率方面显著优于最先进的基线方法，同时保持最小的肌肉激活。值得注意的是，所提出的框架成功地使肌肉骨骼机器人在具有挑战性的双机器人环境中实现了连续的连续击球。

title: CONTACT: CONtact-aware TACTile Learning for Robotic Disassembly
summary: Robotic disassembly involves contact-rich interactions in which successful manipulation depends not only on geometric alignment but also on force-dependent state transitions. While vision-based policies perform well in structured settings, their reliability often degrades in tight-tolerance, contact-dominated, or deformable scenarios. In this work, we systematically investigate the role of tactile sensing in robotic disassembly through both simulation and real-world experiments. We construct five rigid-body disassembly tasks in simulation with increasing geometric constraints and extraction difficulty. We further design five real-world tasks, including three rigid and two deformable scenarios, to evaluate contact-dependent manipulation. Within a unified learning framework, we compare three sensing configurations: Vision Only, Vision + tactile RGB (TacRGB), and Vision + tactile force field (TacFF). Across both simulation and real-world experiments, TacFF-based policies consistently achieve the highest success rates, with particularly notable gains in contact-dependent and deformable settings. Notably, naive fusion of TacRGB and TacFF underperforms either modality alone, indicating that simple concatenation can dilute task-relevant force information. Our results show that tactile sensing plays a critical, task-dependent role in robotic disassembly, with structured force-field representations being particularly effective in contact-dominated scenarios.
tldr: This paper explores the use of tactile sensing, particularly force-field representations, in robotic disassembly tasks, demonstrating improved success rates in contact-rich and deformable scenarios compared to vision-only approaches.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了触觉感知，特别是力场表示，在机器人拆卸任务中的应用，并证明与纯视觉方法相比，在接触密集和可变形场景中提高了成功率。
summary_zh: 机器人拆卸涉及富含接触的交互，其中成功操作不仅取决于几何对齐，还取决于力依赖的状态转换。虽然基于视觉的策略在结构化环境中表现良好，但其可靠性通常会在紧公差、接触主导或可变形的场景中降低。在这项工作中，我们通过仿真和真实世界的实验，系统地研究了触觉传感器在机器人拆卸中的作用。我们构建了五个仿真中的刚体拆卸任务，这些任务具有不断增加的几何约束和提取难度。我们进一步设计了五个真实世界的任务，包括三个刚性场景和两个可变形场景，以评估接触依赖的操作。在一个统一的学习框架内，我们比较了三种传感配置：仅视觉（Vision Only）、视觉+触觉RGB（TacRGB）和视觉+触觉力场（TacFF）。在仿真和真实世界的实验中，基于TacFF的策略始终获得最高的成功率，尤其是在接触依赖和可变形场景中取得了显著的提升。值得注意的是，TacRGB和TacFF的简单融合效果均不如单独使用任何一种模式，表明简单的串联会稀释与任务相关的力信息。我们的结果表明，触觉传感器在机器人拆卸中发挥着关键的、任务依赖的作用，其中结构化的力场表示在接触主导的场景中尤其有效。

title: An Open-Source Robotics Research Platform for Autonomous Laparoscopic Surgery
summary: Autonomous robot-assisted surgery demands reliable, high-precision platforms that strictly adhere to the safety and kinematic constraints of minimally invasive procedures. Existing research platforms, primarily based on the da Vinci Research Kit, suffer from cable-driven mechanical limitations that degrade state-space consistency and hinder the downstream training of reliable autonomous policies. We present an open-source, robot-agnostic Remote Center of Motion (RCM) controller based on a closed-form analytical velocity solver that enforces the trocar constraint deterministically without iterative optimization. The controller operates in Cartesian space, enabling any industrial manipulator to function as a surgical robot. We provide implementations for the UR5e and Franka Emika Panda manipulators, and integrate stereoscopic 3D perception. We integrate the robot control into a full-stack ROS-based surgical robotics platform supporting teleoperation, demonstration recording, and deployment of learned policies via a decoupled server-client architecture. We validate the system on a bowel grasping and retraction task across phantom, ex vivo, and in vivo porcine laparoscopic procedures. RCM deviations remain sub-millimeter across all conditions, and trajectory smoothness metrics (SPARC, LDLJ) are comparable to expert demonstrations from the JIGSAWS benchmark recorded on the da Vinci system. These results demonstrate that the platform provides the precision and robustness required for teleoperation, data collection and autonomous policy deployment in realistic surgical scenarios.
tldr: This paper presents an open-source, robot-agnostic surgical robotics platform with a novel RCM controller, validated on various laparoscopic procedures, suitable for teleoperation, data collection, and autonomous policy deployment.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个开源的，与机器人无关的手术机器人平台，该平台具有一种新型RCM控制器，并在各种腹腔镜手术中进行了验证，适用于远程操作、数据收集和自主策略部署。
summary_zh: 自主机器人辅助手术要求可靠、高精度的平台，这些平台必须严格遵守微创手术的安全约束和运动学约束。现有的研究平台，主要基于达芬奇研究套件，受电缆驱动的机械限制影响，会降低状态空间的一致性，并阻碍可靠自主策略的下游训练。我们提出了一种开源的、与机器人无关的远程运动中心（RCM）控制器，它基于闭式解析速度求解器，可确定性地执行套管针约束，而无需迭代优化。该控制器在笛卡尔空间中运行，使任何工业机械臂都能够像手术机器人一样工作。我们提供了适用于UR5e和Franka Emika Panda机械臂的实现，并集成了立体3D感知。我们将机器人控制集成到一个完整的基于ROS的手术机器人平台中，该平台支持远程操作、演示记录，并通过解耦的服务器-客户端架构部署学习到的策略。我们在体模、离体和体内猪腹腔镜手术中的肠道抓取和回缩任务中验证了该系统。在所有条件下，RCM偏差始终保持在亚毫米级，轨迹平滑度指标（SPARC、LDLJ）与在达芬奇系统上记录的JIGSAWS基准专家演示相当。这些结果表明，该平台提供了在实际手术场景中进行远程操作、数据收集和自主策略部署所需的精度和鲁棒性。

title: STRIDE: Structured Lagrangian and Stochastic Residual Dynamics via Flow Matching
summary: Robotic systems operating in unstructured environments must operate under significant uncertainty arising from intermittent contacts, frictional variability, and unmodeled compliance. While recent model-free approaches have demonstrated impressive performance, many deployment settings still require predictive models that support planning, constraint handling, and online adaptation. Analytical rigid-body models provide strong physical structure but often fail to capture complex interaction effects, whereas purely data-driven models may violate physical consistency, exhibit data bias, and accumulate long-horizon drift. In this work, we propose STRIDE, a dynamics learning framework that explicitly separates conservative rigid-body mechanics from uncertain, effectively stochastic non-conservative interaction effects. The structured component is modeled using a Lagrangian Neural Network (LNN) to preserve energy-consistent inertial dynamics, while residual interaction forces are represented using Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) to capture multi-modal interaction phenomena. The two components are trained jointly end-to-end, enabling the model to retain physical structure while representing complex stochastic behavior. We evaluate STRIDE on systems of increasing complexity, including a pendulum, the Unitree Go1 quadruped, and the Unitree G1 humanoid. Results show 20% reduction in long-horizon prediction error and 30% reduction in contact force prediction error compared to deterministic residual baselines, supporting more reliable model-based control in uncertain robotic environments.
tldr: STRIDE combines Lagrangian Neural Networks for energy-consistent dynamics with Conditional Flow Matching to model uncertain interaction forces in robotics, achieving improved prediction accuracy compared to baselines.
tldr_zh: STRIDE结合了拉格朗日神经网络（LNN）用于能量一致的动力学建模，以及条件流匹配（CFM）来模拟机器人中的不确定交互力，相比基线方法实现了更高的预测精度。
summary_zh: 在非结构化环境中运行的机器人系统必须在由间歇性接触、摩擦变异性和未建模顺性引起的显著不确定性下运行。虽然最近的无模型方法已经展示了令人印象深刻的性能，但许多部署场景仍然需要支持规划、约束处理和在线自适应的预测模型。解析刚体模型提供了强大的物理结构，但通常无法捕捉复杂的交互效应，而纯粹数据驱动的模型可能违背物理一致性，表现出数据偏差，并累积长时程漂移。 在这项工作中，我们提出了 STRIDE，一个动力学学习框架，它显式地将保守刚体力学与不确定的，有效地随机的非保守交互效应分离。结构化组件使用拉格朗日神经网络 (LNN) 建模，以保持能量一致的惯性动力学，而残差交互力使用条件流匹配 (CFM) 表示，以捕捉多模态交互现象。这两个组件被端到端地联合训练，使模型能够保留物理结构，同时表示复杂的随机行为。我们在复杂性日益增加的系统上评估 STRIDE，包括一个摆、宇树 Go1 四足机器人和宇树 G1 人形机器人。结果表明，与确定性残差基线相比，长时程预测误差降低了 20%，接触力预测误差降低了 30%，从而支持在不确定的机器人环境中进行更可靠的基于模型的控制。

title: LAR-MoE: Latent-Aligned Routing for Mixture of Experts in Robotic Imitation Learning
summary: Imitation learning enables robots to acquire manipulation skills from demonstrations, yet deploying a policy across tasks with heterogeneous dynamics remains challenging, as models tend to average over distinct behavioral modes present in the demonstrations. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures address this by activating specialized subnetworks, but requires meaningful skill decompositions for expert routing. We introduce Latent-Aligned Routing for Mixture of Experts (LAR-MoE), a two-stage framework that decouples unsupervised skill discovery from policy learning. In pre-training, we learn a joint latent representation between observations and future actions through student-teacher co-training. In a post-training stage, the expert routing is regularized to follow the structure of the learned latent space, preventing expert collapse while maintaining parameter efficiency. We evaluate LAR-MoE in simulation and on hardware. On the LIBERO benchmark, our method achieves a 95.2% average success rate with 150M parameters. On a surgical bowel grasping and retraction task, LAR-MoE matches a supervised MoE baseline without requiring any phase annotations, and transfers zero-shot to ex vivo porcine tissue. Our findings suggest that latent-aligned routing provides a principled alternative to supervised skill decomposition, enabling structured expert specialization from unlabeled demonstrations.
tldr: The paper introduces LAR-MoE, a method for robotic imitation learning that decouples skill discovery and policy learning using latent-aligned routing in a Mixture of Experts architecture, achieving strong performance on manipulation tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了LAR-MoE，一种用于机器人模仿学习的方法，利用混合专家架构中的潜在对齐路由，将技能发现和策略学习解耦，在操作任务上取得了很好的性能。
summary_zh: 模仿学习使机器人能够从演示中获取操作技能，然而，在具有异构动力学的任务中部署策略仍然具有挑战性，因为模型倾向于对演示中存在的不同行为模式进行平均。混合专家 (MoE) 架构通过激活专门的子网络来解决这个问题，但需要有意义的技能分解来进行专家路由。我们提出了用于混合专家的潜在对齐路由 (LAR-MoE)，这是一个两阶段框架，将无监督技能发现与策略学习解耦。在预训练中，我们通过学生-教师协同训练学习观测和未来动作之间的联合潜在表示。在后训练阶段，专家路由被正则化，以遵循学习到的潜在空间的结构，防止专家崩塌，同时保持参数效率。我们在模拟和硬件上评估了 LAR-MoE。在 LIBERO 基准上，我们的方法以 1.5 亿参数实现了 95.2% 的平均成功率。在外科肠道抓取和牵开任务中，LAR-MoE 在不需要任何阶段注释的情况下，匹配了有监督 MoE 基线，并零样本迁移到离体猪组织。我们的研究结果表明，潜在对齐路由为有监督的技能分解提供了一种原则性的替代方案，能够从无标签的演示中实现结构化的专家专业化。

title: Tactile Recognition of Both Shapes and Materials with Automatic Feature Optimization-Enabled Meta Learning
summary: Tactile perception is indispensable for robots to implement various manipulations dexterously, especially in contact-rich scenarios. However, alongside the development of deep learning techniques, it meanwhile suffers from training data scarcity and a time-consuming learning process in practical applications since the collection of a large amount of tactile data is costly and sometimes even impossible. Hence, we propose an automatic feature optimization-enabled prototypical network to realize meta-learning, i.e., AFOP-ML framework. As a ``learn to learn" network, it not only adapts to new unseen classes rapidly with few-shot, but also learns how to determine the optimal feature space automatically. Based on the four-channel signals acquired from a tactile finger, both shapes and materials are recognized. On a 36-category benchmark, it outperforms several existing approaches by attaining an accuracy of 96.08% in 5-way-1-shot scenario, where only 1 example is available for training. It still remains 88.7% in the extreme 36-way-1-shot case. The generalization ability is further validated through three groups of experiment involving unseen shapes, materials and force/speed perturbations. More insights are additionally provided by this work for the interpretation of recognition tasks and improved design of tactile sensors.
tldr: The paper introduces an automatic feature optimization-enabled prototypical network (AFOP-ML) for tactile shape and material recognition, achieving high accuracy in few-shot learning scenarios and demonstrating strong generalization ability.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种自动特征优化原型网络（AFOP-ML），用于触觉形状和材料识别，在少样本学习场景中实现了高精度，并展示了强大的泛化能力。
summary_zh: 触觉感知对于机器人灵巧地执行各种操作至关重要，尤其是在富接触场景中。然而，伴随着深度学习技术的发展，触觉感知同时也面临着训练数据稀缺和学习过程耗时的难题，因为大量触觉数据的采集成本高昂，有时甚至是不可能的。有鉴于此，我们提出了一种自动特征优化的原型网络，以实现元学习，即AFOP-ML框架。作为一个“学习如何学习”的网络，它不仅能够以小样本快速适应新的、未见过的类别，还能自动学习如何确定最佳特征空间。基于从触觉手指获取的四通道信号，可以识别形状和材料。在36类基准测试中，它优于几种现有方法，在5路1次学习场景（即仅有1个训练样本）下达到了96.08%的准确率，而在极端情况下，36路1次学习仍然保持88.7%的准确率。通过涉及未见过的形状、材料以及力和速度扰动的三组实验，进一步验证了其泛化能力。此外，这项工作还为识别任务的解释和触觉传感器改进设计提供了更多见解。

title: Human-Aware Robot Behaviour in Self-Driving Labs
summary: Self-driving laboratories (SDLs) are rapidly transforming research in chemistry and materials science to accelerate new discoveries. Mobile robot chemists (MRCs) play a pivotal role by autonomously navigating the lab to transport samples, effectively connecting synthesis, analysis, and characterisation equipment. The instruments within an SDL are typically designed or retrofitted to be accessed by both human and robotic chemists, ensuring operational flexibility and integration between manual and automated workflows. In many scenarios, human and robotic chemists may need to use the same equipment simultaneously. Currently, MRCs rely on simple LiDAR-based obstruction detection, which forces the robot to passively wait if a human is present. This lack of situational awareness leads to unnecessary delays and inefficient coordination in time-critical automated workflows in human-robot shared labs. To address this, we present an initial study of an embodied, AI-driven perception method that facilitates proactive human-robot interaction in shared-access scenarios. Our method features a hierarchical human intention prediction model that allows the robot to distinguish between preparatory actions (waiting) and transient interactions (accessing the instrument). Our results demonstrate that the proposed approach enhances efficiency by enabling proactive human-robot interaction, streamlining coordination, and potentially increasing the efficiency of autonomous scientific labs.
tldr: This paper presents a human intention prediction model to improve human-robot interaction in self-driving labs, allowing robots to proactively interact with humans and reduce delays. It enhances efficiency by enabling better coordination between human and robotic chemists.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种人类意图预测模型，旨在改善自动驾驶实验室中的人机交互，使机器人能够主动与人类互动并减少延迟。通过改进人类和机器人化学家之间的协调，从而提高效率。
summary_zh: 自动驾驶实验室 (SDL) 正在迅速改变化学和材料科学领域的研究，以加速新发现。移动机器人化学家 (MRC) 通过自主导航实验室以运输样品，有效连接合成、分析和表征设备，发挥着关键作用。SDL 中的仪器通常被设计或改装为可供人类和机器人化学家访问，从而确保操作的灵活性以及手动和自动化工作流程之间的集成。在许多情况下，人类和机器人化学家可能需要同时使用同一设备。目前，MRC 依赖于简单的基于 LiDAR 的障碍物检测，这迫使机器人被动地等待人的存在。这种情境感知能力的缺乏导致了在人机共享实验室中时间关键型自动化工作流程中不必要的延迟和低效的协作。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一项关于具身、人工智能驱动的感知方法的初步研究，该方法有助于在共享访问场景中实现主动的人机交互。我们的方法采用了一种分层的人类意图预测模型，该模型允许机器人区分准备动作（等待）和瞬时交互（访问仪器）。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法通过实现主动的人机交互、简化协作并可能提高自主科学实验室的效率来增强效率。

title: A Recipe for Stable Offline Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Despite remarkable achievements in single-agent offline reinforcement learning (RL), multi-agent RL (MARL) has struggled to adopt this paradigm, largely persisting with on-policy training and self-play from scratch. One reason for this gap comes from the instability of non-linear value decomposition, leading prior works to avoid complex mixing networks in favor of linear value decomposition (e.g., VDN) with value regularization used in single-agent setups. In this work, we analyze the source of instability in non-linear value decomposition within the offline MARL setting. Our observations confirm that they induce value-scale amplification and unstable optimization. To alleviate this, we propose a simple technique, scale-invariant value normalization (SVN), that stabilizes actor-critic training without altering the Bellman fixed point. Empirically, we examine the interaction among key components of offline MARL (e.g., value decomposition, value learning, and policy extraction) and derive a practical recipe that unlocks its full potential.
tldr: This paper identifies instability issues in non-linear value decomposition for offline MARL and proposes a scale-invariant value normalization (SVN) technique to stabilize training, ultimately delivering a recipe for improved offline MARL performance.
tldr_zh: 本文指出了离线多智能体强化学习中非线性值分解的不稳定性问题，提出了一种尺度不变值归一化（SVN）技术来稳定训练，最终提供了一种改善离线多智能体强化学习性能的方案。
summary_zh: 尽管单智能体离线强化学习（RL）取得了显著成就，但多智能体强化学习（MARL）却难以采用这种范式，很大程度上仍局限于从零开始的在线策略训练和自博弈。造成这种差距的一个原因是非线性值分解的不稳定性，导致以往的研究倾向于避免复杂的混合网络，转而采用线性值分解（例如，VDN）以及在单智能体设置中使用的值函数正则化。在这项工作中，我们分析了离线MARL环境中非线性值分解的不稳定性来源。我们的观察证实，它们会引起值尺度放大和不稳定的优化。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种简单的技术，尺度不变的值归一化（SVN），它可以在不改变贝尔曼不动点的情况下稳定 Actor-Critic 训练。在实验中，我们检验了离线MARL关键组成部分（例如，值分解、值学习和策略提取）之间的相互作用，并推导出一个实用的方法，以释放其全部潜力。

title: StructBiHOI: Structured Articulation Modeling for Long--Horizon Bimanual Hand--Object Interaction Generation
summary: Recent progress in 3D hand--object interaction (HOI) generation has primarily focused on single--hand grasp synthesis, while bimanual manipulation remains significantly more challenging. Long--horizon planning instability, fine--grained joint articulation, and complex cross--hand coordination make coherent bimanual generation difficult, especially under multimodal conditions. Existing approaches often struggle to simultaneously ensure temporal consistency, physical plausibility, and semantic alignment over extended sequences. We propose StructBiHOI, a Structured articulation modeling framework for long-horizon Bimanual HOI generation. Our key insight is to structurally disentangle temporal joint planning from frame--level manipulation refinement. Specifically, a jointVAE models long-term joint evolution conditioned on object geometry and task semantics, while a maniVAE refines fine-grained hand poses at the single--frame level. To enable stable and efficient long--sequence generation, we incorporate a state--space--inspired diffusion denoiser based on Mamba, which models long--range dependencies with linear complexity. This hierarchical design facilitates coherent dual-hand coordination and articulated object interaction. Extensive experiments on bimanual manipulation and single-hand grasping benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves superior long--horizon stability, motion realism, and computational efficiency compared to strong baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces StructBiHOI, a framework for generating long-horizon bimanual hand-object interactions, using a hierarchical approach with a jointVAE for long-term planning and a maniVAE for fine-grained refinement, incorporating Mamba for temporal modeling.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了 StructBiHOI，一个用于生成长时间双手动手对象交互的框架，它采用分层方法，使用 jointVAE 进行长期规划，使用 maniVAE 进行细粒度细化，并结合 Mamba 进行时间建模。
summary_zh: 3D手部-物体交互（HOI）生成领域的最新进展主要集中在单手抓取合成上，而双手操作仍然极具挑战性。长时程规划的不稳定性、精细的关节铰接以及复杂的交叉手部协调使得连贯的双手生成变得困难，尤其是在多模态条件下。现有方法通常难以在延长序列中同时确保时间一致性、物理合理性和语义对齐。我们提出了StructBiHOI，一个用于长时程双手HOI生成的结构化铰接建模框架。我们的关键见解是，从结构上解耦时间关节规划和帧级别操作细化。具体而言，一个jointVAE根据物体几何形状和任务语义，对长期关节演化进行建模，而一个maniVAE在单帧级别上细化精细的手部姿势。为了实现稳定且高效的长序列生成，我们结合了一个基于Mamba的状态空间启发扩散去噪器，该去噪器以线性复杂度建模远距离依赖关系。这种分层设计有助于连贯的双手机器人协调和铰接物体交互。在双手操作和单手抓取基准测试上的大量实验表明，与强大的基线方法相比，我们的方法在长时程稳定性、运动真实性和计算效率方面均表现出优异的性能。

title: Perception-Aware Communication-Free Multi-UAV Coordination in the Wild
summary: We present a communication-free method for safe multi-robot coordination in complex environments such as forests with dense canopy cover, where GNSS is unavailable. Our approach relies on an onboard anisotropic 3D LiDAR sensor used for SLAM as well as for detecting obstacles and neighboring robots. We develop a novel perception-aware 3D navigation framework that enables robots to safely and effectively progress toward a goal region despite limited sensor field-of-view. The approach is evaluated through extensive simulations across diverse scenarios and validated in real-world field experiments, demonstrating its scalability, robustness, and reliability.
tldr: This paper presents a communication-free multi-UAV coordination method using onboard LiDAR for SLAM and obstacle/robot detection in GNSS-denied environments, validated in simulations and real-world experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种无需通信的多无人机协同方法，该方法使用机载激光雷达进行SLAM以及障碍物/机器人检测，适用于GNSS受限环境，并在模拟和真实世界实验中进行了验证。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种无需通信的方法，用于在复杂的环境中（例如具有密集树冠覆盖且GNSS不可用的森林）实现安全的多机器人协同。我们的方法依赖于用于SLAM以及检测障碍物和邻近机器人的机载各向异性3D LiDAR传感器。我们开发了一种新型的感知感知型3D导航框架，该框架能够使机器人在传感器视野有限的情况下，安全有效地朝着目标区域前进。该方法通过在各种场景中进行的大量仿真评估，并在真实的野外实验中得到验证，证明了其可扩展性、鲁棒性和可靠性。

title: Hierarchical Multi-Modal Planning for Fixed-Altitude Sparse Target Search and Sampling
summary: Efficient monitoring of sparse benthic phenomena, such as coral colonies, presents a great challenge for Autonomous Underwater Vehicles. Traditional exhaustive coverage strategies are energy-inefficient, while recent adaptive sampling approaches rely on costly vertical maneuvers. To address these limitations, we propose HIMoS (Hierarchical Informative Multi-Modal Search), a fixed-altitude framework for sparse coral search-and-sample missions. The system integrates a heterogeneous sensor suite within a two-layer planning architecture. At the strategic level, a Global Planner optimizes topological routes to maximize potential discovery. At the tactical level, a receding-horizon Local Planner leverages differentiable belief propagation to generate kinematically feasible trajectories that balance acoustic substrate exploration, visual coral search, and close-range sampling. Validated in high-fidelity simulations derived from real-world coral reef benthic surveys, our approach demonstrates superior mission efficiency compared to state-of-the-art baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces HIMoS, a hierarchical multi-modal planning framework for AUVs to efficiently search and sample sparse coral colonies at fixed altitudes, demonstrated through simulations.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了HIMoS，一种用于AUV的分层多模态规划框架，能够以固定高度有效地搜索和采样稀疏的珊瑚群落，并通过仿真进行了验证。
summary_zh: 珊瑚群落等稀疏底栖现象的高效监测对自主水下航行器提出了巨大挑战。传统的穷举覆盖策略能源效率低下，而最近的自适应采样方法则依赖于代价高昂的垂直机动。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种用于稀疏珊瑚搜索和采样任务的固定高度框架HIMoS（分层信息多模态搜索）。该系统在一个两层规划架构中集成了一套异构传感器。在战略层面上，全局规划器优化拓扑路径，以最大化潜在发现。在战术层面上，一个后退视界局部规划器利用可微分的信念传播来生成运动学上可行的轨迹，从而平衡声学基底探索、视觉珊瑚搜索和近距离采样。在从真实珊瑚礁底栖调查中获取的高保真模拟验证中，我们的方法表现出优于最先进基线的任务效率。

title: EndoSERV: A Vision-based Endoluminal Robot Navigation System
summary: Robot-assisted endoluminal procedures are increasingly used for early cancer intervention. However, the intricate, narrow and tortuous pathways within the luminal anatomy pose substantial difficulties for robot navigation. Vision-based navigation offers a promising solution, but existing localization approaches are error-prone due to tissue deformation, in vivo artifacts and a lack of distinctive landmarks for consistent localization. This paper presents a novel EndoSERV localization method to address these challenges. It includes two main parts, \textit{i.e.}, \textbf{SE}gment-to-structure and \textbf{R}eal-to-\textbf{V}irtual mapping, and hence the name. For long-range and complex luminal structures, we divide them into smaller sub-segments and estimate the odometry independently. To cater for label insufficiency, an efficient transfer technique maps real image features to the virtual domain to use virtual pose ground truth. The training phases of EndoSERV include an offline pretraining to extract texture-agnostic features, and an online phase that adapts to real-world conditions. Extensive experiments based on both public and clinical datasets have been performed to demonstrate the effectiveness of the method even without any real pose labels.
tldr: The paper introduces EndoSERV, a novel vision-based localization method for endoluminal robot navigation that uses segment-to-structure and real-to-virtual mapping to overcome challenges like tissue deformation and lack of landmarks,demonstrating effective localization without real pose labels.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为EndoSERV的新型视觉定位方法，用于内窥镜机器人导航。该方法利用分段结构和实物到虚拟映射来克服组织变形和缺乏地标等挑战，并展示了在没有真实位姿标签的情况下有效的定位。
summary_zh: 机器人辅助腔内手术正日益广泛地应用于早期癌症干预。然而，腔内解剖结构中复杂、狭窄且迂曲的通道对机器人的导航构成重大挑战。基于视觉的导航提供了一种很有前景的解决方案，但现有的定位方法容易出错，原因在于组织变形、体内伪影以及缺乏用于一致定位的独特地标。本文提出了一种新型的EndoSERV定位方法来应对这些挑战。该方法主要包括两部分，即**SE**gment-to-structure（段到结构）和**R**eal-to-**V**irtual mapping（实到虚映射），故而得名。对于长距离和复杂的腔内结构，我们将其划分为更小的子段，并独立估计里程计。为了解决标签不足的问题，一种高效的迁移技术将真实图像特征映射到虚拟域，从而利用虚拟姿态真值。EndoSERV的训练阶段包括离线预训练（以提取纹理无关特征）和在线阶段（以适应真实环境）。基于公共数据集和临床数据集的大量实验表明，即使在没有任何真实姿态标签的情况下，该方法也有效。

title: FlowTouch: View-Invariant Visuo-Tactile Prediction
summary: Tactile sensation is essential for contact-rich manipulation tasks. It provides direct feedback on object geometry, surface properties, and interaction forces, enhancing perception and enabling fine-grained control. An inherent limitation of tactile sensors is that readings are available only when an object is touched. This precludes their use during planning and the initial execution phase of a task. Predicting tactile information from visual information can bridge this gap. A common approach is to learn a direct mapping from camera images to the output of vision-based tactile sensors. However, the resulting model will depend strongly on the specific setup and on how well the camera can capture the area where an object is touched. In this work, we introduce FlowTouch, a novel model for view-invariant visuo-tactile prediction. Our key idea is to use an object's local 3D mesh to encode rich information for predicting tactile patterns while abstracting away from scene-dependent details. FlowTouch integrates scene reconstruction and Flow Matching-based models for image generation. Our results show that FlowTouch is able to bridge the sim-to-real gap and generalize to new sensor instances. We further show that the resulting tactile images can be used for downstream grasp stability prediction. Our code, datasets and videos are available at https://flowtouch.github.io/
tldr: The paper introduces FlowTouch, a view-invariant visuo-tactile prediction model that uses an object's 3D mesh and Flow Matching to predict tactile patterns from vision, showing sim-to-real transfer and generalization for grasp stability prediction.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了FlowTouch，一个视角不变的视觉-触觉预测模型，该模型使用物体的3D网格和Flow Matching从视觉预测触觉模式，展示了从仿真到现实的迁移和泛化能力，并可用于抓取稳定性预测。
summary_zh: 触觉感知对于涉及大量接触的操控任务至关重要。它提供关于物体几何形状、表面属性和交互力的直接反馈，从而增强感知并实现精细控制。触觉传感器的一个固有局限性在于，只有在触摸物体时才能获得读数。这使其无法在任务的规划阶段和初始执行阶段使用。从视觉信息预测触觉信息可以弥补这一差距。一种常见的方法是学习从相机图像到基于视觉的触觉传感器输出的直接映射。然而，由此产生的模型将强烈依赖于特定的设置，以及相机捕捉物体接触区域的能力。在这项工作中，我们介绍FlowTouch，一种用于视角不变视触觉预测的新型模型。我们的关键思想是使用物体的局部3D网格来编码丰富的信息，以预测触觉模式，同时抽象出场景相关的细节。FlowTouch集成了场景重建和基于Flow Matching的图像生成模型。我们的结果表明，FlowTouch能够弥合从仿真到现实的差距，并推广到新的传感器实例。我们进一步表明，由此产生的触觉图像可用于下游的抓取稳定性预测。我们的代码、数据集和视频可在https://flowtouch.github.io/上获取。

title: Multifingered force-aware control for humanoid robots
summary: In this paper, we address force-aware control and force distribution in robotic platforms with multi-fingered hands. Given a target goal and force estimates from tactile sensors, we design a controller that adapts the motion of the torso, arm, wrist, and fingers, redistributing forces to maintain stable contact with objects of varying mass distribution or unstable contacts. To estimate forces, we collect a dataset of tactile signals and ground-truth force measurements using five Xela magnetic sensors interacting with indenters, and train force estimators. We then introduce a model-based control scheme that minimizes the distance between the Center of Pressure (CoP) and the centroid of the fingertips contact polygon. Since our method relies on estimated forces rather than raw tactile signals, it has the potential to be applied to any sensor capable of force estimation. We validate our framework on a balancing task with five objects, achieving a $82.7\%$ success rate, and further evaluate it in multi-object scenarios, achieving $80\%$ accuracy. Code and data can be found here https://github.com/hsp-iit/multifingered-force-aware-control.
tldr: This paper presents a force-aware control scheme for multi-fingered robotic hands that uses tactile sensor data to adapt to varying object mass distributions and unstable contacts, achieving high success rates in balancing and multi-object scenarios.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种力感知的多指机器人手控制方案，利用触觉传感器数据来适应不同的物体质量分布和不稳定的接触，在平衡和多物体场景中取得了很高的成功率。
summary_zh: 本文研究了具有多指手的机器人平台中的力感知控制和力分配问题。给定目标和来自触觉传感器的力估计值，我们设计了一种控制器，该控制器可调整躯干、手臂、手腕和手指的运动，重新分配力以维持与质量分布变化或不稳定接触物体的稳定接触。为了估计力，我们收集了触觉信号和真实力测量的数据集，该数据集使用五个 Xela 磁性传感器与压头交互，并训练力估计器。然后，我们引入了一种基于模型的控制方案，该方案最小化压力中心 (CoP) 与指尖接触多边形的质心之间的距离。由于我们的方法依赖于估计的力而不是原始触觉信号，因此它有可能应用于任何能够进行力估计的传感器。我们在平衡五个物体的任务中验证了我们的框架，成功率达到 $82.7\%$，并进一步在多物体场景中对其进行了评估，实现了 $80\%$ 的准确率。代码和数据可以在此处找到：https://github.com/hsp-iit/multifingered-force-aware-control。

title: Adaptive Vision-Based Control of Redundant Robots with Null-Space Interaction for Human-Robot Collaboration
summary: Human-robot collaboration aims to extend human ability through cooperation with robots. This technology is currently helping people with physical disabilities, has transformed the manufacturing process of companies, improved surgical performance, and will likely revolutionize the daily lives of everyone in the future. Being able to enhance the performance of both sides, such that human-robot collaboration outperforms a single robot/human, remains an open issue. For safer and more effective collaboration, a new control scheme has been proposed for redundant robots in this paper, consisting of an adaptive vision-based control term in task space and an interactive control term in null space. Such a formulation allows the robot to autonomously carry out tasks in an unknown environment without prior calibration while also interacting with humans to deal with unforeseen changes (e.g., potential collision, temporary needs) under the redundant configuration. The decoupling between task space and null space helps to explore the collaboration safely and effectively without affecting the main task of the robot end-effector. The stability of the closed-loop system has been rigorously proved with Lyapunov methods, and both the convergence of the position error in task space and that of the damping model in null space are guaranteed. The experimental results of a robot manipulator guided with the technology of augmented reality (AR) are presented to illustrate the performance of the control scheme.
tldr: This paper proposes an adaptive vision-based control scheme for redundant robots in human-robot collaboration, allowing autonomous task execution and human interaction while ensuring stability and convergence.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于人机协作的冗余机器人自适应视觉控制方案，该方案允许自主执行任务和人机交互，同时确保稳定性和收敛性。
summary_zh: 人机协作旨在通过与机器人的合作来扩展人类的能力。目前，这项技术正在帮助肢体残疾人士，已经转变了公司的制造流程，提高了外科手术的性能，并且有望彻底改变未来每个人的日常生活。如何提高双方的性能，从而使人机协作优于单个机器人/人类，仍然是一个未决问题。为了实现更安全、更有效的协作，本文提出了一种针对冗余机器人的新型控制方案，该方案由任务空间中的自适应视觉控制项和零空间中的交互控制项组成。这种结构使得机器人能够在未知环境中自主执行任务，无需事先校准，同时还能与人类进行交互，以应对冗余配置下的意外变化（例如，潜在碰撞，临时需求）。任务空间和零空间之间的解耦有助于安全有效地探索协作，而不会影响机器人末端执行器的主要任务。采用 Lyapunov 方法严格证明了闭环系统的稳定性，并保证了任务空间中位置误差的收敛性和零空间中阻尼模型的收敛性。最后，通过增强现实（AR）技术引导机器人机械臂的实验结果，验证了该控制方案的性能。

title: See and Switch: Vision-Based Branching for Interactive Robot-Skill Programming
summary: Programming robots by demonstration (PbD) is an intuitive concept, but scaling it to real-world variability remains a challenge for most current teaching frameworks. Conditional task graphs are very expressive and can be defined incrementally, which fits very well with the PbD idea. However, acting using conditional task graphs requires reliable perception-grounded online branch selection. In this paper, we present See & Switch, an interactive teaching-and-execution framework that represents tasks as user-extendable graphs of skill parts connected via decision states (DS), enabling conditional branching during replay. Unlike prior approaches that rely on manual branching or low-dimensional signals (e.g., proprioception), our vision-based Switcher uses eye-in-hand images (high-dimensional) to select among competing successor skill parts and to detect out-of-distribution contexts that require new demonstrations. We integrate kinesthetic teaching, joystick control, and hand gestures via an input-modality-abstraction layer and demonstrate that our proposed method is teaching modality-independent, enabling efficient in-situ recovery demonstrations. The system is validated in experiments on three challenging dexterous manipulation tasks. We evaluate our method under diverse conditions and furthermore conduct user studies with 8 participants. We show that the proposed method reliably performs branch selection and anomaly detection for novice users, achieving 90.7 % and 87.9 % accuracy, respectively, across 576 real-robot rollouts. We provide all code and data required to reproduce our experiments at http://imitrob.ciirc.cvut.cz/publications/seeandswitch.
tldr: The paper introduces See & Switch, an interactive robot teaching framework using vision-based branching to enable conditional task execution and error recovery through kinesthetic teaching, joystick control, and hand gestures. It demonstrates high accuracy in branch selection and anomaly detection on real robot tasks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为See & Switch的交互式机器人教学框架，该框架使用基于视觉的分支来实现条件任务执行和错误恢复，通过动觉教学、操纵杆控制和手势。结果表明，该方法在真实机器人任务中实现了高精度的分支选择和异常检测。
summary_zh: 通过示教编程机器人(PbD)是一个直观的概念，但对于当前大多数教学框架而言，将其扩展到现实世界的变异性仍然是一个挑战。条件任务图具有很强的表达能力，并且可以增量定义，这与PbD的思想非常契合。然而，使用条件任务图进行操作需要可靠的基于感知的在线分支选择。在本文中，我们提出了See & Switch，一个交互式的教学和执行框架，它将任务表示为用户可扩展的技能部件图，这些技能部件通过决策状态(DS)连接，从而在回放期间实现条件分支。与依赖于手动分支或低维信号（例如，本体感觉）的先前方法不同，我们基于视觉的切换器使用手眼相机图像（高维）来选择竞争的后续技能部件，并检测需要新的示教的超出分布的上下文。我们通过输入模式抽象层集成了动觉教学、操纵杆控制和手势，并证明了我们提出的方法与教学模式无关，能够进行高效的现场恢复示教。该系统在三个具有挑战性的灵巧操作任务的实验中得到验证。我们在各种条件下评估了我们的方法，并对8名参与者进行了用户研究。我们表明，所提出的方法可靠地为新手用户执行分支选择和异常检测，在576次真实机器人实验中分别实现了90.7%和87.9%的准确率。我们提供了重现我们实验所需的所有代码和数据，网址为http://imitrob.ciirc.cvut.cz/publications/seeandswitch。

title: Dual-Horizon Hybrid Internal Model for Low-Gravity Quadrupedal Jumping with Hardware-in-the-Loop Validation
summary: Locomotion under reduced gravity is commonly realized through jumping, yet continuous pronking in lunar gravity remains challenging due to prolonged flight phases and sparse ground contact. The extended aerial duration increases landing impact sensitivity and makes stable attitude regulation over rough planetary terrain difficult. Existing approaches primarily address single jumps on flat surfaces and lack both continuous-terrain solutions and realistic hardware validation. This work presents a Dual-Horizon Hybrid Internal Model for continuous quadrupedal jumping under lunar gravity using proprioceptive sensing only. Two temporal encoders capture complementary time scales: a short-horizon branch models rapid vertical dynamics with explicit vertical velocity estimation, while a long-horizon branch models horizontal motion trends and center-of-mass height evolution across the jump cycle. The fused representation enables stable and continuous jumping under extended aerial phases characteristic of lunar gravity. To provide hardware-in-the-loop validation, we develop the MATRIX (Mixed-reality Adaptive Testbed for Robotic Integrated eXploration) platform, a digital-twin-driven system that offloads gravity through a pulley-counterweight mechanism and maps Unreal Engine lunar terrain to a motion platform and treadmill in real time. Using MATRIX, we demonstrate continuous jumping of a quadruped robot under lunar-gravity emulation across cratered lunar-like terrain.
tldr: This paper presents a novel Dual-Horizon Hybrid Internal Model for continuous quadrupedal jumping in simulated lunar gravity, addressing challenges of locomotion with prolonged flight phases and uneven terrain using a hardware-in-the-loop validation platform called MATRIX.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的双视界混合内部模型，用于在模拟月球重力下进行连续四足跳跃，通过硬件在环验证平台MATRIX解决了长时间飞行阶段和不平坦地形的运动挑战。
summary_zh: 在低重力环境下，跳跃是常见的运动方式，但由于飞行阶段延长和地面接触稀疏，在月球重力下持续跳跃仍然具有挑战性。延长的空中时间增加了着陆冲击的敏感性，并使在崎岖行星地形上稳定姿态调节变得困难。现有方法主要针对平坦表面上的单次跳跃，缺乏连续地形解决方案和实际硬件验证。本文提出了一种双视界混合内部模型，用于仅使用本体感受感知在月球重力下实现四足机器人连续跳跃。两个时间编码器捕获互补的时间尺度：一个短视界分支通过显式垂直速度估计来建模快速垂直动力学，而一个长视界分支则建模跳跃周期中的水平运动趋势和质心高度演变。融合的表示使得在月球重力下长时间空中阶段中能够实现稳定且连续的跳跃。为了提供硬件在环验证，我们开发了MATRIX（机器人集成探索的混合现实自适应测试平台）平台，这是一个数字孪生驱动的系统，它通过滑轮-配重机制卸载重力，并将虚幻引擎中的月球地形实时映射到运动平台和跑步机。使用MATRIX，我们展示了四足机器人在模拟月球重力下，在布满陨石坑的类月地形上进行连续跳跃。

title: VORL-EXPLORE: A Hybrid Learning Planning Approach to Multi-Robot Exploration in Dynamic Environments
summary: Hierarchical multi-robot exploration commonly decouples frontier allocation from local navigation, which can make the system brittle in dense and dynamic environments. Because the allocator lacks direct awareness of execution difficulty, robots may cluster at bottlenecks, trigger oscillatory replanning, and generate redundant coverage. We propose VORL-EXPLORE, a hybrid learning and planning framework that addresses this limitation through execution fidelity, a shared estimate of local navigability that couples task allocation with motion execution. This fidelity signal is incorporated into a fidelity-coupled Voronoi objective with inter-robot repulsion to reduce contention before it emerges. It also drives a risk-aware adaptive arbitration mechanism between global A* guidance and a reactive reinforcement learning policy, balancing long-range efficiency with safe interaction in confined spaces. The framework further supports online self-supervised recalibration of the fidelity model using pseudo-labels derived from recent progress and safety outcomes, enabling adaptation to non-stationary obstacles without manual risk tuning. We evaluate this capability separately in a dedicated severe-traffic ablation. Extensive experiments in randomized grids and a Gazebo factory scenario show high success rates, shorter path length, lower overlap, and robust collision avoidance. The source code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.
tldr: This paper introduces VORL-EXPLORE, a multi-robot exploration framework combining Voronoi-based planning with reinforcement learning for improved robustness and efficiency in dynamic environments by coupling task allocation with motion execution and adapting to non-stationary obstacles.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了VORL-EXPLORE，一种多机器人探索框架，结合了基于Voronoi的规划和强化学习，通过将任务分配与运动执行相耦合，并适应非静态障碍物，从而提高了在动态环境中的鲁棒性和效率。
summary_zh: 分层多机器人探索通常将边界分配与局部导航解耦，这可能导致系统在密集和动态环境中变得脆弱。由于分配器缺乏对执行难度的直接感知，机器人可能聚集在瓶颈处，触发振荡式重规划，并产生冗余覆盖。我们提出了VORL-EXPLORE，一种混合学习和规划框架，通过执行保真度解决这一限制，执行保真度是一种共享的局部可导航性估计，将任务分配与运动执行相结合。该保真度信号被纳入一个具有机器人间排斥力的保真度耦合的Voronoi目标中，以减少潜在的冲突。它还驱动一个风险感知的自适应仲裁机制，在全局A*引导和反应式强化学习策略之间进行仲裁，从而在长程效率和狭窄空间内的安全交互之间实现平衡。该框架进一步支持对保真度模型进行在线自监督重校准，使用从近期进展和安全结果中导出的伪标签，从而实现对非平稳障碍物的适应，而无需手动进行风险调整。我们通过专门的严重交通消融实验对这种能力进行了单独评估。在随机网格和Gazebo工厂场景中的大量实验表明，该框架具有较高的成功率、较短的路径长度、较低的重叠率以及稳健的避障能力。源代码将在接收后公开发布。

title: Omnidirectional Humanoid Locomotion on Stairs via Unsafe Stepping Penalty and Sparse LiDAR Elevation Mapping
summary: Humanoid robots, characterized by numerous degrees of freedom and a high center of gravity, are inherently unstable. Safe omnidirectional locomotion on stairs requires both omnidirectional terrain perception and reliable foothold selection. Existing methods often rely on forward-facing depth cameras, which create blind zones that restrict omnidirectional mobility. Furthermore, sparse post-contact unsafe stepping penalties lead to low learning efficiency and suboptimal strategies. To realize safe stair-traversal gaits, this paper introduces a single-stage training framework incorporating a dense unsafe stepping penalty that provides continuous feedback as the foot approaches a hazardous placement. To obtain stable and reliable elevation maps, we build a rolling point-cloud mapping system with spatiotemporal confidence decay and a self-protection zone mechanism, producing temporally consistent local maps. These maps are further refined by an Edge-Guided Asymmetric U-Net (EGAU), which mitigates reconstruction distortion caused by sparse LiDAR returns on stair risers. Simulation and real-robot experiments show that the proposed method achieves a near-100\% safe stepping rate on stair terrains in simulation, while maintaining a remarkably high safe stepping rate in real-world deployments. Furthermore, it completes a continuous long-distance walking test on complex outdoor terrains, demonstrating reliable sim-to-real transfer and long-term stability.
tldr: This paper presents a novel single-stage training framework for humanoid robots to achieve safe omnidirectional locomotion on stairs using a dense unsafe stepping penalty and a LiDAR-based elevation mapping system, demonstrating successful sim-to-real transfer.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的单阶段训练框架，利用密集的不安全踏步惩罚和基于激光雷达的高度图绘制系统，使人形机器人在楼梯上实现安全的全方位走动，并展示了成功的模拟到现实的迁移。
summary_zh: 人形机器人因其众多自由度和高重心而具有固有的不稳定性。在楼梯上安全的全向运动需要全向地形感知和可靠的落脚点选择。现有方法通常依赖于前向深度相机，这会产生盲区，限制全向移动性。此外，稀疏的接触后危险步进惩罚导致学习效率低下和次优策略。为了实现安全的楼梯穿越步态，本文提出了一种单阶段训练框架，该框架结合了密集的危险步进惩罚，从而在足部接近风险位置时提供连续的反馈。为了获得稳定可靠的高程图，我们构建了一个具有时空置信度衰减和自保护区机制的滚动点云映射系统，从而生成时间上一致的局部地图。Edge-Guided Asymmetric U-Net (EGAU)进一步细化这些地图，从而减轻因楼梯立面上稀疏LiDAR返回而造成的重建失真。仿真和真实机器人实验表明，所提出的方法在仿真中实现了接近100%的楼梯地形安全步进率，同时在真实部署中保持了极高的安全步进率。此外，它还完成了在复杂户外地形上的连续长距离行走测试，展示了可靠的从仿真到现实的迁移以及长期稳定性。

title: SPREAD: Subspace Representation Distillation for Lifelong Imitation Learning
summary: A key challenge in lifelong imitation learning (LIL) is enabling agents to acquire new skills from expert demonstrations while retaining prior knowledge. This requires preserving the low-dimensional manifolds and geometric structures that underlie task representations across sequential learning. Existing distillation methods, which rely on L2-norm feature matching in raw feature space, are sensitive to noise and high-dimensional variability, often failing to preserve intrinsic task manifolds. To address this, we introduce SPREAD, a geometry-preserving framework that employs singular value decomposition (SVD) to align policy representations across tasks within low-rank subspaces. This alignment maintains the underlying geometry of multimodal features, facilitating stable transfer, robustness, and generalization. Additionally, we propose a confidence-guided distillation strategy that applies a Kullback-Leibler divergence loss restricted to the top-M most confident action samples, emphasizing reliable modes and improving optimization stability. Experiments on the LIBERO, lifelong imitation learning benchmark, show that SPREAD substantially improves knowledge transfer, mitigates catastrophic forgetting, and achieves state-of-the-art performance.
tldr: The paper introduces SPREAD, a lifelong imitation learning framework that uses subspace representation distillation with SVD to preserve task geometry and a confidence-guided KL divergence loss for stable knowledge transfer and mitigation of catastrophic forgetting, achieving SOTA results on the LIBERO benchmark.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为SPREAD的终身模仿学习框架，它使用带有SVD的子空间表示蒸馏来保持任务几何形状，并使用置信度引导的KL散度损失来实现稳定的知识转移和减轻灾难性遗忘，在LIBERO基准测试上实现了SOTA结果。
summary_zh: 终身模仿学习（LIL）的一个关键挑战是使智能体在从专家示范中获取新技能的同时，保留先验知识。 这需要保持跨序列学习的底层任务表示的低维流形和几何结构。 现有的知识蒸馏方法依赖于原始特征空间中的L2范数特征匹配，对噪声和高维变化敏感，常无法保持固有的任务流形。 为了解决这个问题，我们引入SPREAD，一个几何保持框架，它采用奇异值分解（SVD）在低秩子空间中对齐跨任务的策略表示。 这种对齐保持了多模态特征的底层几何结构，从而促进了稳定的迁移、鲁棒性和泛化能力。 此外，我们提出了一种置信度引导的蒸馏策略，该策略应用受限于前M个最自信的动作样本的Kullback-Leibler散度损失，强调可靠的模式并提高优化稳定性。 在终身模仿学习基准LIBERO上的实验表明，SPREAD大幅提高了知识迁移，减轻了灾难性遗忘，并实现了最先进的性能。

title: Identifying Influential Actions in Human-Robot Interactions
summary: Human-robot interaction combines robotics, cognitive science, and human factors to study collaborative systems. This paper introduces a method for identifying influential robot actions using transfer entropy, a statistic that measures directed information transfer between time series. TE is effective for capturing complex, nonlinear interactions. We apply this method to analyze how robot actions affect human behavior during a conversation with a remotely controlled robot avatar. By focusing on the impact of proximity, our approach demonstrates TE's capability to identify key actions influencing human responses, highlighting its potential to improve the design and adaptability of robotic systems.
tldr: This paper introduces a transfer entropy-based method to identify influential robot actions affecting human behavior during human-robot interaction, specifically focusing on proximity during a conversation with a remotely controlled robot avatar.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于传递熵的方法，用于识别人机交互中影响人类行为的关键机器人动作，特别关注远程控制机器人化身对话期间的接近程度。
summary_zh: 人机交互结合了机器人学、认知科学和人因工程，旨在研究协作系统。本文介绍了一种使用传递熵识别关键机器人行为的方法，传递熵是一种度量时间序列之间定向信息传递的统计量。传递熵能有效捕捉复杂、非线性交互。我们应用该方法分析了在与远程控制的机器人化身进行对话期间，机器人行为如何影响人类行为。通过关注近距离的影响，我们的方法展示了传递熵识别影响人类反应的关键行为的能力，突出了其在改进机器人系统的设计和适应性方面的潜力。

title: Relating Reinforcement Learning to Dynamic Programming-Based Planning
summary: This paper bridges some of the gap between optimal planning and reinforcement learning (RL), both of which share roots in dynamic programming applied to sequential decision making or optimal control. Whereas planning typically favors deterministic models, goal termination, and cost minimization, RL tends to favor stochastic models, infinite-horizon discounting, and reward maximization in addition to learning-related parameters such as the learning rate and greediness factor. A derandomized version of RL is developed, analyzed, and implemented to yield performance comparisons with value iteration and Dijkstra's algorithm using simple planning models. Next, mathematical analysis shows: 1) conditions under which cost minimization and reward maximization are equivalent, 2) conditions for equivalence of single-shot goal termination and infinite-horizon episodic learning, and 3) conditions under which discounting causes goal achievement to fail. The paper then advocates for defining and optimizing truecost, rather than inserting arbitrary parameters to guide operations. Performance studies are then extended to the stochastic case, using planning-oriented criteria and comparing value iteration to RL with learning rates and greediness factors.
tldr: This paper analyzes the relationship between Reinforcement Learning and Dynamic Programming-based planning, develops a derandomized RL algorithm, and mathematically proves equivalence under specific conditions, advocating for truecost optimization.
tldr_zh: 本文分析了强化学习与基于动态规划的规划之间的关系，开发了一种非随机化的强化学习算法，并在特定条件下数学证明了它们之间的等价性，提倡truecost优化。
summary_zh: 本文在最优规划和强化学习 (RL) 之间架起了一座桥梁，这两者都源于应用于序列决策制定或最优控制的动态规划。规划通常偏好确定性模型、目标终止和成本最小化，而强化学习除了学习率和贪婪因子等学习相关参数外，更倾向于随机模型、无限视界折扣和奖励最大化。本文开发、分析并实现了一个非随机化的强化学习版本，以便使用简单的规划模型与价值迭代和Dijkstra算法进行性能比较。 接下来，数学分析表明：1) 成本最小化和奖励最大化等效的条件；2) 单次目标终止和无限视界情景学习等效的条件；以及3) 折扣导致目标达成失败的条件。 然后，本文提倡定义和优化真实成本 (truecost)，而不是插入任意参数来指导操作。随后，使用面向规划的标准将性能研究扩展到随机情况，并将价值迭代与具有学习率和贪婪因子的强化学习进行比较。

title: Preference-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning for Space-Time Efficient Online 3D Bin Packing
summary: Robotic bin packing is widely deployed in warehouse automation, with current systems achieving robust performance through heuristic and learning-based strategies. These systems must balance compact placement with rapid execution, where selecting alternative items or reorienting them can improve space utilization but introduce additional time. We propose a selection-based formulation that explicitly reasons over this trade-off: at each step, the robot evaluates multiple candidate actions, weighing expected packing benefit against estimated operational time. This enables time-aware strategies that selectively accept increased operational time when it yields meaningful spatial improvements. Our method, STEP (Space-Time Efficient Packing), uses a preference-conditioned, Transformer-based reinforcement learning policy, and allows generalization across candidate set sizes and integration with standard placement modules. It achieves a 44% reduction in operational time without compromising packing density. Additional material is available at https://step-packing.github.io.
tldr: This paper introduces STEP, a preference-conditioned reinforcement learning approach for robotic bin packing that balances space utilization and operational time, achieving a 44% reduction in operational time without sacrificing packing density.
tldr_zh: 这篇论文介绍了STEP，一种基于偏好条件的强化学习方法，用于机器人装箱，它平衡了空间利用率和操作时间，在不牺牲装箱密度的情况下，操作时间减少了44%。
summary_zh: 机器人分拣箱包装已被广泛应用于仓库自动化，当前系统通过启发式和基于学习的策略实现了稳健的性能。这些系统必须在紧凑放置和快速执行之间取得平衡，选择替代物品或重新调整其方向可以提高空间利用率，但会引入额外的时间。我们提出了一种基于选择的公式，明确地考虑了这种权衡：在每一步，机器人评估多个候选动作，权衡预期的包装收益和估计的操作时间。这使得时间感知策略能够在空间改善显著时有选择地接受增加的操作时间。 我们的方法STEP (空间-时间高效包装) 使用基于偏好的、基于Transformer的强化学习策略，并允许跨候选集大小进行泛化以及与标准放置模块集成。 它可以实现操作时间减少44%，而不会损害包装密度。 更多材料可在https://step-packing.github.io上获取。

title: Toward Global Intent Inference for Human Motion by Inverse Reinforcement Learning
summary: This paper investigates whether a single, unified cost function can explain and predict human reaching movements, in contrast with existing approaches that rely on subject- or posture-specific optimization criteria. Using the Minimal Observation Inverse Reinforcement Learning (MO-IRL) algorithm, together with a seven-dimensional set of candidate cost terms, we efficiently estimate time-varying cost weights for a standard planar reaching task. MO-IRL provides orders-of-magnitude faster convergence than bilevel formulations, while using only a fraction of the available data, enabling the practical exploration of time-varying cost structures. Three levels of generality are evaluated: Subject-Dependent Posture-Dependent, Subject-Dependent Posture-Independent, and Subject-Independent Posture-Independent. Across all cases, time-varying weights substantially improve trajectory reconstruction, yielding an average 27% reduction in RMSE compared to the baseline. The inferred costs consistently highlight a dominant role for joint-acceleration regulation, complemented by smaller contributions from torque-change smoothness. Overall, a single subject- and posture-agnostic time-varying cost function is shown to predict human reaching trajectories with high accuracy, supporting the existence of a unified optimality principle governing this class of movements.
tldr: This paper presents a method to infer a unified, time-varying cost function for human reaching movements using inverse reinforcement learning, demonstrating that a subject- and posture-agnostic cost function can accurately predict trajectories.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用逆强化学习推断人类伸手运动的统一时变代价函数的方法，证明了与subject和姿势无关的代价函数可以准确预测轨迹。
summary_zh: 本文研究是否可以使用单一、统一的代价函数来解释和预测人类的上肢抓握运动，这与现有的依赖于受试者或姿势特定的优化准则方法形成对比。我们使用最小观测逆强化学习（MO-IRL）算法，以及一个七维的候选代价项集合，有效地估计了标准平面抓握任务中随时间变化的代价权重。MO-IRL比双层规划公式收敛速度快几个数量级，同时仅使用部分可用数据，从而能够实际探索随时间变化的代价结构。我们评估了三个泛化程度：受试者相关姿势相关、受试者相关姿势无关和受试者无关姿势无关。在所有情况下，随时间变化的权重都显著提高了轨迹重建的精度，与基线相比，均方根误差（RMSE）平均降低了27%。推断出的代价始终强调关节加速度调节的主导作用，以及扭矩变化平滑性的较小贡献。总体而言，研究表明，单一的、与受试者和姿势无关的随时间变化的代价函数能够高精度地预测人类上肢抓握轨迹，从而支持存在一种统一的最优性原则来支配这类运动。

title: IronEngine: Towards General AI Assistant
summary: This paper presents IronEngine, a general AI assistant platform organized around a unified orchestration core that connects a desktop user interface, REST and WebSocket APIs, Python clients, local and cloud model backends, persistent memory, task scheduling, reusable skills, 24-category tool execution, MCP-compatible extensibility, and hardware-facing integration. IronEngine introduces a three-phase pipeline -- Discussion (Planner--Reviewer collaboration), Model Switch (VRAM-aware transition), and Execution (tool-augmented action loop) -- that separates planning quality from execution capability. The system features a hierarchical memory architecture with multi-level consolidation, a vectorized skill repository backed by ChromaDB, an adaptive model management layer supporting 92 model profiles with VRAM-aware context budgeting, and an intelligent tool routing system with 130+ alias normalization and automatic error correction. We present experimental results on file operation benchmarks achieving 100\% task completion with a mean total time of 1541 seconds across four heterogeneous tasks, and provide detailed comparisons with representative AI assistant systems including ChatGPT, Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, and open-source agent frameworks. Without disclosing proprietary prompts or core algorithms, this paper analyzes the platform's architectural decomposition, subsystem design, experimental performance, safety boundaries, and comparative engineering advantages. The resulting study positions IronEngine as a system-oriented foundation for general-purpose personal assistants, automation frameworks, and future human-centered agent platforms.
tldr: The paper introduces IronEngine, a general AI assistant platform with a novel three-phase pipeline and comprehensive features for task execution, model management, and tool integration, showcasing promising results in file operation benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个通用AI助手平台IronEngine，它具有新颖的三阶段流程，以及用于任务执行、模型管理和工具集成的全面功能，并在文件操作基准测试中展示了有希望的结果。
summary_zh: 本文介绍 IronEngine，一个通用的 AI 助手平台，其核心是统一的编排引擎，它连接了桌面用户界面、REST 和 WebSocket API、Python 客户端、本地和云模型后端、持久化内存、任务调度、可重用技能、24 类工具执行、MCP 兼容的扩展性以及面向硬件的集成。IronEngine 引入了一个三阶段的流水线——讨论（规划器-审阅者协作）、模型切换（VRAM 感知的转换）和执行（工具增强的行动循环）——将规划质量与执行能力分离。该系统具有一个带有多级整合的分层内存架构、一个由 ChromaDB 支持的向量化技能库、一个支持 92 个模型配置文件的自适应模型管理层，并具备 VRAM 感知的上下文预算，以及一个具有 130 多个别名标准化和自动错误纠正的智能工具路由系统。我们展示了在文件操作基准测试上的实验结果，在四个异构任务中实现了 100% 的任务完成率，平均总时间为 1541 秒，并提供了与代表性 AI 助手系统（包括 ChatGPT、Claude Desktop、Cursor、Windsurf 和开源代理框架）的详细比较。在不披露专有提示或核心算法的前提下，本文分析了该平台的架构分解、子系统设计、实验性能、安全边界和比较工程优势。最终的研究将 IronEngine 定位为一个以系统为导向的基础，适用于通用个人助手、自动化框架和未来以人为中心的代理平台。

title: A Hierarchical Error-Corrective Graph Framework for Autonomous Agents with LLM-Based Action Generation
summary: We propose a Hierarchical Error-Corrective Graph FrameworkforAutonomousAgentswithLLM-BasedActionGeneration(HECG),whichincorporates three core innovations: (1) Multi-Dimensional Transferable Strategy (MDTS): by integrating task quality metrics (Q), confidence/cost metrics (C), reward metrics (R), and LLM-based semantic reasoning scores (LLM-Score), MDTS achieves multi-dimensional alignment between quantitative performance and semantic context, enabling more precise selection of high-quality candidate strate gies and effectively reducing the risk of negative transfer. (2) Error Matrix Classification (EMC): unlike simple confusion matrices or overall performance metrics, EMC provides structured attribution of task failures by categorizing errors into ten types, such as Strategy Errors (Strategy Whe) and Script Parsing Errors (Script-Parsing-Error), and decomposing them according to severity, typical actions, error descriptions, and recoverability. This allows precise analysis of the root causes of task failures, offering clear guidance for subsequent error correction and strategy optimization rather than relying solely on overall success rates or single performance metrics. (3) Causal-Context Graph Retrieval (CCGR): to enhance agent retrieval capabilities in dynamic task environments, we construct graphs from historical states, actions, and event sequences, where nodes store executed actions, next-step actions, execution states, transferable strategies, and other relevant information, and edges represent causal dependencies such as preconditions for transitions between nodes. CCGR identifies subgraphs most relevant to the current task context, effectively capturing structural relationships beyond vector similarity, allowing agents to fully leverage contextual information, accelerate strategy adaptation, and improve execution reliability in complex, multi-step tasks.
tldr: The paper introduces a Hierarchical Error-Corrective Graph Framework (HECG) for autonomous agents using LLMs, aiming to improve action generation through multi-dimensional strategy transfer, error classification, and causal-context graph retrieval.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于自主代理的分层纠错图框架（HECG），该框架使用LLM，旨在通过多维策略转移、错误分类和因果上下文图检索来改进动作生成。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种用于自主代理的基于大型语言模型动作生成的层级纠错图框架(HECG)，该框架包含三个核心创新点：(1) 多维可迁移策略(MDTS)：通过集成任务质量指标(Q)、置信度/成本指标(C)、奖励指标(R)以及基于大型语言模型的语义推理分数(LLM-Score)，MDTS实现了定量性能和语义上下文之间的多维对齐，从而能够更精确地选择高质量的候选策略，并有效降低负迁移的风险。(2) 错误矩阵分类(EMC)：与简单的混淆矩阵或整体性能指标不同，EMC通过将错误分为十种类型，例如策略错误(Strategy Whe)和脚本解析错误(Script-Parsing-Error)，并根据严重性、典型动作、错误描述和可恢复性对其进行分解，从而提供对任务失败的结构化归因。这允许对任务失败的根本原因进行精确分析，为后续的错误纠正和策略优化提供明确的指导，而不是仅仅依赖于整体成功率或单一性能指标。(3) 因果-上下文图检索(CCGR)：为了增强代理在动态任务环境中的检索能力，我们从历史状态、动作和事件序列构建图，其中节点存储已执行的动作、下一步动作、执行状态、可迁移策略和其他相关信息，边表示因果依赖关系，例如节点之间转换的先决条件。CCGR识别与当前任务上下文最相关的子图，有效地捕捉向量相似性之外的结构关系，使代理能够充分利用上下文信息，加速策略适应，并提高在复杂、多步任务中的执行可靠性。

title: FinToolBench: Evaluating LLM Agents for Real-World Financial Tool Use
summary: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into the financial domain is driving a paradigm shift from passive information retrieval to dynamic, agentic interaction. While general-purpose tool learning has witnessed a surge in benchmarks, the financial sector, characterized by high stakes, strict compliance, and rapid data volatility, remains critically underserved. Existing financial evaluations predominantly focus on static textual analysis or document-based QA, ignoring the complex reality of tool execution. Conversely, general tool benchmarks lack the domain-specific rigor required for finance, often relying on toy environments or a negligible number of financial APIs. To bridge this gap, we introduce FinToolBench, the first real-world, runnable benchmark dedicated to evaluating financial tool learning agents. Unlike prior works limited to a handful of mock tools, FinToolBench establishes a realistic ecosystem coupling 760 executable financial tools with 295 rigorous, tool-required queries. We propose a novel evaluation framework that goes beyond binary execution success, assessing agents on finance-critical dimensions: timeliness, intent type, and regulatory domain alignment. Furthermore, we present FATR, a finance-aware tool retrieval and reasoning baseline that enhances stability and compliance. By providing the first testbed for auditable, agentic financial execution, FinToolBench sets a new standard for trustworthy AI in finance. The tool manifest, execution environment, and evaluation code will be open-sourced to facilitate future research.
tldr: The paper introduces FinToolBench, a new benchmark for evaluating LLM agents using real-world financial tools, addressing the gap in existing benchmarks by focusing on executable financial APIs and finance-specific evaluation metrics.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了FinToolBench，一个新的基准测试，用于评估使用真实金融工具的LLM代理，通过关注可执行的金融API和金融特定的评估指标，填补了现有基准测试的空白。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）集成到金融领域，正推动着从被动信息检索到动态、代理式交互的范式转变。虽然通用工具学习已经见证了基准测试的激增，但金融领域，以高风险、严格合规和快速数据波动为特征，仍然严重缺乏相应的服务。现有的金融评估主要集中在静态文本分析或基于文档的问答上，忽略了工具执行的复杂现实。相反，通用工具基准测试缺乏金融领域特定的严谨性，通常依赖于玩具环境或极少数量的金融API。为了弥合这一差距，我们推出了FinToolBench，这是首个真实世界、可运行的基准，专门用于评估金融工具学习代理。与之前仅限于少量模拟工具的工作不同，FinToolBench建立了一个现实的生态系统，将760个可执行的金融工具与295个严格的、需要工具的查询相结合。我们提出了一种新的评估框架，它超越了二元执行成功，从金融关键维度评估代理：及时性、意图类型和监管领域对齐。此外，我们提出了FATR，一种金融感知的工具检索和推理基线，可增强稳定性和合规性。通过为可审计的、代理式金融执行提供首个测试平台，FinToolBench为金融领域的可信AI设定了新的标准。工具清单、执行环境和评估代码将开源，以促进未来的研究。

title: Evidence-Driven Reasoning for Industrial Maintenance Using Heterogeneous Data
summary: Industrial maintenance platforms contain rich but fragmented evidence, including free-text work orders, heterogeneous operational sensors or indicators, and structured failure knowledge. These sources are often analyzed in isolation, producing alerts or forecasts that do not support conditional decision-making: given this asset history and behavior, what is happening and what action is warranted? We present Condition Insight Agent, a deployed decision-support framework that integrates maintenance language, behavioral abstractions of operational data, and engineering failure semantics to produce evidence-grounded explanations and advisory actions. The system constrains reasoning through deterministic evidence construction and structured failure knowledge, and applies a rule-based verification loop to suppress unsupported conclusions. Case studies from production CMMS deployments show that this verification-first design operates reliably under heterogeneous and incomplete data while preserving human oversight. Our results demonstrate how constrained LLM-based reasoning can function as a governed decision-support layer for industrial maintenance.
tldr: The paper introduces Condition Insight Agent, a decision-support framework using LLM-based reasoning to integrate heterogeneous industrial maintenance data for evidence-grounded explanations and advisory actions, demonstrating reliable performance with incomplete data via rule-based verification.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Condition Insight Agent的决策支持框架，它使用基于LLM的推理来整合异构工业维护数据，以产生基于证据的解释和咨询行动，并通过基于规则的验证展示了在不完整数据下可靠的性能。
summary_zh: 工业维护平台包含丰富但分散的证据，包括自由文本工作指令、异构的操作传感器或指标以及结构化故障知识。这些数据源通常被孤立地分析，产生的警报或预测无法支持条件决策：鉴于此资产的历史和行为，发生了什么，应该采取什么行动？ 我们提出 Condition Insight Agent，一个已部署的决策支持框架，它整合了维护语言、操作数据的行为抽象和工程故障语义，以生成基于证据的解释和建议行动。该系统通过确定性的证据构建和结构化故障知识来约束推理，并应用基于规则的验证循环来抑制不支持的结论。来自生产 CMMS 部署的案例研究表明，这种验证优先的设计可以在异构和不完整的数据下可靠地运行，同时保留人工监督。我们的结果表明，基于受约束的 LLM 的推理如何用作工业维护的受控决策支持层。

title: Gradient Iterated Temporal-Difference Learning
summary: Temporal-difference (TD) learning is highly effective at controlling and evaluating an agent's long-term outcomes. Most approaches in this paradigm implement a semi-gradient update to boost the learning speed, which consists of ignoring the gradient of the bootstrapped estimate. While popular, this type of update is prone to divergence, as Baird's counterexample illustrates. Gradient TD methods were introduced to overcome this issue, but have not been widely used, potentially due to issues with learning speed compared to semi-gradient methods. Recently, iterated TD learning was developed to increase the learning speed of TD methods. For that, it learns a sequence of action-value functions in parallel, where each function is optimized to represent the application of the Bellman operator over the previous function in the sequence. While promising, this algorithm can be unstable due to its semi-gradient nature, as each function tracks a moving target. In this work, we modify iterated TD learning by computing the gradients over those moving targets, aiming to build a powerful gradient TD method that competes with semi-gradient methods. Our evaluation reveals that this algorithm, called Gradient Iterated Temporal-Difference learning, has a competitive learning speed against semi-gradient methods across various benchmarks, including Atari games, a result that no prior work on gradient TD methods has demonstrated.
tldr: This paper introduces Gradient Iterated Temporal-Difference (Gradient ITD) learning, a novel gradient-based TD method that addresses the instability issues of semi-gradient ITD while achieving competitive learning speeds against semi-gradient methods, including in complex environments like Atari games.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的基于梯度的时序差分（TD）学习方法，称为梯度迭代时序差分（Gradient ITD）学习。该方法解决了半梯度迭代TD的不稳定性问题，同时在Atari游戏等复杂环境中实现了与半梯度方法相当的竞争性学习速度。
summary_zh: 时序差分(TD)学习在控制和评估智能体长期结果方面非常有效。该范式中的大多数方法都采用半梯度更新来提高学习速度，该更新忽略了自举估计的梯度。虽然这种更新方式很流行，但容易出现发散，如贝尔德反例所示。梯度TD方法被引入以克服这个问题，但尚未得到广泛应用，这可能是由于与半梯度方法相比，学习速度存在问题。最近，迭代TD学习被开发出来以提高TD方法的学习速度。为此，它并行学习一系列动作值函数，其中每个函数都被优化以表示贝尔曼算符应用于序列中前一个函数的结果。虽然这种算法很有前景，但由于其半梯度性质，即每个函数都在追踪移动的目标，因此可能不稳定。在这项工作中，我们通过计算这些移动目标的梯度来修改迭代TD学习，旨在构建一种能够与半梯度方法竞争的强大的梯度TD方法。我们的评估表明，这种名为梯度迭代时序差分学习的算法，在包括Atari游戏在内的各种基准测试中，具有与半梯度方法相当的学习速度，这是之前关于梯度TD方法的研究未能证明的结果。

title: BioGait-VLM: A Tri-Modal Vision-Language-Biomechanics Framework for Interpretable Clinical Gait Assessment
summary: Video-based Clinical Gait Analysis often suffers from poor generalization as models overfit environmental biases instead of capturing pathological motion. To address this, we propose BioGait-VLM, a tri-modal Vision-Language-Biomechanics framework for interpretable clinical gait assessment. Unlike standard video encoders, our architecture incorporates a Temporal Evidence Distillation branch to capture rhythmic dynamics and a Biomechanical Tokenization branch that projects 3D skeleton sequences into language-aligned semantic tokens. This enables the model to explicitly reason about joint mechanics independent of visual shortcuts. To ensure rigorous benchmarking, we augment the public GAVD dataset with a high-fidelity Degenerative Cervical Myelopathy (DCM) cohort to form a unified 8-class taxonomy, establishing a strict subject-disjoint protocol to prevent data leakage. Under this setting, BioGait-VLM achieves state-of-the-art recognition accuracy. Furthermore, a blinded expert study confirms that biomechanical tokens significantly improve clinical plausibility and evidence grounding, offering a path toward transparent, privacy-enhanced gait assessment.
tldr: The paper introduces BioGait-VLM, a tri-modal vision-language-biomechanics framework for clinical gait analysis that uses biomechanical tokenization to improve interpretability and generalization, achieving SOTA results and improved clinical plausibility.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了BioGait-VLM，一个用于临床步态分析的三模态视觉-语言-生物力学框架，它使用生物力学标记化来提高可解释性和泛化能力，实现了最先进的结果，并提高了临床合理性。
summary_zh: 基于视频的临床步态分析常常受到泛化能力差的困扰，因为模型过度拟合环境偏差，而非捕捉病理运动。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种三模态的视觉-语言-生物力学框架BioGait-VLM，用于可解释的临床步态评估。与标准视频编码器不同，我们的架构包含一个时间证据蒸馏分支来捕捉节律动力学，以及一个生物力学标记化分支，该分支将3D骨骼序列投影到与语言对齐的语义标记中。这使得模型能够显式地推理关节力学，而无需依赖视觉捷径。为了确保严格的基准测试，我们用一个高保真度退行性颈椎病(DCM)队列扩充了公共GAVD数据集，形成了一个统一的8类分类体系，并建立一个严格的受试者不相交协议以防止数据泄露。在这种设置下，BioGait-VLM实现了最先进的识别准确率。此外，一项盲法专家研究证实，生物力学标记显著提高了临床合理性和证据基础性，为透明、隐私增强的步态评估提供了一种途径。

title: Improving Continual Learning for Gaussian Splatting based Environments Reconstruction on Commercial Off-the-Shelf Edge Devices
summary: Novel view synthesis (NVS) is increasingly relevant for edge robotics, where compact and incrementally updatable 3D scene models are needed for SLAM, navigation, and inspection under tight memory and latency budgets. Variational Bayesian Gaussian Splatting (VBGS) enables replay-free continual updates for the 3DGS algorithm by maintaining a probabilistic scene model, but its high-precision computations and large intermediate tensors make on-device training impractical. We present a precision-adaptive optimization framework that enables VBGS training on resource-constrained hardware without altering its variational formulation. We (i) profile VBGS to identify memory/latency hotspots, (ii) fuse memory-dominant kernels to reduce materialized intermediate tensors, and (iii) automatically assign operation-level precisions via a mixed-precision search with bounded relative error. Across the Blender, Habitat, and Replica datasets, our optimised pipeline reduces peak memory from 9.44 GB to 1.11 GB and training time from ~234 min to ~61 min on an A5000 GPU, while preserving (and in some cases improving) reconstruction quality of the state-of-the-art VBGS baseline. We also enable for the first time NVS training on a commercial embedded platform, the Jetson Orin Nano, reducing per-frame latency by 19x compared to 3DGS.
tldr: The paper presents a precision-adaptive optimization framework to enable Variational Bayesian Gaussian Splatting (VBGS) training for novel view synthesis on resource-constrained edge devices, significantly reducing memory footprint and latency while maintaining reconstruction quality.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种精度自适应优化框架，能够在资源受限的边缘设备上进行基于变分贝叶斯高斯溅射 (VBGS) 的新视角合成训练，显著降低内存占用和延迟，同时保持重建质量。
summary_zh: 新型视角合成（NVS）在边缘机器人领域变得越来越重要，在该领域中，需要在严格的内存和延迟预算下，使用紧凑且可增量更新的3D场景模型来进行SLAM、导航和检查。变分贝叶斯高斯溅射（VBGS）通过维护概率场景模型，为3DGS算法实现无重放的持续更新，但其高精度计算和大型中间张量使得设备上的训练不切实际。我们提出了一种精度自适应优化框架，该框架能够在资源受限的硬件上进行VBGS训练，而无需更改其变分公式。我们（i）分析VBGS以识别内存/延迟热点，（ii）融合内存主导的内核以减少物化的中间张量，以及（iii）通过具有有界相对误差的混合精度搜索，自动分配操作级精度。在Blender、Habitat 和 Replica 数据集上，我们优化的pipeline 将峰值内存从 9.44 GB 减少到 1.11 GB，并将 A5000 GPU 上的训练时间从约 234 分钟减少到约 61 分钟，同时保持（并且在某些情况下提高了）最先进 VBGS 基线的重建质量。我们还首次在商业嵌入式平台Jetson Orin Nano上实现了 NVS 训练，与 3DGS 相比，每帧延迟降低了 19 倍。

title: Event-based Motion & Appearance Fusion for 6D Object Pose Tracking
summary: Object pose tracking is a fundamental and essential task for robotics to perform tasks in the home and industrial settings. The most commonly used sensors to do so are RGB-D cameras, which can hit limitations in highly dynamic environments due to motion blur and frame-rate constraints. Event cameras have remarkable features such as high temporal resolution and low latency, which make them a potentially ideal vision sensors for object pose tracking at high speed. Even so, there are still only few works on 6D pose tracking with event cameras. In this work, we take advantage of the high temporal resolution and propose a method that uses both a propagation step fused with a pose correction strategy. Specifically, we use 6D object velocity obtained from event-based optical flow for pose propagation, after which, a template-based local pose correction module is utilized for pose correction. Our learning-free method has comparable performance to the state-of-the-art algorithms, and in some cases out performs them for fast-moving objects. The results indicate the potential for using event cameras in highly-dynamic scenarios where the use of deep network approaches are limited by low update rates.
