tldr: This paper presents a learning-free method for 6D object pose tracking using event cameras and fuses event-based optical flow for propagation and template-based pose correction, demonstrating comparable or superior performance to state-of-the-art methods in highly dynamic scenarios.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于事件相机的六维物体姿态跟踪的无需学习的方法，该方法融合了基于事件的光流进行传播以及基于模板的姿态校正，在高度动态的场景中表现出与最先进方法相当或更优越的性能。
summary_zh: 物体姿态跟踪是机器人执行家庭和工业环境任务的关键和基础性环节。最常用的传感器是RGB-D相机，但由于运动模糊和帧率限制，它们在高度动态的环境中会遇到瓶颈。事件相机具有高时间分辨率和低延迟等显著特性，使其成为高速物体姿态跟踪的潜在理想视觉传感器。尽管如此，关于使用事件相机的6D姿态跟踪工作仍然很少。在这项工作中，我们利用高时间分辨率，提出一种融合了传播步骤和姿态校正策略的方法。具体来说，我们使用基于事件的光流获得的6D物体速度进行姿态传播，之后，利用基于模板的局部姿态校正模块进行姿态校正。我们的无学习方法具有与最先进算法相当的性能，并且在某些情况下对于快速移动的物体表现更优。结果表明，事件相机在高度动态场景中具有应用潜力，而在这些场景中使用深度网络方法会受到低更新率的限制。

title: SiMO: Single-Modality-Operable Multimodal Collaborative Perception
summary: Collaborative perception integrates multi-agent perspectives to enhance the sensing range and overcome occlusion issues. While existing multimodal approaches leverage complementary sensors to improve performance, they are highly prone to failure--especially when a key sensor like LiDAR is unavailable. The root cause is that feature fusion leads to semantic mismatches between single-modality features and the downstream modules. This paper addresses this challenge for the first time in the field of collaborative perception, introducing Single-Modality-Operable Multimodal Collaborative Perception (SiMO). By adopting the proposed Length-Adaptive Multi-Modal Fusion (LAMMA), SiMO can adaptively handle remaining modal features during modal failures while maintaining consistency of the semantic space. Additionally, leveraging the innovative "Pretrain-Align-Fuse-RD" training strategy, SiMO addresses the issue of modality competition--generally overlooked by existing methods--ensuring the independence of each individual modality branch. Experiments demonstrate that SiMO effectively aligns multimodal features while simultaneously preserving modality-specific features, enabling it to maintain optimal performance across all individual modalities. The implementation details can be found in https://github.com/dempsey-wen/SiMO.
tldr: The paper introduces SiMO, a novel collaborative perception method that maintains performance even when individual sensors fail by adaptively fusing multimodal features and ensuring modality independence through a specialized training strategy.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SiMO，一种新型的协同感知方法，即使在单个传感器发生故障时也能保持性能，它通过自适应融合多模态特征并通过专门的训练策略来确保模态独立性。
summary_zh: 协作感知集成多智能体视角以扩展感知范围并克服遮挡问题。虽然现有的多模态方法利用互补的传感器来提高性能，但是它们非常容易失效——尤其是在像激光雷达这样的关键传感器不可用时。根本原因是特征融合导致单模态特征与下游模块之间的语义不匹配。本文首次在协作感知领域解决了这一挑战，提出了单模态可操作的多模态协作感知(SiMO)。通过采用提出的长度自适应多模态融合(LAMMA)，SiMO可以在模态故障期间自适应地处理剩余的模态特征，同时保持语义空间的一致性。此外，借助创新的“预训练-对齐-融合-RD”训练策略，SiMO解决了模态竞争问题——通常被现有方法忽略——确保每个单独模态分支的独立性。实验表明，SiMO有效地对齐了多模态特征，同时保留了模态特定的特征，使其能够在所有单独模态上保持最佳性能。实现细节可以在https://github.com/dempsey-wen/SiMO中找到。

title: Synthetic Defect Image Generation for Power Line Insulator Inspection Using Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Utility companies increasingly rely on drone imagery for post-event and routine inspection, but training accurate defect-type classifiers remains difficult because defect examples are rare and inspection datasets are often limited or proprietary. We address this data-scarcity setting by using an off-the-shelf multimodal large language model (MLLM) as a training-free image generator to synthesize defect images from visual references and text prompts. Our pipeline increases diversity via dual-reference conditioning, improves label fidelity with lightweight human verification and prompt refinement, and filters the resulting synthetic pool using an embedding-based selection rule based on distances to class centroids computed from the real training split. We evaluate on ceramic insulator defect-type classification (shell vs. glaze) using a public dataset with a realistic low training-data regime (104 real training images; 152 validation; 308 test). Augmenting the 10% real training set with embedding-selected synthetic images improves test F1 score (harmonic mean of precision and recall) from 0.615 to 0.739 (20% relative), corresponding to an estimated 4--5x data-efficiency gain, and the gains persist with stronger backbone models and frozen-feature linear-probe baselines. These results suggest a practical, low-barrier path for improving defect recognition when collecting additional real defects is slow or infeasible.
tldr: The paper proposes using multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to generate synthetic defect images for training power line insulator defect classifiers, addressing data scarcity issues. Results show a significant improvement in classification performance when augmenting real data with synthetically generated images.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出使用多模态大型语言模型 (MLLM) 生成合成缺陷图像，用于训练电力线绝缘子缺陷分类器，从而解决数据稀缺问题。结果表明，当用合成生成的图像增强真实数据时，分类性能得到显著提高。
summary_zh: 电力公司越来越依赖无人机影像进行事后和日常巡检，但训练准确的缺陷类型分类器仍然困难，因为缺陷样本稀少，且巡检数据集通常有限或具有专有性。我们通过使用现成的多模态大型语言模型(MLLM)作为无训练图像生成器，从视觉参考和文本提示合成缺陷图像，来解决这种数据稀缺的情况。我们的流程通过双重参考条件化来增加多样性，通过轻量级的人工验证和提示改进来提高标签保真度，并使用基于嵌入的选择规则来过滤生成的合成图像池，该规则基于与从真实训练集计算的类质心的距离。我们使用一个公开数据集，在陶瓷绝缘子缺陷类型分类（壳体vs.釉面）上进行评估，该数据集具有真实的低训练数据状态（104张真实训练图像；152张验证图像；308张测试图像）。用嵌入选择的合成图像增强10%的真实训练集，可将测试F1分数（精确率和召回率的调和平均值）从0.615提高到0.739（相对提高20%），相当于估计的4--5倍的数据效率提升，并且这种提升在使用更强大的骨干模型和冻结特征线性探测基线时仍然存在。这些结果表明，当收集额外的真实缺陷的速度缓慢或不可行时，这是一种实用的、低门槛的缺陷识别改进途径。

title: Enhancing Cross-View UAV Geolocalization via LVLM-Driven Relational Modeling
summary: The primary objective of cross-view UAV geolocalization is to identify the exact spatial coordinates of drone-captured imagery by aligning it with extensive, geo-referenced satellite databases. Current approaches typically extract features independently from each perspective and rely on basic heuristics to compute similarity, thereby failing to explicitly capture the essential interactions between different views. To address this limitation, we introduce a novel, plug-and-play ranking architecture designed to explicitly perform joint relational modeling for improved UAV-to-satellite image matching. By harnessing the capabilities of a Large Vision-Language Model (LVLM), our framework effectively learns the deep visual-semantic correlations linking UAV and satellite imagery. Furthermore, we present a novel relational-aware loss function to optimize the training phase. By employing soft labels, this loss provides fine-grained supervision that avoids overly penalizing near-positive matches, ultimately boosting both the model's discriminative power and training stability. Comprehensive evaluations across various baseline architectures and standard benchmarks reveal that the proposed method substantially boosts the retrieval accuracy of existing models, yielding superior performance even under highly demanding conditions.
tldr: This paper introduces a new framework for cross-view UAV geolocalization that uses a Large Vision-Language Model (LVLM) and a relational-aware loss function to improve image matching between UAV and satellite imagery, demonstrating improved retrieval accuracy.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的跨视角无人机地理定位框架，该框架使用大型视觉语言模型 (LVLM) 和关系感知损失函数来提高无人机和卫星图像之间的图像匹配，从而提高检索准确率。
summary_zh: 跨视角无人机地理定位的主要目标是通过将无人机捕获的图像与广泛的、经过地理配准的卫星数据库对齐，从而确定图像精确的空间坐标。当前方法通常独立地从每个视角提取特征，并依赖于基本的启发式方法计算相似度，因此未能明确捕捉不同视角之间本质的交互。为了解决这一局限性，我们提出了一种新颖的、即插即用的排序架构，旨在明确地执行联合关系建模，以改进无人机到卫星图像的匹配。通过利用大型视觉-语言模型 (LVLM) 的能力，我们的框架有效地学习了连接无人机和卫星图像的深层视觉-语义相关性。此外，我们提出了一种新型的关系感知损失函数来优化训练阶段。通过采用软标签，这种损失提供了细粒度的监督，避免了过度惩罚近正样本匹配，最终提升了模型的辨别能力和训练稳定性。在各种基线架构和标准基准上的全面评估表明，所提出的方法显著提高了现有模型的检索精度，即使在高度苛刻的条件下也能产生卓越的性能。

title: Controllable Complex Human Motion Video Generation via Text-to-Skeleton Cascades
summary:
Generating videos of complex human motions such as flips, cartwheels, and martial arts remains challenging for current video diffusion models. Text-only conditioning is temporally ambiguous for fine-grained motion control, while explicit pose-based controls, though effective, require users to provide complete skeleton sequences that are costly to produce for long and dynamic actions.
  We propose a two-stage cascaded framework that addresses both limitations. First, an autoregressive text-to-skeleton model generates 2D pose sequences from natural language descriptions by predicting each joint conditioned on previously generated poses. This design captures long-range temporal dependencies and inter-joint coordination required for complex motions. Second, a pose-conditioned video diffusion model synthesizes videos from a reference image and the generated skeleton sequence. It employs DINO-ALF (Adaptive Layer Fusion), a multi-level reference encoder that preserves appearance and clothing details under large pose changes and self-occlusions.
  To address the lack of publicly available datasets for complex human motion video generation, we introduce a Blender-based synthetic dataset containing 2,000 videos with diverse characters performing acrobatic and stunt-like motions. The dataset provides full control over appearance, motion, and environment. It fills an important gap because existing benchmarks significantly under-represent acrobatic motions while web-collected datasets raise copyright and privacy concerns.
  Experiments on our synthetic dataset and the Motion-X Fitness benchmark show that our text-to-skeleton model outperforms prior methods on FID, R-precision, and motion diversity. Our pose-to-video model also achieves the best results among all compared methods on VBench metrics for temporal consistency, motion smoothness, and subject preservation.
tldr: This paper introduces a two-stage text-to-video generation framework for complex human motion, using a text-to-skeleton model cascaded with a pose-conditioned video diffusion model, and provides a new synthetic dataset.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个用于生成复杂人类运动视频的两阶段框架，该框架使用文本到骨骼模型与姿势条件视频扩散模型级联，并提供了一个新的合成数据集。
summary_zh:
目前，生成诸如翻转、侧手翻和武术等复杂人体运动的视频对于现有的视频扩散模型而言仍然具有挑战性。纯文本条件对于细粒度的运动控制而言存在时间上的歧义，而显式的基于姿态的控制虽然有效，但需要用户提供完整的骨骼序列，这对于长时间和动态的动作而言生成成本很高。

我们提出一个两阶段的级联框架，以解决这两个限制。首先，一个自回归的文本到骨骼模型通过预测每个关节，并以先前生成的姿势为条件，从自然语言描述中生成2D姿势序列。这种设计可以捕捉复杂运动所需的远距离时间依赖性和关节间的协调。其次，一个姿态条件视频扩散模型从参考图像和生成的骨骼序列中合成视频。它采用DINO-ALF（自适应层融合），这是一种多层参考编码器，可在大幅度姿态变化和自我遮挡下保留外观和服装细节。

为了解决缺乏用于复杂人体运动视频生成的公开数据集的问题，我们引入了一个基于Blender的合成数据集，其中包含2,000个视频，视频中的不同角色执行杂技和特技般的动作。该数据集提供了对外观、运动和环境的完全控制。它填补了一个重要的空白，因为现有的基准测试严重低估了杂技运动，而网络收集的数据集则引发了版权和隐私问题。

在我们合成数据集和Motion-X Fitness基准测试上的实验表明，我们的文本到骨骼模型在FID、R-precision和运动多样性方面优于先前的方法。我们的姿态到视频模型在VBench指标上的时间一致性、运动平滑性和主体保持方面也取得了所有比较方法中的最佳结果。

title: $L^3$:Scene-agnostic Visual Localization in the Wild
summary: Standard visual localization methods typically require offline pre-processing of scenes to obtain 3D structural information for better performance. This inevitably introduces additional computational and time costs, as well as the overhead of storing scene representations. Can we visually localize in a wild scene without any off-line preprocessing step? In this paper, we leverage the online inference capabilities of feed-forward 3D reconstruction networks to propose a novel map-free visual localization framework $L^3$. Specifically, by performing direct online 3D reconstruction on RGB images, followed by two-stage metric scale recovery and pose refinement based on 2D-3D correspondences, $L^3$ achieves high accuracy without the need to pre-build or store any offline scene representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate $L^3$ not only that the performance is comparable to state-of-the-art solutions on various benchmarks, but also that it exhibits significantly superior robustness in sparse scenes (fewer reference images per scene).
tldr: The paper introduces $L^3$, a novel map-free visual localization framework that leverages online 3D reconstruction networks for accurate localization without offline pre-processing or storing scene representations, demonstrating comparable or better performance than state-of-the-art methods, especially in sparse scenes.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新的无地图视觉定位框架$L^3$，它利用在线3D重建网络进行精确定位，无需离线预处理或存储场景表示。实验表明，该方法在性能上与最先进的方法相当甚至更好，尤其是在稀疏场景中。
summary_zh: 标准视觉定位方法通常需要对场景进行离线预处理，以获取3D结构信息从而获得更好的性能。这不可避免地引入了额外的计算和时间成本，以及存储场景表示的开销。我们能否在没有任何离线预处理步骤的情况下，对一个未知的场景进行视觉定位？在本文中，我们利用前馈3D重建网络的在线推理能力，提出了一种新颖的无地图视觉定位框架$L^3$。具体而言，通过对RGB图像进行直接的在线3D重建，然后进行基于2D-3D对应关系的两阶段尺度恢复和姿态优化，$L^3$实现了高精度，而无需预先构建或存储任何离线场景表示。大量的实验表明，$L^3$不仅在各种基准测试中表现出与最先进的解决方案相当的性能，而且在稀疏场景（每个场景的参考图像较少）中表现出显著更强的鲁棒性。

title: AR2-4FV: Anchored Referring and Re-identification for Long-Term Grounding in Fixed-View Videos
summary: Long-term language-guided referring in fixed-view videos is challenging: the referent may be occluded or leave the scene for long intervals and later re-enter, while framewise referring pipelines drift as re-identification (ReID) becomes unreliable. AR2-4FV leverages background stability for long-term referring. An offline Anchor Bank is distilled from static background structures; at inference, the text query is aligned with this bank to produce an Anchor Map that serves as persistent semantic memory when the referent is absent. An anchor-based re-entry prior accelerates re-capture upon return, and a lightweight ReID-Gating mechanism maintains identity continuity using displacement cues in the anchor frame. The system predicts per-frame bounding boxes without assuming the target is visible in the first frame or explicitly modeling appearance variations. AR2-4FV achieves +10.3% Re-Capture Rate (RCR) improvement and -24.2% Re-Capture Latency (RCL) reduction over the best baseline, and ablation studies further confirm the benefits of the Anchor Map, re-entry prior, and ReID-Gating.
tldr: The paper introduces AR2-4FV, a novel approach for long-term language-guided referring in fixed-view videos that uses an anchor bank distilled from static background structures and ReID-Gating to address occlusion and re-identification challenges, achieving significant performance improvements.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了AR2-4FV，一种用于固定视角视频中长期语言引导的指代表达的新方法。该方法利用从静态背景结构中提取的锚点银行和ReID门控来解决遮挡和重新识别的挑战，并实现了显著的性能提升。
summary_zh: 在固定视角视频中进行长期语言引导的指代表达任务具有挑战性：指代对象可能被遮挡或长时间离开场景，随后又重新进入，同时逐帧指代表达流程容易发生漂移，因为重识别(ReID)变得不可靠。AR2-4FV利用背景稳定性进行长期指代表达。一个离线的锚点库是从静态背景结构中提炼出来的；在推理时，文本查询与该锚点库对齐，生成一个锚点图，该锚点图在指代对象缺失时充当持久语义记忆。基于锚点的重入先验加速了重新捕获，而轻量级的ReID门控机制使用锚点帧中的位移线索来维持身份连续性。该系统预测每帧的边界框，而无需假设目标在第一帧中可见或显式地建模外观变化。与最佳基线相比，AR2-4FV实现了+10.3%的重捕获率(RCR)提升和-24.2%的重捕获延迟(RCL)降低，消融研究进一步证实了锚点图、重入先验和ReID门控的优势。

title: Impact of Connectivity on Laplacian Representations in Reinforcement Learning
summary: Learning compact state representations in Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) has proven crucial for addressing the curse of dimensionality in large-scale reinforcement learning (RL) problems. Existing principled approaches leverage structural priors on the MDP by constructing state representations as linear combinations of the state-graph Laplacian eigenvectors. When the transition graph is unknown or the state space is prohibitively large, the graph spectral features can be estimated directly via sample trajectories. In this work, we prove an upper bound on the approximation error of linear value function approximation under the learned spectral features. We show how this error scales with the algebraic connectivity of the state-graph, grounding the approximation quality in the topological structure of the MDP. We further bound the error introduced by the eigenvector estimation itself, leading to an end-to-end error decomposition across the representation learning pipeline. Additionally, our expression of the Laplacian operator for the RL setting, although equivalent to existing ones, prevents some common misunderstandings, of which we show some examples from the literature. Our results hold for general (non-uniform) policies without any assumptions on the symmetry of the induced transition kernel. We validate our theoretical findings with numerical simulations on gridworld environments.
tldr: This paper provides theoretical error bounds for value function approximation using learned spectral features in RL, showing how the approximation error scales with the algebraic connectivity of the state-graph. It also addresses potential misunderstandings in the Laplacian operator's application and validates the theory with gridworld experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文为强化学习中使用学习到的谱特征进行值函数逼近提供了理论误差界限，表明逼近误差如何随着状态图的代数连通性缩放。 它还解决了拉普拉斯算子应用中潜在的误解，并通过网格世界实验验证了该理论。
summary_zh: 在马尔可夫决策过程(MDP)中学习紧凑的状态表示已被证明对于解决大规模强化学习(RL)问题中的维度灾难至关重要。现有的基于原则性的方法利用MDP的结构先验，通过构建状态表示作为状态图拉普拉斯算子的特征向量的线性组合来实现。当转移图未知或状态空间过大时，可以通过样本轨迹直接估计图谱特征。在这项工作中，我们证明了在学习到的谱特征下线性价值函数近似的近似误差的一个上界。 我们展示了这种误差如何随状态图的代数连通性缩放，从而将近似质量建立在MDP的拓扑结构上。我们进一步限定了由特征向量估计本身引入的误差，从而实现了跨表示学习流水线的端到端误差分解。此外，我们对RL设置下拉普拉斯算子的表达，虽然与现有的等价，但避免了一些常见的误解，我们展示了文献中的一些例子。我们的结果适用于一般的（非均匀）策略，而无需对诱导转移核的对称性进行任何假设。我们在网格世界环境中通过数值模拟验证了我们的理论结果。

title: Meta-RL with Shared Representations Enables Fast Adaptation in Energy Systems
summary: Meta-Reinforcement Learning addresses the critical limitations of conventional Reinforcement Learning in multi-task and non-stationary environments by enabling fast policy adaptation and improved generalization. We introduce a novel Meta-RL framework that integrates a bi-level optimization scheme with a hybrid actor-critic architecture specially designed to enhance sample efficiency and inter-task adaptability. To improve knowledge transfer, we meta-learn a shared state feature extractor jointly optimized across actor and critic networks, providing efficient representation learning and limiting overfitting to individual tasks or dominant profiles. Additionally, we propose a parameter-sharing mechanism between the outer- and inner-loop actor networks, to reduce redundant learning and accelerate adaptation during task revisitation. The approach is validated on a real-world Building Energy Management Systems dataset covering nearly a decade of temporal and structural variability, for which we propose a task preparation method to promote generalization. Experiments demonstrate effective task adaptation and better performance compared to conventional RL and Meta-RL methods.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel Meta-RL framework with shared representations and parameter sharing for fast adaptation in building energy management systems, demonstrating improved performance compared to conventional RL and Meta-RL methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新型的Meta-RL框架，该框架具有共享表示和参数共享，可用于建筑能源管理系统中的快速自适应，与传统的RL和Meta-RL方法相比，性能得到了改善。
summary_zh: 元强化学习通过实现快速策略适应和改进的泛化能力，解决了传统强化学习在多任务和非平稳环境中面临的关键局限性。我们提出了一种新型元强化学习框架，该框架集成了双层优化方案和混合Actor-Critic架构，专门用于提高样本效率和任务间适应性。为了改进知识迁移，我们元学习一个跨Actor和Critic网络联合优化的共享状态特征提取器，从而提供高效的表示学习并限制对单个任务或主要轮廓的过拟合。此外，我们提出了一种外部循环和内部循环Actor网络之间的参数共享机制，以减少冗余学习并加速任务重访期间的适应。该方法在一个涵盖近十年时间和结构变异性的真实世界建筑能源管理系统数据集上进行了验证，为此我们提出了一种任务准备方法以促进泛化。实验结果表明，与传统强化学习和元强化学习方法相比，该方法能够有效进行任务适应并获得更好的性能。

title: Posterior Sampling Reinforcement Learning with Gaussian Processes for Continuous Control: Sublinear Regret Bounds for Unbounded State Spaces
summary: We analyze the Bayesian regret of the Gaussian process posterior sampling reinforcement learning (GP-PSRL) algorithm. Posterior sampling is an effective heuristic for decision-making under uncertainty that has been used to develop successful algorithms for a variety of continuous control problems. However, theoretical work on GP-PSRL is limited. All known regret bounds either fail to achieve a tight dependence on a kernel-dependent quantity called the maximum information gain or fail to properly account for the fact that the set of possible system states is unbounded. Through a recursive application of the Borell-Tsirelson-Ibragimov-Sudakov inequality, we show that, with high probability, the states actually visited by the algorithm are contained within a ball of near-constant radius. To obtain tight dependence on the maximum information gain, we use the chaining method to control the regret suffered by GP-PSRL. Our main result is a Bayesian regret bound of the order $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(H^{3/2}\sqrt{γ_{T/H} T})$, where $H$ is the horizon, $T$ is the number of time steps and $γ_{T/H}$ is the maximum information gain. With this result, we resolve the limitations with prior theoretical work on PSRL, and provide the theoretical foundation and tools for analyzing PSRL in complex settings.
tldr: This paper provides a sublinear regret bound for Gaussian Process Posterior Sampling Reinforcement Learning (GP-PSRL) in continuous control with unbounded state spaces, addressing limitations of prior theoretical work.
tldr_zh: 本文为具有无限状态空间的连续控制中的高斯过程后验抽样强化学习 (GP-PSRL) 提供了次线性遗憾界限，解决了先前理论工作的局限性。
summary_zh: 我们分析了高斯过程后验抽样强化学习（GP-PSRL）算法的贝叶斯遗憾值。后验抽样是在不确定性下进行决策的有效启发式方法，已被用于开发各种连续控制问题的成功算法。然而，关于GP-PSRL的理论工作有限。所有已知的遗憾值界限要么未能实现对一个依赖于核的量（称为最大信息增益）的紧依赖，要么未能正确地解释可能系统状态的集合是无界的这一事实。通过递归应用Borell-Tsirelson-Ibragimov-Sudakov不等式，我们证明了，以高概率，算法实际访问的状态包含在一个近乎恒定半径的球内。为了获得对最大信息增益的紧依赖，我们使用链式法来控制GP-PSRL所遭受的遗憾。我们的主要结果是一个贝叶斯遗憾值界限，其阶数为$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(H^{3/2}\sqrt{γ_{T/H} T})$，其中$H$是范围，$T$是时间步数，$γ_{T/H}$是最大信息增益。有了这个结果，我们解决了先前关于PSRL理论工作的局限性，并为在复杂环境中分析PSRL提供了理论基础和工具。

title: Model-based Offline RL via Robust Value-Aware Model Learning with Implicitly Differentiable Adaptive Weighting
summary: Model-based offline reinforcement learning (RL) aims to enhance offline RL with a dynamics model that facilitates policy exploration. However, \textit{model exploitation} could occur due to inevitable model errors, degrading algorithm performance. Adversarial model learning offers a theoretical framework to mitigate model exploitation by solving a maximin formulation. Within such a paradigm, RAMBO~\citep{rigter2022rambo} has emerged as a representative and most popular method that provides a practical implementation with model gradient. However, we empirically reveal that severe Q-value underestimation and gradient explosion can occur in RAMBO with only slight hyperparameter tuning, suggesting that it tends to be overly conservative and suffers from unstable model updates. To address these issues, we propose \textbf{RO}bust value-aware \textbf{M}odel learning with \textbf{I}mplicitly differentiable adaptive weighting (ROMI). Instead of updating the dynamics model with model gradient, ROMI introduces a novel robust value-aware model learning approach. This approach requires the dynamics model to predict future states with values close to the minimum Q-value within a scale-adjustable state uncertainty set, enabling controllable conservatism and stable model updates. To further improve out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization during multi-step rollouts, we propose implicitly differentiable adaptive weighting, a bi-level optimization scheme that adaptively achieves dynamics- and value-aware model learning. Empirical results on D4RL and NeoRL datasets show that ROMI significantly outperforms RAMBO and achieves competitive or superior performance compared to other state-of-the-art methods on datasets where RAMBO typically underperforms. Code is available at https://github.com/zq2r/ROMI.git.
tldr: This paper introduces ROMI, a novel model-based offline RL algorithm that addresses issues of Q-value underestimation and unstable model updates in RAMBO by using robust value-aware model learning with implicitly differentiable adaptive weighting, leading to improved performance on D4RL and NeoRL datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为ROMI的新型基于模型的离线强化学习算法，它通过使用具有隐式可微自适应加权的鲁棒值感知模型学习，解决了RAMBO中Q值低估和模型更新不稳定的问题，从而提高了在D4RL和NeoRL数据集上的性能。
summary_zh: 基于模型的离线强化学习旨在通过一个促进策略探索的动力学模型来增强离线强化学习。然而，由于不可避免的模型误差，可能出现\textit{模型利用}，从而降低算法性能。对抗模型学习提供了一个理论框架，通过解决极大极小公式来缓解模型利用。在这种范式中，RAMBO~\citep{rigter2022rambo}已成为一个具有代表性和最受欢迎的方法，它提供了带有模型梯度的实际实现。然而，我们通过实验发现，仅通过轻微的超参数调整，RAMBO中就会出现严重的Q值低估和梯度爆炸，表明它往往过于保守且存在不稳定的模型更新。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了具有\textbf{隐式可微自适应加权}的\textbf{RO}bust值感知\textbf{M}odel学习 (ROMI)。ROMI没有使用模型梯度来更新动力学模型，而是引入了一种新颖的鲁棒值感知模型学习方法。这种方法要求动力学模型预测未来状态，使其值接近可调整规模的状态不确定性集合内的最小Q值，从而实现可控的保守性和稳定的模型更新。为了进一步提高多步rollout期间的分布外 (OOD) 泛化能力，我们提出了一种隐式可微自适应加权，这是一种双层优化方案，可自适应地实现动力学和价值感知的模型学习。在D4RL和NeoRL数据集上的实验结果表明，ROMI显著优于RAMBO，并且在RAMBO通常表现不佳的数据集上，实现了与其他最先进方法相比具有竞争力或更优越的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/zq2r/ROMI.git 获取。

title: Robust Transfer Learning with Side Information
summary:
Robust Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) address environmental shift through distributionally robust optimization (DRO) by finding an optimal worst-case policy within an uncertainty set of transition kernels. However, standard DRO approaches require enlarging the uncertainty set under large shifts, which leads to overly conservative and pessimistic policies.
  In this paper, we propose a framework for transfer under environment shift that derives a robust target-domain policy via estimate-centered uncertainty sets, constructed through constrained estimation that integrates limited target samples with side information about the source-target dynamics. The side information includes bounds on feature moments, distributional distances, and density ratios, yielding improved kernel estimates and tighter uncertainty sets.
  The side information includes bounds on feature moments, distributional distances, and density ratios, yielding improved kernel estimates and tighter uncertainty sets.
  Error bounds and convergence results are established for both robust and non-robust value functions. Moreover, we provide a finite-sample guarantee on the learned robust policy and analyze the robust sub-optimality gap. Under mild low-dimensional structure on the transition model, the side information reduces this gap and improves sample efficiency. We assess the performance of our approach across OpenAI Gym environments and classic control problems, consistently demonstrating superior target-domain performance over state-of-the-art robust and non-robust baselines.
tldr: This paper introduces a transfer learning framework for robust reinforcement learning that leverages side information to construct tighter uncertainty sets, leading to improved target-domain performance, particularly in the presence of environmental shifts.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种鲁棒强化学习的迁移学习框架，该框架利用辅助信息构建更紧密的的不确定性集合，从而改善目标域的性能，尤其是在环境变化的情况下。
summary_zh:
稳健马尔可夫决策过程(MDPs)通过分布鲁棒优化(DRO)来解决环境转移问题，方法是在转移核的不确定性集中找到最佳最坏情况策略。然而，标准的DRO方法需要在较大转移下扩大不确定性集，这会导致过于保守和悲观的策略。

  在本文中，我们提出了一个在环境转移下进行迁移的框架，该框架通过以估计为中心的的不确定性集来推导稳健的目标域策略。这些不确定性集通过约束估计构建，该约束估计将有限的目标域样本与关于源域-目标域动态的辅助信息整合在一起。辅助信息包括特征矩、分布距离和密度比的界限，从而产生改进的核估计和更紧的不确定性集。

  辅助信息包括特征矩、分布距离和密度比的界限，从而产生改进的核估计和更紧的不确定性集。

  我们为稳健和非稳健价值函数建立了误差界限和收敛结果。此外，我们为学习到的稳健策略提供了有限样本保证，并分析了稳健次优差距。在转移模型具有温和的低维结构下，辅助信息可以缩小此差距并提高样本效率。我们在OpenAI Gym环境和经典控制问题中评估了我们方法的性能，一致地证明了相比目前最先进的稳健和非稳健基线方法，我们的方法在目标域中表现出卓越的性能。

title: OccTrack360: 4D Panoptic Occupancy Tracking from Surround-View Fisheye Cameras
summary: Understanding dynamic 3D environments in a spatially continuous and temporally consistent manner is fundamental for robotics and autonomous driving. While recent advances in occupancy prediction provide a unified representation of scene geometry and semantics, progress in 4D panoptic occupancy tracking remains limited by the lack of benchmarks that support surround-view fisheye sensing, long temporal sequences, and instance-level voxel tracking. To address this gap, we present OccTrack360, a new benchmark for 4D panoptic occupancy tracking from surround-view fisheye cameras. OccTrack360 provides substantially longer and more diverse sequences (174~2234 frames) than prior benchmarks, together with principled voxel visibility annotations, including an all-direction occlusion mask and an MEI-based fisheye field-of-view mask. To establish a strong fisheye-oriented baseline, we further propose Focus on Sphere Occ (FoSOcc), a framework that addresses two core challenges in fisheye occupancy tracking: distorted spherical projection and inaccurate voxel-space localization. FoSOcc includes a Center Focusing Module (CFM) to enhance instance-aware spatial localization through supervised focus guidance, and a Spherical Lift Module (SLM) that extends perspective lifting to fisheye imaging under the Unified Projection Model. Extensive experiments on Occ3D-Waymo and OccTrack360 show that our method improves occupancy tracking quality with notable gains on geometrically regular categories, and establishes a strong baseline for future research on surround-view fisheye 4D occupancy tracking. The benchmark and source code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/YouthZest-Lin/OccTrack360.
tldr: The paper introduces OccTrack360, a new benchmark for 4D panoptic occupancy tracking from surround-view fisheye cameras, and proposes FoSOcc, a framework to address challenges in fisheye occupancy tracking, establishing a strong baseline for future research.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了OccTrack360，一个用于环视鱼眼相机4D全景占用追踪的新基准，并提出了FoSOcc，一个解决鱼眼占用追踪中挑战的框架，为未来研究建立了强大的基线。
summary_zh: 以空间连续且时间一致的方式理解动态 3D 环境对于机器人和自动驾驶至关重要。虽然最近在占据预测方面的进展为场景几何和语义提供了统一的表示，但 4D 全景占据跟踪的进展仍然受到基准数据集的限制，这些数据集缺乏对环视鱼眼传感、长时序序列和实例级体素跟踪的支持。为了解决这一差距，我们提出了 OccTrack360，这是一个新的基准数据集，用于环视鱼眼相机的 4D 全景占据跟踪。OccTrack360 提供了比以前的基准数据集更长且更多样化的序列（174～2234 帧），以及基于原则的体素可见性标注，包括全方向遮挡掩码和基于 MEI 的鱼眼视场掩码。为了建立一个强大的面向鱼眼的基线，我们进一步提出了 Focus on Sphere Occ (FoSOcc) 框架，该框架解决了鱼眼占据跟踪中的两个核心挑战：扭曲的球面投影和不精确的体素空间定位。FoSOcc 包含一个中心聚焦模块（CFM），通过监督聚焦引导来增强实例感知的空间定位；以及一个球面提升模块（SLM），它将透视提升扩展到统一投影模型下的鱼眼成像。在 Occ3D-Waymo 和 OccTrack360 上的大量实验表明，我们的方法提高了占据跟踪的质量，在几何规则的类别上获得了显著的提升，并为未来环视鱼眼 4D 占据跟踪的研究建立了一个强大的基线。该基准数据集和源代码将在 https://github.com/YouthZest-Lin/OccTrack360 上公开。

title: Rethinking the semantic classification of indoor places by mobile robots
summary: A significant challenge in service robots is the semantic understanding of their surrounding areas. Traditional approaches addressed this problem by segmenting the floor plan into regions corresponding to full rooms that are assigned labels consistent with human perception, e.g. office or kitchen. However, different areas inside the same room can be used in different ways: Could the table and the chair in my kitchen become my office? What is the category of that area now? office or kitchen? To adapt to these circumstances we propose a new paradigm where we intentionally relax the resulting labeling of semantic classifiers by allowing confusions inside rooms. Our hypothesis is that those confusions can be beneficial to a service robot. We present a proof of concept in the task of searching for objects.
tldr: This paper proposes a new semantic classification paradigm for indoor mobile robots that allows for labeling confusions within rooms to improve object search, addressing the limitations of traditional room-based labeling approaches.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的室内移动机器人语义分类范式，允许房间内的标签混淆，以改善物体搜索，解决了传统基于房间的标签方法的局限性。
summary_zh: 服务机器人面临的一项重大挑战是对其周围区域的语义理解。 传统方法通过将楼层平面分割成对应于完整房间的区域来解决这一问题，这些区域被赋予与人类感知一致的标签，例如办公室或厨房。 然而，同一房间内的不同区域可能有不同的用途：我厨房里的桌子和椅子是否可以变成我的办公室？ 现在这个区域属于什么类别？ 办公室还是厨房？ 为了适应这些情况，我们提出了一种新的范式，即通过允许房间内部的混淆来有意放松语义分类器产生的标签。 我们的假设是，这些混淆可能对服务机器人有利。 我们在搜索物体的任务中展示了一个概念验证。

title: Spherical-GOF: Geometry-Aware Panoramic Gaussian Opacity Fields for 3D Scene Reconstruction
summary: Omnidirectional images are increasingly used in robotics and vision due to their wide field of view. However, extending 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) to panoramic camera models remains challenging, as existing formulations are designed for perspective projections and naive adaptations often introduce distortion and geometric inconsistencies. We present Spherical-GOF, an omnidirectional Gaussian rendering framework built upon Gaussian Opacity Fields (GOF). Unlike projection-based rasterization, Spherical-GOF performs GOF ray sampling directly on the unit sphere in spherical ray space, enabling consistent ray-Gaussian interactions for panoramic rendering. To make the spherical ray casting efficient and robust, we derive a conservative spherical bounding rule for fast ray-Gaussian culling and introduce a spherical filtering scheme that adapts Gaussian footprints to distortion-varying panoramic pixel sampling. Extensive experiments on standard panoramic benchmarks (OmniBlender and OmniPhotos) demonstrate competitive photometric quality and substantially improved geometric consistency. Compared with the strongest baseline, Spherical-GOF reduces depth reprojection error by 57% and improves cycle inlier ratio by 21%. Qualitative results show cleaner depth and more coherent normal maps, with strong robustness to global panorama rotations. We further validate generalization on OmniRob, a real-world robotic omnidirectional dataset introduced in this work, featuring UAV and quadruped platforms. The source code and the OmniRob dataset will be released at https://github.com/1170632760/Spherical-GOF.
tldr: The paper presents Spherical-GOF, a novel omnidirectional Gaussian rendering framework improving geometric consistency and photometric quality in 3D scene reconstruction from panoramic images, validated on standard benchmarks and a new real-world robotic dataset.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了Spherical-GOF，一种新颖的Omnidirectional高斯渲染框架，用于改进全景图像三维场景重建中的几何一致性和光度质量，并在标准benchmark和一个新的真实机器人数据集上进行了验证。
summary_zh: 全向图像因其宽广的视野而在机器人和视觉领域得到日益广泛的应用。然而，将3D高斯溅射(3DGS)扩展到全景相机模型仍然具有挑战性，因为现有的公式是为透视投影设计的，而简单的适应往往会引入失真和几何不一致性。我们提出了Spherical-GOF，一个基于高斯不透明度场（GOF）构建的全向高斯渲染框架。与基于投影的光栅化不同，Spherical-GOF在球坐标射线空间中的单位球面上直接执行GOF射线采样，从而实现全景渲染一致的射线-高斯交互。为了使球面射线投射高效且稳健，我们推导出了一种保守的球面边界规则，用于快速射线-高斯剔除，并引入了一种球面滤波方案，该方案使高斯足迹适应于失真变化的全景像素采样。在标准全景基准（OmniBlender和OmniPhotos）上进行的大量实验表明，其具有竞争力的光度质量和显著提高的几何一致性。与最强的基线相比，Spherical-GOF减少了57%的深度重投影误差，并提高了21%的循环内点率。定性结果显示出更清晰的深度和更连贯的法线贴图，并且对全局全景旋转具有很强的鲁棒性。我们进一步验证了在OmniRob上的泛化能力，OmniRob是本研究中引入的真实世界机器人全向数据集，包括无人机和四足平台。源代码和OmniRob数据集将在https://github.com/1170632760/Spherical-GOF上发布。

title: Less is More: Robust Zero-Communication 3D Pursuit-Evasion via Representational Parsimony
summary: Asymmetric 3D pursuit-evasion in cluttered voxel environments is difficult under communication latency, partial observability, and nonholonomic maneuver limits. While many MARL methods rely on richer inter-agent coupling or centralized signals, these dependencies can become fragility sources when communication is delayed or noisy. Building on an inherited path-guided decentralized pursuit scaffold, we study a robustness-oriented question: can representational parsimony improve communication-free coordination? We instantiate this principle with (i) a parsimonious actor observation interface that removes team-coupled channels (83-D to 50-D), and (ii) Contribution-Gated Credit Assignment (CGCA), a locality-aware credit structure for communication-denied cooperation. In Stage-5 evaluation (4 pursuers vs. 1 evader), our configuration reaches 0.753 +/- 0.091 success and 0.223 +/- 0.066 collision, outperforming the 83-D FULL OBS counterpart (0.721 +/- 0.071, 0.253 +/- 0.089). It further shows graceful degradation under speed/yaw/noise/delay stress tests and resilient zero-shot transfer on urban-canyon maps (about 61% success at density 0.24). These results support a practical paradigm shift: explicitly severing redundant cross-agent channels can suppress compounding error cascades and improve robustness in latency-prone deployment.
tldr: This paper explores how simplifying agent observation spaces and using a new credit assignment method can improve the robustness of communication-free multi-agent pursuit-evasion in 3D environments under challenging conditions like latency and noise.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了在具有挑战性的条件下，如延迟和噪声，如何通过简化agent的观察空间，并使用一种新的信用分配方法，来提高3D环境中无通信多智能体追逐逃避的鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 在杂乱体素环境中，不对称的3D追逐逃逸问题在通信延迟、部分可观测性和非完整约束机动限制下非常困难。虽然许多多智能体强化学习（MARL）方法依赖于更丰富的智能体间耦合或集中式信号，但当通信延迟或存在噪声时，这些依赖关系可能会成为脆弱性的来源。在继承了路径引导的去中心化追逐框架的基础上，我们研究了一个以鲁棒性为导向的问题：表征简约性能否改善无通信协调？我们通过以下方式实例化这一原则：（i）一个简约的actor观察接口，它移除了团队耦合通道（从 83-D 降至 50-D）；以及（ii）贡献门控信用分配（CGCA），一种用于无通信合作的局部感知信用结构。在 Stage-5 评估（4 个追逐者 vs. 1 个逃逸者）中，我们的配置达到了 0.753 +/- 0.091 的成功率和 0.223 +/- 0.066 的碰撞率，优于 83-D FULL OBS 对应项（0.721 +/- 0.071，0.253 +/- 0.089）。它进一步在速度/偏航/噪声/延迟压力测试下表现出平缓的性能衰减，并在城市峡谷地图上表现出稳健的零样本迁移能力（在密度为 0.24 时成功率约为 61%）。这些结果支持了一种实用的范式转变：显式切断冗余的跨智能体通道可以抑制复合误差级联，并在易受延迟影响的部署中提高鲁棒性。

title: A General Lie-Group Framework for Continuum Soft Robot Modeling
summary: This paper introduces a general Lie group framework for modeling continuum soft robots, employing Cosserat rod theory combined with cumulative parameterization on the Lie group SE(3). This novel approach addresses limitations present in current strain-based and configuration-based methods by providing geometric local control and eliminating unit quaternion constraints. The paper derives unified analytical expressions for kinematics, statics, and dynamics, including recursive Jacobian computations and an energy-conserving integrator suitable for real-time simulation and control. Additionally, the framework is extended to handle complex robotic structures, including segmented, branched, nested, and rigid-soft composite configurations, facilitating a modular and unified modeling strategy. The effectiveness, generality, and computational efficiency of the proposed methodology are demonstrated through various scenarios, including large-deformation rods, concentric tube robots, parallel robots, cable-driven robots, and articulated fingers. This work enhances modeling flexibility and numerical performance, providing an improved toolset for designing, simulating, and controlling soft robotic systems.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel Lie group framework for modeling soft robots using Cosserat rod theory, providing improved geometric control, unified analytical expressions, and applicability to complex robot structures, leading to enhanced flexibility and numerical performance.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的李群框架，用于使用 Cosserat 杆理论对软体机器人进行建模，提供了改进的几何控制、统一的解析表达式以及对复杂机器人结构的适用性，从而提高了灵活性和数值性能。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于建模连续体软机器人的通用李群框架，该框架结合了 Cosserat 杆理论和李群 SE(3) 上的累积参数化。这种新颖方法通过提供几何局部控制并消除单位四元数约束，解决了当前基于应变和基于构型的建模方法中的局限性。本文推导了运动学、静力学和动力学的统一解析表达式，包括递归雅可比矩阵计算和一个适合实时仿真和控制的能量守恒积分器。此外，该框架被扩展以处理复杂的机器人结构，包括分段式、分支式、嵌套式以及刚性-软性复合配置，从而实现了一种模块化和统一的建模策略。通过各种场景，包括大变形杆、同心管机器人、并联机器人、缆索驱动机器人和关节手指，证明了所提出的方法的有效性、通用性和计算效率。这项工作增强了建模的灵活性和数值性能，为软机器人系统的设计、仿真和控制提供了一套改进的工具。

title: Physics-infused Learning for Aerial Manipulator in Winds and Near-Wall Environments
summary: Aerial manipulation (AM) expands UAV capabilities beyond passive observation to contact-based operations at high altitudes and in otherwise inaccessible environments. Although recent advances show promise, most AM systems are developed in controlled settings that overlook key aerodynamic effects. Simplified thrust models are often insufficient to capture the nonlinear wind disturbances and proximity-induced flow variations present in real-world environments near infrastructure, while high-fidelity CFD methods remain impractical for real-time use. Learning-based models are computationally efficient at inference, but often struggle to generalize to unseen condition. This paper combines both approaches by integrating a physics-based blade-element model with a learning-based residual force estimator, along with a rotor-speed allocation strategy for disturbance compensation, resulting in a unified control framework. The blade-element model computes per-rotor aerodynamic forces under wind and provides a refined feedforward disturbance estimate. A learning-based estimator then predicts the residual forces not captured by the model, enabling compensation for unmodeled aerodynamic effects. An online adaptation mechanism further updates the residual-force prediction and rotor-speed allocation jointly to reduce the mismatch between desired and realized thrust. We evaluate this framework in both free-flight and wall-contact tracking tasks in a simulated near-wall wind environment. Results demonstrate improved disturbance estimation and trajectory-tracking accuracy over conventional approaches, enabling robust wall-contact execution under challenging aerodynamic conditions.
tldr: This paper presents a physics-infused learning approach for aerial manipulators, combining a blade-element model with a learned residual force estimator to improve disturbance rejection and trajectory tracking in windy, near-wall environments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种融合物理信息的学习方法，用于空中机械臂。该方法结合了叶素模型和学习到的残余力估计器，从而提高在多风近壁环境中对干扰的抑制和轨迹跟踪能力。
summary_zh: 空中操作 (AM) 将无人机的能力从被动观察扩展到在高空和其他难以接近的环境中进行基于接触的操作。虽然最近的进展显示出潜力，但大多数空中操作系统都是在受控环境中开发的，忽略了关键的空气动力学效应。简化的推力模型通常不足以捕捉真实环境中基础设施附近的非线性风干扰和邻近诱导的流动变化，而高保真 CFD 方法在实时使用中仍然不切实际。基于学习的模型在推理方面计算效率很高，但通常难以泛化到未见过的条件。本文结合了这两种方法，将基于物理的桨叶单元模型与基于学习的残余力估计器以及用于扰动补偿的旋翼速度分配策略集成在一起，从而形成了一个统一的控制框架。桨叶单元模型计算风下的每个旋翼的空气动力，并提供精细化的前馈扰动估计。然后，基于学习的估计器预测模型未捕捉到的残余力，从而能够补偿未建模的空气动力学效应。在线自适应机制进一步联合更新残余力预测和旋翼速度分配，以减少期望推力与实际推力之间的不匹配。我们在模拟的近壁风环境中，对自由飞行和壁面接触跟踪任务中评估了该框架。结果表明，与传统方法相比，扰动估计和轨迹跟踪精度有所提高，从而能够在具有挑战性的空气动力学条件下实现稳健的壁面接触执行。

title: Speed3R: Sparse Feed-forward 3D Reconstruction Models
summary: While recent feed-forward 3D reconstruction models accelerate 3D reconstruction by jointly inferring dense geometry and camera poses in a single pass, their reliance on dense attention imposes a quadratic complexity, creating a prohibitive computational bottleneck that severely limits inference speed. To resolve this, we introduce Speed3R, an end-to-end trainable model inspired by the core principle of Structure-from-Motion: that a sparse set of keypoints is sufficient for robust pose estimation. Speed3R features a dual-branch attention mechanism where a compression branch creates a coarse contextual prior to guide a selection branch, which performs fine-grained attention only on the most informative image tokens. This strategy mimics the efficiency of traditional keypoint matching, achieving a remarkable 12.4x inference speedup on 1000-view sequences, while introducing a minimal, controlled trade-off in geometric accuracy. Validated on standard benchmarks with both VGGT and $π^3$ backbones, our method delivers high-quality reconstructions at a fraction of computational cost, paving the way for efficient large-scale scene modeling.
tldr: Speed3R introduces a sparse attention mechanism for feed-forward 3D reconstruction, achieving significant speedups with minimal accuracy trade-off by mimicking structure-from-motion keypoint matching.
tldr_zh: Speed3R引入了一种用于前馈3D重建的稀疏注意力机制，通过模仿运动结构的关键点匹配，在最小的精度损失下实现了显著的加速。
summary_zh:
中文翻译：
尽管最近的前馈式3D重建模型通过一次性联合推断稠密几何体和相机位姿来加速3D重建，但它们对稠密注意力机制的依赖导致二次方复杂度，造成了严重的计算瓶颈，极大地限制了推理速度。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了Speed3R，这是一个端到端可训练的模型，其灵感来源于运动结构恢复（Structure-from-Motion）的核心原则：稀疏的关键点集足以进行稳健的位姿估计。Speed3R采用双分支注意力机制，其中压缩分支创建粗略的上下文先验，以引导选择分支，该分支仅对信息量最大的图像标记执行细粒度注意力。这种策略模仿了传统关键点匹配的效率，在1000视图序列上实现了显著的12.4倍推理速度提升，同时引入了最小的、可控的几何精度折衷。通过在标准基准测试上使用VGGT和$π^3$骨干网络进行验证，我们的方法以极低的计算成本提供了高质量的重建，为高效的大规模场景建模铺平了道路。

title: All Vehicles Can Lie: Efficient Adversarial Defense in Fully Untrusted-Vehicle Collaborative Perception via Pseudo-Random Bayesian Inference
summary: Collaborative perception (CP) enables multiple vehicles to augment their individual perception capacities through the exchange of feature-level sensory data. However, this fusion mechanism is inherently vulnerable to adversarial attacks, especially in fully untrusted-vehicle environments. Existing defense approaches often assume a trusted ego vehicle as a reference or incorporate additional binary classifiers. These assumptions limit their practicality in real-world deployments due to the questionable trustworthiness of ego vehicles, the requirement for real-time detection, and the need for generalizability across diverse scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Pseudo-Random Bayesian Inference (PRBI) framework, a first efficient defense method tailored for fully untrusted-vehicle CP. PRBI detects adversarial behavior by leveraging temporal perceptual discrepancies, using the reliable perception from the preceding frame as a dynamic reference. Additionally, it employs a pseudo-random grouping strategy that requires only two verifications per frame, while applying Bayesian inference to estimate both the number and identities of malicious vehicles. Theoretical analysis has proven the convergence and stability of the proposed PRBI framework. Extensive experiments show that PRBI requires only 2.5 verifications per frame on average, outperforming existing methods significantly, and restores detection precision to between 79.4% and 86.9% of pre-attack levels.
tldr: The paper introduces Pseudo-Random Bayesian Inference (PRBI), a novel and efficient defense mechanism against adversarial attacks in fully untrusted-vehicle collaborative perception, leveraging temporal perceptual discrepancies and Bayesian inference to identify malicious vehicles.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为伪随机贝叶斯推理(PRBI)的新型高效防御机制，用于应对完全不受信任车辆的协作感知中对抗性攻击，利用时间感知差异和贝叶斯推理来识别恶意车辆。
summary_zh: 协同感知(CP)允许多个车辆通过交换特征级传感数据来增强其各自的感知能力。然而，这种融合机制本质上容易受到对抗性攻击，尤其是在完全不受信任的车辆环境中。 现有的防御方法通常假设一个可信的自车作为参考，或者纳入额外的二元分类器。 这些假设限制了它们在现实世界部署中的实用性，原因在于自车可信度存疑、需要实时检测，以及需要在多样场景中具有普适性。 为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的伪随机贝叶斯推断(PRBI)框架，这是一种专为完全不受信任车辆的CP设计的首个高效防御方法。 PRBI通过利用时间感知差异来检测对抗行为，以前一帧的可靠感知作为动态参考。 此外，它采用了一种伪随机分组策略，每帧仅需要两次验证，同时应用贝叶斯推断来估计恶意车辆的数量和身份。 理论分析已经证明了所提出的PRBI框架的收敛性和稳定性。 大量实验表明，PRBI平均每帧仅需要2.5次验证，显著优于现有方法，并将检测精度恢复到攻击前水平的79.4%至86.9%之间。

title: Real-Time Drone Detection in Event Cameras via Per-Pixel Frequency Analysis
summary: Detecting fast-moving objects, such as unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV), from event camera data is challenging due to the sparse, asynchronous nature of the input. Traditional Discrete Fourier Transforms (DFT) are effective at identifying periodic signals, such as spinning rotors, but they assume uniformly sampled data, which event cameras do not provide. We propose a novel per-pixel temporal analysis framework using the Non-uniform Discrete Fourier Transform (NDFT), which we call Drone Detection via Harmonic Fingerprinting (DDHF). Our method uses purely analytical techniques that identify the frequency signature of drone rotors, as characterized by frequency combs in their power spectra, enabling a tunable and generalizable algorithm that achieves accurate real-time localization of UAV. We compare against a YOLO detector under equivalent conditions, demonstrating improvement in accuracy and latency across a difficult array of drone speeds, distances, and scenarios. DDHF achieves an average localization F1 score of 90.89% and average latency of 2.39ms per frame, while YOLO achieves an F1 score of 66.74% and requires 12.40ms per frame. Through utilization of purely analytic techniques, DDHF is quickly tuned on small data, easily interpretable, and achieves competitive accuracies and latencies to deep learning alternatives.
tldr: This paper introduces DDHF, a novel method for real-time drone detection in event cameras data using per-pixel non-uniform discrete Fourier transform, and shows it outperforms YOLO in accuracy and latency.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为DDHF的新方法，该方法使用逐像素非均匀离散傅里叶变换在事件相机数据中进行实时无人机检测，并且在准确性和延迟方面优于YOLO。
summary_zh: 从事件相机数据中检测快速移动的物体，例如无人机（UAV），由于输入数据的稀疏性和异步性而具有挑战性。传统的离散傅里叶变换（DFT）在识别周期性信号（如旋转旋翼）方面非常有效，但它们假设数据是均匀采样的，而事件相机无法提供这种数据。我们提出了一种新颖的逐像素时间分析框架，该框架使用非均匀离散傅里叶变换（NDFT），我们将其称为基于谐波指纹的无人机检测（DDHF）。我们的方法采用纯粹的分析技术，识别无人机旋翼的频率特征，其特征在于功率谱中的频率梳，从而实现一种可调整且可推广的能够精确实时定位无人机的算法。我们在同等条件下与YOLO检测器进行了比较，结果表明，在各种具有挑战性的无人机速度、距离和场景中，我们的方法在准确性和延迟方面都有改进。DDHF实现了90.89%的平均定位F1分数和每帧2.39毫秒的平均延迟，而YOLO实现了66.74%的F1分数，需要每帧12.40毫秒。通过利用纯分析技术，DDHF可以在少量数据上快速调整，易于解释，并且实现了与深度学习替代方案相当的准确性和延迟。

title: DynamicVGGT: Learning Dynamic Point Maps for 4D Scene Reconstruction in Autonomous Driving
summary: Dynamic scene reconstruction in autonomous driving remains a fundamental challenge due to significant temporal variations, moving objects, and complex scene dynamics. Existing feed-forward 3D models have demonstrated strong performance in static reconstruction but still struggle to capture dynamic motion. To address these limitations, we propose DynamicVGGT, a unified feed-forward framework that extends VGGT from static 3D perception to dynamic 4D reconstruction. Our goal is to model point motion within feed-forward 3D models in a dynamic and temporally coherent manner. To this end, we jointly predict the current and future point maps within a shared reference coordinate system, allowing the model to implicitly learn dynamic point representations through temporal correspondence. To efficiently capture temporal dependencies, we introduce a Motion-aware Temporal Attention (MTA) module that learns motion continuity. Furthermore, we design a Dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting Head that explicitly models point motion by predicting Gaussian velocities using learnable motion tokens under scene flow supervision. It refines dynamic geometry through continuous 3D Gaussian optimization. Extensive experiments on autonomous driving datasets demonstrate that DynamicVGGT significantly outperforms existing methods in reconstruction accuracy, achieving robust feed-forward 4D dynamic scene reconstruction under complex driving scenarios.
tldr: DynamicVGGT is a novel feed-forward framework for 4D dynamic scene reconstruction in autonomous driving, which uses motion-aware temporal attention and dynamic 3D Gaussian splatting to model and refine point motion.
tldr_zh: DynamicVGGT是一个用于自动驾驶中4D动态场景重建的新型前馈框架，它使用运动感知时间注意力和动态3D高斯溅射来建模和细化点运动。
summary_zh: 在自动驾驶中，动态场景重建因其显著的时间变化、移动物体和复杂的场景动态而仍然是一个根本性的挑战。现有的前馈3D模型在静态重建方面表现出强大的性能，但在捕捉动态运动方面仍然存在困难。为了应对这些局限性，我们提出了DynamicVGGT，一个统一的前馈框架，将VGGT从静态3D感知扩展到动态4D重建。我们的目标是在前馈3D模型中以动态和时间一致的方式建模点云运动。为此，我们在共享的参考坐标系内联合预测当前和未来的点云图，使模型能够通过时间对应关系隐式地学习动态点表示。为了有效地捕捉时间依赖性，我们引入了一种运动感知时序注意力（MTA）模块，用于学习运动连续性。此外，我们设计了一个动态3D高斯溅射头，通过在场景流监督下使用可学习的运动令牌预测高斯速度来显式地建模点云运动，并通过连续的3D高斯优化来细化动态几何。在自动驾驶数据集上的大量实验表明，DynamicVGGT在重建精度方面显著优于现有方法，在复杂的驾驶场景下实现了鲁棒的前馈4D动态场景重建。

title: Training-free Temporal Object Tracking in Surgical Videos
summary:
Purpose: In this paper, we present a novel approach for online object tracking in laparoscopic cholecystectomy (LC) surgical videos, targeting localisation and tracking of critical anatomical structures and instruments. Our method addresses the challenges of costly pixel-level annotations and label inconsistencies inherent in existing datasets.
  Methods: Leveraging the inherent object localisation capabilities of pre-trained text-to-image diffusion models, we extract representative features from surgical frames without any training or fine-tuning. Our tracking framework uses these features, along with cross-frame interactions via an affinity matrix inspired by query-key-value attention, to ensure temporal continuity in the tracking process.
  Results: Through a pilot study, we first demonstrate that diffusion features exhibit superior object localisation and consistent semantics across different decoder levels and temporal frames. Later, we perform extensive experiments to validate the effectiveness of our approach, showcasing its superiority over competitors for the task of temporal object tracking. Specifically, we achieve a per-pixel classification accuracy of 79.19%, mean Jaccard Score of 56.20%, and mean F-Score of 79.48% on the publicly available CholeSeg8K dataset.
  Conclusion: Our work not only introduces a novel application of text-to-image diffusion models but also contributes to advancing the field of surgical video analysis, offering a promising avenue for accurate and cost-effective temporal object tracking in minimally invasive surgery videos.
tldr: This paper presents a training-free method for tracking objects in surgical videos using features extracted from pre-trained text-to-image diffusion models, achieving competitive performance without fine-tuning.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种无需训练的方法，利用预训练的文本到图像扩散模型提取特征，用于跟踪手术视频中的对象，并在无需微调的情况下实现了有竞争力的性能。
summary_zh:
目的：本文提出一种新型方法，用于腹腔镜胆囊切除术（LC）手术视频中的在线目标跟踪，旨在定位和跟踪关键的解剖结构和手术器械。我们的方法解决了现有数据集中固有的代价高昂的像素级标注和标签不一致性问题。

方法：我们利用预训练的文本到图像扩散模型固有的目标定位能力，从手术帧中提取具有代表性的特征，而无需任何训练或微调。我们的跟踪框架使用这些特征，并通过受查询-键-值注意力机制启发的亲和力矩阵进行跨帧交互，以确保跟踪过程中的时间连续性。

结果：通过一项初步研究，我们首先证明扩散特征在不同解码器级别和时间帧上表现出优越的目标定位和一致的语义信息。随后，我们进行了广泛的实验来验证我们方法的有效性，展示了其在时间目标跟踪任务中相对于竞争对手的优越性。具体而言，我们在公开的CholeSeg8K数据集上获得了79.19%的像素级分类准确率，56.20%的平均Jaccard系数和79.48%的平均F-Score。

结论：我们的工作不仅引入了一种文本到图像扩散模型的新型应用，而且还有助于推进手术视频分析领域，为微创手术视频中准确且具有成本效益的时间目标跟踪提供了一条有希望的途径。

title: 4DRC-OCC: Robust Semantic Occupancy Prediction Through Fusion of 4D Radar and Camera
summary: Autonomous driving requires robust perception across diverse environmental conditions, yet 3D semantic occupancy prediction remains challenging under adverse weather and lighting. In this work, we present the first study combining 4D radar and camera data for 3D semantic occupancy prediction. Our fusion leverages the complementary strengths of both modalities: 4D radar provides reliable range, velocity, and angle measurements in challenging conditions, while cameras contribute rich semantic and texture information. We further show that integrating depth cues from camera pixels enables lifting 2D images to 3D, improving scene reconstruction accuracy. Additionally, we introduce a fully automatically labeled dataset for training semantic occupancy models, substantially reducing reliance on costly manual annotation. Experiments demonstrate the robustness of 4D radar across diverse scenarios, highlighting its potential to advance autonomous vehicle perception.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel approach for 3D semantic occupancy prediction by fusing 4D radar and camera data, along with a new automatically labeled dataset. The method aims to improve robustness in autonomous driving perception, particularly under adverse conditions.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的方法，通过融合4D雷达和相机数据进行3D语义占用预测，并创建了一个新的自动标注数据集。该方法旨在提高自动驾驶感知的鲁棒性，尤其是在不利条件下。
summary_zh: 自动驾驶需要在各种环境条件下具备鲁棒的感知能力，然而，在恶劣天气和光照条件下进行3D语义占据预测仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们首次提出了结合4D雷达和相机数据的3D语义占据预测研究。我们的融合方法利用了两种模态的互补优势：4D雷达在挑战性条件下提供可靠的距离、速度和角度测量，而相机则贡献丰富的语义和纹理信息。我们进一步证明，整合来自相机像素的深度线索能够将2D图像提升到3D，从而提高场景重建的准确性。此外，我们引入了一个完全自动标注的数据集，用于训练语义占据模型，从而大大减少了对昂贵的人工标注的依赖。实验表明了4D雷达在各种场景下的鲁棒性，突显了其在推进自动驾驶汽车感知方面的潜力。

title: Drift-to-Action Controllers: Budgeted Interventions with Online Risk Certificates
summary: Deployed machine learning systems face distribution drift, yet most monitoring pipelines stop at alarms and leave the response underspecified under labeling, compute, and latency constraints. We introduce Drift2Act, a drift-to-action controller that treats monitoring as constrained decision-making with explicit safety. Drift2Act combines a sensing layer that maps unlabeled monitoring signals to a belief over drift types with an active risk certificate that queries a small set of delayed labels from a recent window to produce an anytime-valid upper bound $U_t(δ)$ on current risk. The certificate gates operation: if $U_t(δ) \le τ$, the controller selects low-cost actions (e.g., recalibration or test-time adaptation); if $U_t(δ) > τ$, it activates abstain/handoff and escalates to rollback or retraining under cooldowns. In a realistic streaming protocol with label delay and explicit intervention costs, Drift2Act achieves near-zero safety violations and fast recovery at moderate cost on WILDS Camelyon17, DomainNet, and a controlled synthetic drift stream, outperforming alarm-only monitoring, adapt-always adaptation, schedule-based retraining, selective prediction alone, and an ablation without certification. Overall, online risk certification enables reliable drift response and reframes monitoring as decision-making with safety.
tldr: The paper introduces Drift2Act, a system that uses online risk certificates to make informed decisions about interventions (e.g., recalibration, retraining) in response to distribution drift in deployed ML systems, minimizing safety violations and intervention costs.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Drift2Act的系统，它使用在线风险证书来智能决策并采取干预措施（如重新校准、重新训练）来应对已部署的机器学习系统中的分布漂移，从而最小化安全违规和干预成本。
summary_zh: 已部署的机器学习系统面临分布漂移，但大多数监控管道止步于警报，在标签、计算和延迟约束下，响应措施仍未充分指定。我们引入了Drift2Act，一种漂移到行动的控制器，将监控视为具有明确安全性的受约束决策。Drift2Act结合了一个传感层，该层将未标记的监控信号映射到关于漂移类型的置信度；以及一个主动风险证书，该证书查询来自最近窗口的一小部分延迟标签，以产生当前风险的随时有效上限$U_t(δ)$。该证书控制操作：如果$U_t(δ) \le τ$，则控制器选择低成本操作（例如，重新校准或测试时自适应）；如果$U_t(δ) > τ$，则它激活拒绝/移交，并在冷却期内升级到回滚或重新训练。在一个具有标签延迟和显式干预成本的真实流式协议中，Drift2Act在WILDS Camelyon17、DomainNet和一个受控合成漂移流上，以适中的成本实现了接近零的安全违规和快速恢复，优于仅限警报的监控、始终自适应的自适应、基于调度的重新训练、单独的选择性预测，以及一个没有证书的消融实验。总而言之，在线风险认证能够实现可靠的漂移响应，并将监控重新定义为具有安全性的决策。

title: Breaking the Bias Barrier in Concave Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning
summary:
While standard reinforcement learning optimizes a single reward signal, many applications require optimizing a nonlinear utility $f(J_1^π,\dots,J_M^π)$ over multiple objectives, where each $J_m^π$ denotes the expected discounted return of a distinct reward function. A common approach is concave scalarization, which captures important trade-offs such as fairness and risk sensitivity. However, nonlinear scalarization introduces a fundamental challenge for policy gradient methods: the gradient depends on $\partial f(J^π)$, while in practice only empirical return estimates $\hat J$ are available. Because $f$ is nonlinear, the plug-in estimator is biased ($\mathbb{E}[\partial f(\hat J)] \neq \partial f(\mathbb{E}[\hat J])$), leading to persistent gradient bias that degrades sample complexity.
  In this work we identify and overcome this bias barrier in concave-scalarized multi-objective reinforcement learning. We show that existing policy-gradient methods suffer an intrinsic $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-4})$ sample complexity due to this bias. To address this issue, we develop a Natural Policy Gradient (NPG) algorithm equipped with a multi-level Monte Carlo (MLMC) estimator that controls the bias of the scalarization gradient while maintaining low sampling cost. We prove that this approach achieves the optimal $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$ sample complexity for computing an $ε$-optimal policy. Furthermore, we show that when the scalarization function is second-order smooth, the first-order bias cancels automatically, allowing vanilla NPG to achieve the same $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$ rate without MLMC. Our results provide the first optimal sample complexity guarantees for concave multi-objective reinforcement learning under policy-gradient methods.
tldr: This paper addresses the gradient bias problem in concave-scalarized multi-objective reinforcement learning by developing a Natural Policy Gradient algorithm with a multi-level Monte Carlo estimator to achieve optimal sample complexity.
tldr_zh: 本文通过开发一种具有多级蒙特卡罗估计器的自然策略梯度算法，解决了凹标量化多目标强化学习中的梯度偏差问题，实现了最佳样本复杂度。
summary_zh:
标准强化学习旨在优化单一奖励信号，但许多应用需要优化多个目标上的非线性效用函数 $f(J_1^π,\dots,J_M^π)$，其中每个 $J_m^π$ 表示不同奖励函数的预期折扣回报。一种常见的方法是凹标量化，它可以捕捉诸如公平性和风险敏感性等重要权衡。然而，非线性标量化给策略梯度方法带来了一个根本挑战：梯度依赖于 $\partial f(J^π)$，而实际上只有经验回报估计 $\hat J$ 可用。由于 $f$ 是非线性的，插入式估计器是有偏的（$\mathbb{E}[\partial f(\hat J)] \neq \partial f(\mathbb{E}[\hat J])$），导致持续的梯度偏差，从而降低了样本复杂度。

  在这项工作中，我们识别并克服了凹标量化多目标强化学习中的这种偏差障碍。我们表明，由于这种偏差，现有的策略梯度方法存在固有的 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-4})$ 样本复杂度。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种配备多层蒙特卡洛 (MLMC) 估计器的自然策略梯度 (NPG) 算法，该估计器在保持低采样成本的同时控制标量化梯度的偏差。我们证明，这种方法实现了计算 $ε$-最优策略的最佳 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$ 样本复杂度。此外，我们表明，当标量化函数是二阶光滑时，一阶偏差会自动消除，使得 vanilla NPG 能够在没有 MLMC 的情况下实现相同的 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$ 速率。我们的结果为策略梯度方法下的凹多目标强化学习提供了第一个最优样本复杂度保证。

title: PolyFormer: learning efficient reformulations for scalable optimization under complex physical constraints
summary: Real-world optimization problems are often constrained by complex physical laws that limit computational scalability. These constraints are inherently tied to complex regions, and thus learning models that incorporate physical and geometric knowledge, i.e., physics-informed machine learning (PIML), offer a promising pathway for efficient solution. Here, we introduce PolyFormer, which opens a new direction for PIML in prescriptive optimization tasks, where physical and geometric knowledge is not merely used to regularize learning models, but to simplify the problems themselves. PolyFormer captures geometric structures behind constraints and transforms them into efficient polytopic reformulations, thereby decoupling problem complexity from solution difficulty and enabling off-the-shelf optimization solvers to efficiently produce feasible solutions with acceptable optimality loss. Through evaluations across three important problems (large-scale resource aggregation, network-constrained optimization, and optimization under uncertainty), PolyFormer achieves computational speedups up to 6,400-fold and memory reductions up to 99.87%, while maintaining solution quality competitive with or superior to state-of-the-art methods. These results demonstrate that PolyFormer provides an efficient and reliable solution for scalable constrained optimization, expanding the scope of PIML to prescriptive tasks in scientific discovery and engineering applications.
tldr: The paper introduces PolyFormer, a physics-informed machine learning (PIML) approach for transforming complex constrained optimization problems into efficient polytopic reformulations, achieving significant speedups and memory reductions while maintaining solution quality.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了PolyFormer，一种物理信息机器学习（PIML）方法，用于将复杂的约束优化问题转化为高效的多面体重新表述，在保持解决方案质量的同时，实现了显著的加速和内存减少。
summary_zh: 现实世界的优化问题常常受到复杂物理定律的约束，这限制了计算的可扩展性。这些约束本质上与复杂区域相联系，因此，结合物理和几何知识的学习模型，即物理信息机器学习 (PIML)，为高效求解提供了一条有前景的途径。在此，我们引入 PolyFormer，它为指令性优化任务中的 PIML 开辟了一个新的方向，其中物理和几何知识不仅仅用于正则化学习模型，而是用于简化问题本身。 PolyFormer 捕获约束背后的几何结构，并将其转换为高效的多面体重构，从而将问题复杂性与求解难度解耦，并使现成的优化求解器能够高效地生成具有可接受最优性损失的可行解。通过对三个重要问题（大规模资源聚合、网络约束优化以及不确定性下的优化）的评估，PolyFormer实现了高达6,400倍的计算加速和高达99.87%的内存减少，同时保持了与最先进方法相比具有竞争力或更优越的解质量。这些结果表明，PolyFormer 为可扩展的约束优化提供了高效且可靠的解决方案，并将 PIML 的范围扩展到科学发现和工程应用中的指令性任务。

title: RL unknotter, hard unknots and unknotting number
summary: We develop a reinforcement learning pipeline for simplifying knot diagrams. A trained agent learns move proposals and a value heuristic for navigating Reidemeister moves. The pipeline applies to arbitrary knots and links; we test it on ``very hard'' unknot diagrams and, using diagram inflation, on $4_1\#9_{10}$ where we recover the recently established and surprising upper bound of three for the unknotting number.
tldr: This paper presents a reinforcement learning approach for simplifying knot diagrams, demonstrating its effectiveness on challenging unknot examples and a composite knot, achieving a previously established unknotting number bound.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用强化学习简化纽结图的方法，并在具有挑战性的单结例子和一个复合结上展示了其有效性，达到了先前确定的解结数界限。
summary_zh: 我们开发了一个用于简化纽结图的强化学习流程。训练好的智能体学习移动建议和价值启发式，用于导航雷德迈斯特移动。该流程适用于任意纽结和链环；我们将其应用于“非常困难”的无结图，并使用图膨胀，应用于$4_1\#9_{10}$，由此我们恢复了最近确立的并让人惊讶的无结数上界，即三。

title: Adaptive Entropy-Driven Sensor Selection in a Camera-LiDAR Particle Filter for Single-Vessel Tracking
summary: Robust single-vessel tracking from fixed coastal platforms is hindered by modality-specific degradations: cameras suffer from illumination and visual clutter, while LiDAR performance drops with range and intermittent returns. We present a heterogeneous multi-sensor fusion particle-filter tracker that incorporates an information-gain (entropy-reduction) adaptive sensing policy to select the most informative configuration at each fusion time bin. The approach is validated in a real maritime deployment at the CMMI Smart Marina Testbed (Ayia Napa Marina, Cyprus), using a shore-mounted 3D LiDAR and an elevated fixed camera to track a rigid inflatable boat with onboard GNSS ground truth. We compare LiDAR-only, camera-only, all-sensors, and adaptive configurations. Results show LiDAR dominates near-field accuracy, the camera sustains longer-range coverage when LiDAR becomes unavailable, and the adaptive policy achieves a favorable accuracy-continuity trade-off by switching modalities based on information gain. By avoiding continuous multi-stream processing, the adaptive configuration provides a practical baseline for resilient and resource-aware maritime surveillance.
tldr: This paper presents an adaptive sensor fusion approach using a particle filter for single-vessel tracking, switching between LiDAR and camera based on information gain to achieve robust and resource-aware maritime surveillance.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种自适应传感器融合方法，使用粒子滤波器进行单船跟踪，并根据信息增益在激光雷达和摄像头之间切换，从而实现稳健且资源感知的海上监视。
summary_zh: 从固定海岸平台进行稳健的单船跟踪面临诸多挑战，这些挑战源于特定模态的退化：相机受到光照和视觉杂乱的影响，而激光雷达的性能则随着距离的增加和间歇返回的出现而下降。我们提出了一种异构多传感器融合粒子滤波跟踪器，该跟踪器融合了一种信息增益（熵减）自适应感知策略，以在每个融合时间段选择最具信息量的配置。该方法在CMMI智能码头测试台（塞浦路斯阿依纳帕码头）的真实海事部署中得到验证，使用岸基三维激光雷达和一个高架固定相机来跟踪一艘带有车载GNSS真值的硬式充气艇。我们比较了仅使用激光雷达、仅使用相机、使用所有传感器和使用自适应配置的性能。结果表明，激光雷达在近场精度方面占优，当激光雷达不可用时，相机可以维持更远距离的覆盖范围，并且自适应策略通过基于信息增益切换模态，实现了有利的精度-连续性权衡。通过避免连续的多流处理，自适应配置为弹性且资源感知的海事监视提供了一个实用的基线。

title: FoMo: A Multi-Season Dataset for Robot Navigation in Forêt Montmorency
summary: The Forêt Montmorency (FoMo) dataset is a comprehensive multi-season data collection, recorded over the span of one year in a boreal forest. Featuring a unique combination of on- and off-pavement environments with significant environmental changes, the dataset challenges established odometry and SLAM pipelines. Some highlights of the data include the accumulation of snow exceeding 1 m, significant vegetation growth in front of sensors, and operations at the traction limits of the platform. In total, the FoMo dataset includes over 64 km of six diverse trajectories, repeated during 12 deployments throughout the year. The dataset features data from one rotating and one hybrid solid-state lidar, a Frequency Modulated Continuous Wave (FMCW) radar, full-HD images from a stereo camera and a wide lens monocular camera, as well as data from two IMUs. Ground Truth is calculated by post-processing three GNSS receivers mounted on the Uncrewed Ground Vehicle (UGV) and a static GNSS base station. Additional metadata, such as one measurement per minute from an on-site weather station, camera calibration intrinsics, and vehicle power consumption, is available for all sequences. To highlight the relevance of the dataset, we performed a preliminary evaluation of the robustness of a lidar-inertial, radar-gyro, and a visual-inertial localization and mapping techniques to seasonal changes. We show that seasonal changes have serious effects on the re-localization capabilities of the state-of-the-art methods. The dataset and development kit are available at https://fomo.norlab.ulaval.ca.
tldr: The paper introduces the FoMo dataset, a multi-seasonal dataset for robot navigation in a boreal forest, challenging existing odometry and SLAM pipelines due to significant environmental changes. The dataset includes various sensor data and ground truth, and shows performance degradation of state-of-the-art methods due to seasonal changes.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍FoMo数据集，这是一个用于寒带森林机器人导航的多季节数据集，由于显著的环境变化，它对现有的里程计和SLAM管线提出了挑战。该数据集包括各种传感器数据和地面真值，并显示了由于季节性变化导致的最先进方法性能下降。
summary_zh: Forêt Montmorency (FoMo)数据集是一个全面的多季节数据集合，记录了一片北方森林在一年期间的变化。该数据集包含铺装路面和非铺装路面环境的独特结合，并伴随显著的环境变化，对既有的里程计和SLAM流程提出了挑战。该数据集的一些亮点包括超过1米的积雪、传感器前方大量植被生长以及平台在牵引力极限下的运行。FoMo数据集总共包含超过64公里的六条不同轨迹，这些轨迹在一年中的12次部署中重复记录。该数据集包含来自一个旋转式激光雷达和一个混合固态激光雷达、一个调频连续波（FMCW）雷达、来自立体相机和广角单目相机的全高清图像以及来自两个IMU的数据。真值是通过对安装在无人地面车辆（UGV）上的三个GNSS接收器和一个静态GNSS基站的数据进行后处理计算得出。所有序列还提供了额外的元数据，例如来自现场气象站的每分钟一次的测量数据、相机标定内参和车辆功耗。为了突出该数据集的意义，我们初步评估了激光雷达-惯性、雷达-陀螺仪以及视觉-惯性定位与建图技术对季节变化的鲁棒性。我们表明，季节变化对最先进方法的重定位能力产生了严重影响。该数据集和开发工具包可在https://fomo.norlab.ulaval.ca获取。

title: Fusion-Poly: A Polyhedral Framework Based on Spatial-Temporal Fusion for 3D Multi-Object Tracking
summary:
LiDAR-camera 3D multi-object tracking (MOT) combines rich visual semantics with accurate depth cues to improve trajectory consistency and tracking reliability. In practice, however, LiDAR and cameras operate at different sampling rates. To maintain temporal alignment, existing data pipelines usually synchronize heterogeneous sensor streams and annotate them at a reduced shared frequency, forcing most prior methods to perform spatial fusion only at synchronized timestamps through projection-based or learnable cross-sensor association. As a result, abundant asynchronous observations remain underexploited, despite their potential to support more frequent association and more robust trajectory estimation over short temporal intervals.
  To address this limitation, we propose Fusion-Poly, a spatial-temporal fusion framework for 3D MOT that integrates asynchronous LiDAR and camera data. Fusion-Poly associates trajectories with multi-modal observations at synchronized timestamps and with single-modal observations at asynchronous timestamps, enabling higher-frequency updates of motion and existence states. The framework contains three key components: a frequency-aware cascade matching module that adapts to synchronized and asynchronous frames according to available detection modalities; a frequency-aware trajectory estimation module that maintains trajectories through high-frequency motion prediction, differential updates, and confidence-calibrated lifecycle management; and a full-state observation alignment module that improves cross-modal consistency at synchronized timestamps by optimizing image-projection errors.
  On the nuScenes test set, Fusion-Poly achieves 76.5% AMOTA, establishing a new state of the art among tracking-by-detection 3D MOT methods. Extensive ablation studies further validate the effectiveness of each component. Code will be released.
tldr: The paper introduces Fusion-Poly, a novel spatial-temporal fusion framework for 3D multi-object tracking that leverages asynchronous LiDAR and camera data to improve tracking performance, achieving state-of-the-art results on the nuScenes dataset.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了 Fusion-Poly，一种新颖的基于时空融合的 3D 多目标跟踪框架，它利用异步的 LiDAR 和相机数据来提高跟踪性能，并在 nuScenes 数据集上实现了最先进的结果。
summary_zh:
激光雷达-相机3D多目标跟踪（MOT）结合了丰富的视觉语义和精确的深度线索，以提高轨迹一致性和跟踪可靠性。然而，在实践中，激光雷达和相机以不同的采样率运行。为了保持时间对齐，现有的数据管道通常同步异构传感器流，并以降低的共享频率对其进行标注，这迫使大多数先前的方法仅在同步的时间戳通过基于投影或可学习的跨传感器关联来执行空间融合。因此，尽管异步观测具有支持更高频率的关联和在较短时间间隔内实现更稳健轨迹估计的潜力，但大量异步观测仍然未被充分利用。

为了解决这个局限性，我们提出Fusion-Poly，一个用于3D MOT的时空融合框架，集成了异步的激光雷达和相机数据。Fusion-Poly将轨迹与同步时间戳的多模态观测以及异步时间戳的单模态观测相关联，从而能够更高频率地更新运动和存在状态。该框架包含三个关键组成部分：一个频率感知级联匹配模块，根据可用的检测模态自适应于同步和异步帧；一个频率感知轨迹估计模块，通过高频率的运动预测、差分更新和置信度校准的生命周期管理来维护轨迹；以及一个全状态观测对齐模块，通过优化图像投影误差来提高同步时间戳的跨模态一致性。

在nuScenes测试集上，Fusion-Poly达到了76.5%的AMOTA，在基于检测的3D MOT方法中建立了新的最先进水平。广泛的消融研究进一步验证了每个组件的有效性。代码即将发布。

title: Edged USLAM: Edge-Aware Event-Based SLAM with Learning-Based Depth Priors
summary: Conventional visual simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithms often fail under rapid motion, low illumination, or abrupt lighting transitions due to motion blur and limited dynamic range. Event cameras mitigate these issues with high temporal resolution and high dynamic range (HDR), but their sparse, asynchronous outputs complicate feature extraction and integration with other sensors; e.g. inertial measurement units (IMUs) and standard cameras. We present Edged USLAM, a hybrid visual-inertial system that extends Ultimate SLAM (USLAM) with an edge-aware front-end and a lightweight depth module. The frontend enhances event frames for robust feature tracking and nonlinear motion compensation, while the depth module provides coarse, region-of-interest (ROI)-based scene depth to improve motion compensation and scale consistency. Evaluations across public benchmarks and real-world unmanned air vehicle (UAV) flights demonstrate that performance varies significantly by scenario. For instance, event-only methods like point-line event-based visual-inertial odometry (PL-EVIO) or learning-based pipelines such as deep event-based visual odometry (DEVO) excel in highly aggressive or extreme HDR conditions. In contrast, Edged USLAM provides superior stability and minimal drift in slow or structured trajectories, ensuring consistently accurate localization on real flights under challenging illumination. These findings highlight the complementary strengths of event-only, learning-based, and hybrid approaches, while positioning Edged USLAM as a robust solution for diverse aerial navigation tasks.
tldr: Edged USLAM is a hybrid event-based visual-inertial SLAM system that uses edge-aware feature tracking and a learning-based depth module to improve robustness and accuracy in aerial navigation, especially in challenging illumination.
tldr_zh: Edged USLAM是一个混合的基于事件的视觉惯性SLAM系统，它利用边缘感知的特征跟踪和基于学习的深度模块来提高空中导航的鲁棒性和准确性，特别是在具有挑战性的光照条件下。
summary_zh: 传统视觉同步定位与地图构建（SLAM）算法常常因运动模糊和有限的动态范围而在快速运动、低照度或突发光照变化下失效。事件相机凭借高时间分辨率和高动态范围（HDR）缓解了这些问题，但其稀疏、异步的输出使得特征提取和与其他传感器的集成变得复杂；例如，惯性测量单元（IMUs）和标准相机。我们提出了 Edged USLAM，一种混合视觉惯性系统，它通过边缘感知的前端和轻量级深度模块扩展了 Ultimate SLAM (USLAM)。前端增强了事件帧，以实现稳健的特征跟踪和非线性运动补偿，而深度模块提供了粗略的、基于感兴趣区域（ROI）的场景深度，从而改善运动补偿和尺度一致性。在公开基准测试和真实无人机（UAV）飞行中的评估表明，性能因场景而异。例如，像基于点线事件的视觉惯性里程计（PL-EVIO）这样的纯事件方法或像深度事件视觉里程计（DEVO）这样的基于学习的流水线在高度激进或极端HDR条件下表现出色。相比之下，Edged USLAM在缓慢或结构化轨迹中提供了卓越的稳定性和最小的漂移，确保在具有挑战性的照明条件下真实飞行中始终如一的精确定位。这些发现突出了纯事件、基于学习和混合方法的互补优势，同时将Edged USLAM定位为适用于各种航空导航任务的强大解决方案。

title: POIROT: Investigating Direct Tangible vs. Digitally Mediated Interaction and Attitude Moderation in Multi-party Murder Mystery Games
summary: As social robots take on increasingly complex roles like game masters (GMs) in multi-party games, the expectation that physicality universally enhances user experience remains debated. This study challenges the "one-size-fits-all" view of tangible interaction by identifying a critical boundary condition: users' Negative Attitudes towards Robots (NARS). In a between-subjects experiment (N = 67), a custom-built robot GM facilitated a multi-party murder mystery game (MMG) by delivering clues either through direct tangible interaction or a digitally mediated interface. Baseline multivariate analysis (MANOVA) showed no significant main effect of delivery modality, confirming that tangibility alone does not guarantee superior engagement. However, primary analysis using multilevel linear models (MLM) revealed a reliable moderation: participants high in NARS experienced markedly lower narrative immersion under tangible delivery, whereas those with low NARS scores showed no such decrement. Qualitative findings further illuminate this divergence: tangibility provides novelty and engagement for some but imposes excessive proxemic friction for anxious users, for whom the digital interface acts as a protective social buffer. These results advance a conditional model of HRI and emphasize the necessity for adaptive systems that can tailor interaction modalities to user predispositions.
tldr: This paper investigates how tangible vs. digitally mediated interaction with a robot game master affects user experience in a multi-party murder mystery game, finding that Negative Attitudes towards Robots (NARS) moderates the effect of tangibility on narrative immersion.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了多方谋杀之谜游戏中，机器人游戏主持人的有形互动与数字中介互动如何影响用户体验，发现对机器人的负面态度（NARS）调节了有形性对叙事沉浸感的影响。
summary_zh: 随着社交机器人承担日益复杂的角色，如多方游戏中的游戏主持人(GM)，普遍认为物理性能够提升用户体验的观点仍存在争议。本研究通过识别一个关键的边界条件：用户对机器人的负面态度(NARS)，来挑战有形交互的“一刀切”观点。在一个被试间实验(N = 67)中，一个定制的机器人GM通过直接有形交互或数字中介界面来传递线索，主持了一个多方谋杀解谜游戏(MMG)。基线多元方差分析(MANOVA)显示传递方式没有显著的主效应，证实了有形性本身并不能保证更优越的参与度。然而，使用多层线性模型(MLM)的主要分析揭示了一个可靠的调节作用：NARS得分高的参与者在有形传递下体验到显著降低的叙事沉浸感，而NARS得分低的参与者则没有表现出这种下降。定性研究结果进一步阐明了这种差异：有形性为某些人提供了新颖性和参与度，但对焦虑的用户施加了过度的空间接近摩擦，对于他们来说，数字界面充当了一个保护性的社交缓冲区。这些结果推进了一个人机交互的条件模型，并强调了自适应系统根据用户倾向定制交互方式的必要性。

title: Unified Structural-Hydrodynamic Modeling of Underwater Underactuated Mechanisms and Soft Robots
summary: Underwater robots are widely deployed for ocean exploration and manipulation. Underactuated mechanisms are particularly advantageous in aquatic environments, as reducing actuator count lowers the risk of motor leakage while introducing inherent mechanical compliance. However, accurate modeling of underwater underactuated and soft robotic systems remains challenging because it requires identifying a high-dimensional set of internal structural and external hydrodynamic parameters. In this work, we propose a trajectory-driven global optimization framework for unified structural-hydrodynamic modeling of underwater multibody systems. Inspired by the Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES), the proposed approach simultaneously identifies coupled internal elastic, damping, and distributed hydrodynamic parameters through trajectory-level matching between simulation and experimental motion. This enables high-fidelity reproduction of both underactuated mechanisms and compliant soft robotic systems in underwater environments. We first validate the framework on a link-by-link underactuated multibody mechanism, demonstrating accurate identification of distributed hydrodynamic coefficients, with a normalized end effector position error below 5% across multiple trajectories, varying initial conditions, and both active-passive and fully passive configurations. The identified modeling strategy is then transferred to a single octopus-inspired soft arm, showing strong real-to-sim consistency without manual retuning. Finally, eight identified arms are assembled into a swimming octopus robot, where the unified parameter set enables realistic whole body behavior without additional parameter calibration. These results demonstrate the scalability and transferability of the proposed structural-hydrodynamic modeling framework across underwater underactuated and soft robotic systems.
tldr: This paper presents a trajectory-driven optimization framework for unified structural-hydrodynamic modeling of underwater underactuated and soft robots, demonstrating accurate simulation transfer across different robotic systems without manual retuning. Their method uses CMA-ES to identify structural and hydrodynamic parameters.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种轨迹驱动的优化框架，用于水下欠驱动和软体机器人的统一结构-流体动力学建模，展示了不同机器人系统之间精确的仿真迁移，无需手动调整。该方法使用 CMA-ES 来识别结构和流体动力学参数。
summary_zh: 水下机器人在海洋探索和操控中得到广泛应用。欠驱动机构在水生环境中尤其具有优势，因为减少执行器的数量降低了电机泄漏的风险，同时引入了固有的机械柔顺性。然而，水下欠驱动和软体机器人系统的精确建模仍然具有挑战性，因为它需要识别高维度的内部结构和外部流体动力学参数集合。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种 trajectory-driven 的全局优化框架，用于水下多体系统的统一结构-流体动力学建模。受协方差矩阵自适应进化策略 (CMA-ES) 的启发，所提出的方法通过模拟和实验运动之间的轨迹级别匹配，同时识别耦合的内部弹性、阻尼和分布式流体动力学参数。这使得能够在水下环境中高保真地再现欠驱动机构和顺应性软体机器人系统。我们首先在一个逐环节欠驱动多体机构上验证了该框架，证明了分布式流体动力学系数的精确识别，在多个轨迹、不同的初始条件以及主动-被动和完全被动配置下，归一化的末端执行器位置误差低于 5%。然后，将已识别的建模策略迁移到单个受章鱼启发的软臂上，显示出强大的真实-模拟一致性，无需手动重新调整。最后，将八个已识别的软臂组装成一个游泳章鱼机器人，其中统一的参数集可以实现逼真的全身行为，而无需额外的参数校准。这些结果证明了所提出的结构-流体动力学建模框架在水下欠驱动和软体机器人系统中的可扩展性和可转移性。

title: A Robust Antenna Provides Tactile Feedback in a Multi-legged Robot
summary: Multi-legged elongate robots hold promise for maneuvering through complex environments. Prior work has demonstrated that reliable locomotion can be achieved using open-loop body undulation and foot placement on rugose terrain. However, robust navigation through confined spaces remains challenging when body-environment contact is extensive and terrain rheology varies rapidly. To address this challenge, we develop a pair of tactile antennae for multi-legged robots that enable real-time sensing of surrounding geometry, modeling the morphology and function of biological centipede antennae. Each antenna features gradient compliance, with a stiff base and soft tip, allowing repeated deformation and elastic recovery. Robophysical experiments reveal a relationship between continuous antenna curvature and contact force, leading to a simplified mapping from antenna deformation to inferred discrete collision states. We incorporate this mapping into a controller that selects among a set of locomotor maneuvers based on the inferred collision state. Experiments in obstacle-rich and confined environments demonstrate that tactile feedback enables reliable steering and allows the robot to recover from near-stuck conditions without requiring global environmental information or real-time vision. These results highlight how mechanically tuned tactile appendages can simplify sensing and enhance autonomy in elongate multi-legged robots operating in constrained spaces.
tldr: This paper presents a tactile antenna system for multi-legged robots, enabling robust navigation in complex and confined environments through collision detection and maneuver selection without relying on global information or real-time vision.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于多足机器人的触觉触须系统，通过碰撞检测和动作选择，实现了在复杂和狭窄环境中稳健的导航，而无需依赖全局信息或实时视觉。
