summary_zh: 多足细长机器人有望在复杂环境中进行机动。先前的研究表明，利用开环身体波动和在粗糙地形上的足部放置可以实现可靠的运动。然而，当身体与环境接触广泛且地形流变学快速变化时，在狭窄空间中进行稳健导航仍然具有挑战性。为了应对这一挑战，我们为多足机器人开发了一对触觉触角，该触角能够实时感知周围的几何形状，模拟生物蜈蚣触角的形态和功能。每个触角都具有梯度顺应性，即坚硬的基部和柔软的尖端，允许重复的变形和弹性恢复。物理机器人实验揭示了连续天线曲率和接触力之间的关系，从而简化了从天线变形到推断的离散碰撞状态的映射。我们将此映射集成到一个控制器中，该控制器根据推断的碰撞状态在一组运动动作之间进行选择。在障碍物丰富且受限的环境中进行的实验表明，触觉反馈能够实现可靠的转向，并允许机器人在不需要全局环境信息或实时视觉的情况下从近乎卡住的状态中恢复。这些结果突出了机械调谐的触觉附肢如何简化感知并增强在受限空间中运行的细长多足机器人的自主性。

title: Oracle-Guided Soft Shielding for Safe Move Prediction in Chess
summary: In high stakes environments, agents relying purely on imitation learning or reinforcement learning often struggle to avoid safety-critical errors during exploration. Existing reinforcement learning approaches for environments such as chess require hundreds of thousands of episodes and substantial computational resources to converge. Imitation learning, on the other hand, is more sample efficient but is brittle under distributional shift and lacks mechanisms for proactive risk avoidance. In this work, we propose Oracle-Guided Soft Shielding (OGSS), a simple yet effective framework for safer decision-making, enabling safe exploration by learning a probabilistic safety model from oracle feedback in an imitation learning setting. Focusing on the domain of chess, we train a model to predict strong moves based on past games, and separately learn a blunder prediction model from Stockfish evaluations to estimate the tactical risk of each move. During inference, the agent first generates a set of candidate moves and then uses the blunder model to determine high-risk options, and uses a utility function combining the predicted move likelihood from the policy model and the blunder probability to select actions that strike a balance between performance and safety. This enables the agent to explore and play competitively while significantly reducing the chance of tactical mistakes. Across hundreds of games against a strong chess engine, we compare our approach with other methods in the literature, such as action pruning, SafeDAgger, and uncertainty-based sampling. Our results demonstrate that OGSS variants maintain a lower blunder rate even as the agent's exploration ratio is increased by several folds, highlighting its ability to support broader exploration without compromising tactical soundness.
tldr: The paper introduces Oracle-Guided Soft Shielding (OGSS), a framework for safer decision-making in reinforcement learning using imitation learning with oracle feedback for tactical risk avoidance, evaluated in chess.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Oracle-Guided Soft Shielding (OGSS)，一个使用模仿学习和oracle反馈的强化学习框架，用于更安全地决策，避免战术风险，并在国际象棋中进行了评估。
summary_zh: 在高风险环境中，纯粹依赖模仿学习或强化学习的智能体往往难以避免探索过程中出现的安全关键错误。现有的强化学习方法，例如在国际象棋环境中，需要数十万个episode以及大量的计算资源才能收敛。另一方面，模仿学习虽然样本效率更高，但在分布偏移的情况下变得脆弱，并且缺乏主动风险规避机制。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为“Oracle指导的软屏蔽”（OGSS）的简单而有效的框架，用于更安全的决策，通过在模仿学习环境中从oracle反馈中学习概率安全模型来实现安全探索。我们专注于国际象棋领域，训练一个模型来预测基于过往对局的强力走法，并分别从Stockfish评估中学习一个低级错误预测模型，以估计每步棋的战术风险。在推理过程中，智能体首先生成一组候选走法，然后使用低级错误模型来确定高风险选项，并使用一个效用函数，该效用函数结合了策略模型预测的走法可能性和低级错误概率，以选择在性能和安全性之间取得平衡的行动。这使得智能体能够在探索和具有竞争力的棋步的同时，显著降低战术失误的几率。在与强大的国际象棋引擎进行的数百局对弈中，我们将我们的方法与文献中的其他方法进行了比较，例如行动剪枝、SafeDAgger和基于不确定性的采样。我们的结果表明，即使智能体的探索率提高了几倍，OGSS变体仍然保持较低的低级错误率，突显了其支持更广泛探索而又不损害战术合理性的能力。

title: SplitAgent: A Privacy-Preserving Distributed Architecture for Enterprise-Cloud Agent Collaboration
summary: Enterprise adoption of cloud-based AI agents faces a fundamental privacy dilemma: leveraging powerful cloud models requires sharing sensitive data, while local processing limits capability. Current agent frameworks like MCP and A2A assume complete data sharing, making them unsuitable for enterprise environments with confidential information. We present SplitAgent, a novel distributed architecture that enables privacy-preserving collaboration between enterprise-side privacy agents and cloud-side reasoning agents. Our key innovation is context-aware dynamic sanitization that adapts privacy protection based on task semantics -- contract review requires different sanitization than code review or financial analysis. SplitAgent extends existing agent protocols with differential privacy guarantees, zero-knowledge tool verification, and privacy budget management. Through comprehensive experiments on enterprise scenarios, we demonstrate that SplitAgent achieves 83.8\% task accuracy while maintaining 90.1\% privacy protection, significantly outperforming static approaches (73.2\% accuracy, 79.7\% privacy). Context-aware sanitization improves task utility by 24.1\% over static methods while reducing privacy leakage by 67\%. Our architecture provides a practical path for enterprise AI adoption without compromising sensitive data.
tldr: SplitAgent is a novel distributed architecture that enables privacy-preserving collaboration between enterprise-side privacy agents and cloud-side reasoning agents using context-aware dynamic sanitization, achieving significant improvements in both task accuracy and privacy protection compared to static approaches.
tldr_zh: SplitAgent 是一种新颖的分布式架构，它通过上下文感知的动态清理，实现了企业端隐私代理和云端推理代理之间隐私保护的协作，与静态方法相比，在任务准确性和隐私保护方面都取得了显著的改进。
summary_zh: 企业采用基于云的人工智能代理面临着一个根本性的隐私困境：一方面，利用强大的云模型需要共享敏感数据；另一方面，本地处理又限制了能力。现有的代理框架，如MCP和A2A，都假设完整的数据共享，使得它们不适用于具有保密信息的企业环境。我们提出了SplitAgent，一种新型的分布式架构，它能够实现企业侧隐私代理和云侧推理代理之间的隐私保护协作。我们的关键创新是上下文感知的动态清洗，该清洗根据任务语义调整隐私保护——合同审查需要与代码审查或财务分析不同的清洗方式。SplitAgent通过差分隐私保证、零知识工具验证和隐私预算管理来扩展现有的代理协议。通过在企业场景中进行全面的实验，我们证明SplitAgent在保持90.1%隐私保护的同时，实现了83.8%的任务准确率，显著优于静态方法（73.2%准确率，79.7%隐私）。上下文感知的清洗比静态方法提高了24.1%的任务效用，同时减少了67%的隐私泄露。我们的架构为企业采用人工智能提供了一条切实可行的途径，而无需损害敏感数据。

title: Alignment-Aware and Reliability-Gated Multimodal Fusion for Unmanned Aerial Vehicle Detection Across Heterogeneous Thermal-Visual Sensors
summary: Reliable unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) detection is critical for autonomous airspace monitoring but remains challenging when integrating sensor streams that differ substantially in resolution, perspective, and field of view. Conventional fusion methods-such as wavelet-, Laplacian-, and decision-level approaches-often fail to preserve spatial correspondence across modalities and suffer from annotation of inconsistencies, limiting their robustness in real-world settings. This study introduces two fusion strategies, Registration-aware Guided Image Fusion (RGIF) and Reliability-Gated Modality-Attention Fusion (RGMAF), designed to overcome these limitations. RGIF employs Enhanced Correlation Coefficient (ECC)-based affine registration combined with guided filtering to maintain thermal saliency while enhancing structural detail. RGMAF integrates affine and optical-flow registration with a reliability-weighted attention mechanism that adaptively balances thermal contrast and visual sharpness. Experiments were conducted on the Multi-Sensor and Multi-View Fixed-Wing (MMFW)-UAV dataset comprising 147,417 annotated air-to-air frames collected from infrared, wide-angle, and zoom sensors. Among single-modality detectors, YOLOv10x demonstrated the most stable cross-domain performance and was selected as the detection backbone for evaluating fused imagery. RGIF improved the visual baseline by 2.13% mAP@50 (achieving 97.65%), while RGMAF attained the highest recall of 98.64%. These findings show that registration-aware and reliability-adaptive fusion provides a robust framework for integrating heterogeneous modalities, substantially enhancing UAV detection performance in multimodal environments.
tldr: This paper introduces two registration-aware and reliability-gated multimodal fusion methods (RGIF and RGMAF) for improved UAV detection using thermal and visual sensors, demonstrating performance gains on a new multi-sensor dataset.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了两种用于改进无人机检测的注册导向和可靠性门控多模态融合方法（RGIF和RGMAF），利用热感和视觉传感器，并在一个新的多传感器数据集上展示了性能提升。
summary_zh: 可靠的无人机 (UAV) 检测对于自主空域监控至关重要，但当集成在分辨率、视角和视场方面存在显著差异的传感器流时，仍然面临挑战。传统的融合方法——如小波、拉普拉斯和决策级方法——常常无法保持跨模态的空间对应关系，并且容易受到不一致标注的影响，从而限制了它们在真实环境中的鲁棒性。本研究提出了两种融合策略，即注册感知引导图像融合 (RGIF) 和可靠性门控模态注意力融合 (RGMAF)，旨在克服这些局限性。RGIF 采用基于增强相关系数 (ECC) 的仿射注册，结合引导滤波来保持热显著性，同时增强结构细节。RGMAF 将仿射和光流注册与可靠性加权注意力机制相结合，自适应地平衡热对比度和视觉清晰度。实验是在多传感器多视角固定翼 (MMFW)-UAV 数据集上进行的，该数据集包含从红外、广角和变焦传感器收集的 147,417 个带注释的空对空帧。在单模态检测器中，YOLOv10x 表现出最稳定的跨域性能，并被选为评估融合图像的检测骨干网络。RGIF 将视觉基线提高了 2.13% mAP@50 (达到 97.65%)，而 RGMAF 获得了最高的召回率 98.64%。这些结果表明，注册感知和可靠性自适应融合为集成异构模态提供了一个稳健的框架，从而显著提高了多模态环境中的无人机检测性能。

title: Not Like Transformers: Drop the Beat Representation for Dance Generation with Mamba-Based Diffusion Model
summary: Dance is a form of human motion characterized by emotional expression and communication, playing a role in various fields such as music, virtual reality, and content creation. Existing methods for dance generation often fail to adequately capture the inherently sequential, rhythmical, and music-synchronized characteristics of dance. In this paper, we propose \emph{MambaDance}, a new dance generation approach that leverages a Mamba-based diffusion model. Mamba, well-suited to handling long and autoregressive sequences, is integrated into our two-stage diffusion architecture, substituting off-the-shelf Transformer. Additionally, considering the critical role of musical beats in dance choreography, we propose a Gaussian-based beat representation to explicitly guide the decoding of dance sequences. Experiments on AIST++ and FineDance datasets for each sequence length show that our proposed method effectively generates plausible dance movements while reflecting essential characteristics, consistently from short to long dances, compared to the previous methods. Additional qualitative results and demo videos are available at \small{https://vision3d-lab.github.io/mambadance}.
tldr: The paper introduces MambaDance, a Mamba-based diffusion model for dance generation that incorporates a Gaussian-based beat representation to improve the rhythmical accuracy and music synchronization of generated dance sequences.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MambaDance，一种基于Mamba的扩散模型，用于舞蹈生成，它结合了基于高斯的节拍表示，以提高生成舞蹈序列的节奏准确性和音乐同步性。
summary_zh: 舞蹈是一种以情感表达和交流为特征的人类运动形式，在音乐、虚拟现实和内容创作等领域发挥着重要作用。现有的舞蹈生成方法通常无法充分捕捉舞蹈固有的序列性、节奏性和音乐同步性特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的舞蹈生成方法\emph{MambaDance}，该方法利用了基于Mamba的扩散模型。Mamba非常适合处理长序列和自回归序列，被集成到我们的两阶段扩散架构中，取代了现成的Transformer。此外，考虑到音乐节拍在舞蹈编排中的关键作用，我们提出了一种基于高斯分布的节拍表示，以显式地指导舞蹈序列的解码。在AIST++和FineDance数据集上，针对每个序列长度的实验表明，与先前的方法相比，我们提出的方法能够有效地生成合理的舞蹈动作，同时从短舞蹈到长舞蹈始终如一地反映舞蹈的基本特征。更多的定性结果和演示视频可在\small{https://vision3d-lab.github.io/mambadance}上获取。

title: A Lightweight Traffic Map for Efficient Anytime LaCAM*
summary: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) aims to compute collision-free paths for multiple agents and has a wide range of practical applications. LaCAM*, an anytime configuration-based solver, currently represents the state of the art. Recent work has explored the use of guidance paths to steer LaCAM* toward configurations that avoid traffic congestion, thereby improving solution quality. However, existing approaches rely on Frank-Wolfe-style optimization that repeatedly invokes single-agent search before executing LaCAM*, resulting in substantial computational overhead for large-scale problems. Moreover, the guidance path is static and primarily beneficial for finding the first solution in LaCAM*. To address these limitations, we propose a new approach that leverages LaCAM*'s ability to construct a dynamic, lightweight traffic map during its search. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves higher solution quality than state-of-the-art guidance-path approaches across two MAPF variants.
tldr: This paper introduces a lightweight traffic map integrated into the LaCAM* algorithm for Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF), aiming to improve solution quality and reduce computational overhead compared to existing guidance-path approaches, especially for large-scale problems.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种轻量级的交通地图，集成到LaCAM*算法中，用于多智能体路径规划（MAPF），旨在提高解决方案质量，并降低计算开销，特别是对于大规模问题，相比于现有的引导路径方法。
summary_zh: 多智能体路径规划 (MAPF) 旨在为多个智能体计算无碰撞路径，并具有广泛的实际应用。LaCAM* 作为一种基于配置的随时求解器，目前代表了最先进的技术水平。最近的工作探索了利用引导路径来引导 LaCAM* 避开交通拥堵的配置，从而提高解决方案的质量。然而，现有方法依赖于 Frank-Wolfe 式优化，在执行 LaCAM* 之前重复调用单智能体搜索，导致大规模问题出现巨大的计算开销。此外，引导路径是静态的，主要有益于在 LaCAM* 中寻找首个解决方案。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种新方法，该方法利用 LaCAM* 在搜索过程中构建动态、轻量级交通图的能力。实验结果表明，我们的方法在两种 MAPF 变体中均实现了比最先进的引导路径方法更高的解决方案质量。

title: Talking Together: Synthesizing Co-Located 3D Conversations from Audio
summary: We tackle the challenging task of generating complete 3D facial animations for two interacting, co-located participants from a mixed audio stream. While existing methods often produce disembodied "talking heads" akin to a video conference call, our work is the first to explicitly model the dynamic 3D spatial relationship -- including relative position, orientation, and mutual gaze -- that is crucial for realistic in-person dialogues. Our system synthesizes the full performance of both individuals, including precise lip-sync, and uniquely allows their relative head poses to be controlled via textual descriptions. To achieve this, we propose a dual-stream architecture where each stream is responsible for one participant's output. We employ speaker's role embeddings and inter-speaker cross-attention mechanisms designed to disentangle the mixed audio and model the interaction. Furthermore, we introduce a novel eye gaze loss to promote natural, mutual eye contact. To power our data-hungry approach, we introduce a novel pipeline to curate a large-scale conversational dataset consisting of over 2 million dyadic pairs from in-the-wild videos. Our method generates fluid, controllable, and spatially aware dyadic animations suitable for immersive applications in VR and telepresence, significantly outperforming existing baselines in perceived realism and interaction coherence.
tldr: This paper introduces a method for generating realistic 3D facial animations of two people in conversation from a mixed audio stream, explicitly modeling their spatial relationship and gaze. They also introduce a new dataset for this task.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种方法，用于从混合音频流中生成逼真的双人对话3D面部动画，并明确地模拟了他们的空间关系和视线。他们还为此任务引入了一个新的数据集。
summary_zh: 我们致力于解决一项富有挑战性的任务：从混合音频流中生成两个交互、共处参与者的完整3D面部动画。 现有方法往往生成类似视频会议通话中脱离身体的“说话头”， 而我们的工作是首次显式地对动态的3D空间关系进行建模，包括相对位置、方向和相互注视，这些对于逼真的人际对话至关重要。 我们的系统合成了个人的完整表演，包括精确的唇形同步，并且独特地允许通过文本描述控制他们的相对头部姿势。 为实现此目标，我们提出了一种双流架构，其中每个流负责一个参与者的输出。 我们采用说话者角色嵌入和说话者间的交叉注意力机制，旨在解耦混合音频并对交互进行建模。 此外，我们引入了一种新颖的视线损失，以促进自然、相互的眼神交流。 为了支持我们这种数据密集型方法，我们引入了一种新颖的流程，以整理一个大规模的对话数据集，该数据集包含来自现实视频的超过200万个二元对。 我们的方法生成流畅、可控且具有空间感知能力的二元动画，适用于VR和远程呈现中的沉浸式应用，在感知真实性和交互连贯性方面显著优于现有基线。

title: mmGAT: Pose Estimation by Graph Attention with Mutual Features from mmWave Radar Point Cloud
summary: Pose estimation and human action recognition (HAR) are pivotal technologies spanning various domains. While the image-based pose estimation and HAR are widely admired for their superior performance, they lack in privacy protection and suboptimal performance in low-light and dark environments. This paper exploits the capabilities of millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar technology for human pose estimation by processing radar data with Graph Neural Network (GNN) architecture, coupled with the attention mechanism. Our goal is to capture the finer details of the radar point cloud to improve the pose estimation performance. To this end, we present a unique feature extraction technique that exploits the full potential of the GNN processing method for pose estimation. Our model mmGAT demonstrates remarkable performance on two publicly available benchmark mmWave datasets and establishes new state of the art results in most scenarios in terms of human pose estimation. Our approach achieves a noteworthy reduction of pose estimation mean per joint position error (MPJPE) by 35.6% and PA-MPJPE by 14.1% from the current state of the art benchmark within this domain.
tldr: The paper introduces mmGAT, a GNN-based pose estimation model utilizing mmWave radar point clouds with an attention mechanism, achieving state-of-the-art results on public datasets with significant error reduction compared to previous methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了mmGAT，一种基于GNN的姿态估计模型，它利用毫米波雷达点云并结合注意力机制，在公共数据集上取得了最先进的结果，与之前的方法相比，显著降低了误差。
summary_zh: 姿态估计和人体行为识别（HAR）是横跨多个领域的关键技术。虽然基于图像的姿态估计和HAR因其卓越的性能而广受赞誉，但它们在隐私保护方面存在不足，并且在弱光和黑暗环境中性能欠佳。本文利用毫米波（mmWave）雷达技术的能力，通过使用图神经网络（GNN）架构处理雷达数据，并结合注意力机制，进行人体姿态估计。我们的目标是捕获雷达点云的更精细细节，以提高姿态估计的性能。为此，我们提出了一种独特的特征提取技术，该技术充分利用GNN处理方法在姿态估计方面的潜力。我们的模型mmGAT在两个公开的基准毫米波数据集上表现出卓越的性能，并在人体姿态估计的大多数场景中建立了新的最先进的结果。我们的方法实现了显著的姿态估计平均关节位置误差（MPJPE）降低35.6%，并且PA-MPJPE降低14.1%，相对于该领域当前最先进的基准。

title: PCFEx: Point Cloud Feature Extraction for Graph Neural Networks
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have gained significant attention for their effectiveness across various domains. This study focuses on applying GNN to process 3D point cloud data for human pose estimation (HPE) and human activity recognition (HAR). We propose novel point cloud feature extraction (PCFEx) techniques to capture meaningful information at the point, edge, and graph levels of the point cloud by considering point cloud as a graph. Moreover, we introduce a GNN architecture designed to efficiently process these features. Our approach is evaluated on four most popular publicly available millimeter wave radar datasets, three for HPE and one for HAR. The results show substantial improvements, with significantly reduced errors in all three HPE benchmarks, and an overall accuracy of 98.8% in mmWave-based HAR, outperforming the existing state of the art models. This work demonstrates the great potential of feature extraction incorporated with GNN modeling approach to enhance the precision of point cloud processing.
tldr: The paper introduces a novel point cloud feature extraction (PCFEx) technique for GNNs applied to 3D point cloud data, achieving state-of-the-art results on human pose estimation and activity recognition using millimeter wave radar data.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新颖的点云特征提取 (PCFEx) 技术，用于将 GNN 应用于 3D 点云数据，并在使用毫米波雷达数据的人体姿势估计和活动识别方面取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 图神经网络(GNNs)因其在各个领域的有效性而备受关注。本研究侧重于应用 GNN 处理 3D 点云数据，用于人体姿态估计 (HPE) 和人体活动识别 (HAR)。我们提出了新颖的点云特征提取 (PCFEx) 技术，通过将点云视为图，以捕获点云的点、边和图层级的有意义信息。此外，我们引入了一种旨在高效处理这些特征的 GNN 架构。我们的方法在四个最流行的公开毫米波雷达数据集上进行了评估，其中三个用于 HPE，一个用于 HAR。结果表明，在所有三个 HPE 基准测试中误差均显著降低，毫米波 HAR 的总体准确率达到 98.8%，优于现有的最优模型，性能得到了大幅提升。这项工作展示了结合 GNN 建模方法的特征提取在提高点云处理精度方面的巨大潜力。

title: HDR-NSFF: High Dynamic Range Neural Scene Flow Fields
summary: Radiance of real-world scenes typically spans a much wider dynamic range than what standard cameras can capture. While conventional HDR methods merge alternating-exposure frames, these approaches are inherently constrained to 2D pixel-level alignment, often leading to ghosting artifacts and temporal inconsistency in dynamic scenes. To address these limitations, we present HDR-NSFF, a paradigm shift from 2D-based merging to 4D spatio-temporal modeling. Our framework reconstructs dynamic HDR radiance fields from alternating-exposure monocular videos by representing the scene as a continuous function of space and time, and is compatible with both neural radiance field and 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) based dynamic representations. This unified end-to-end pipeline explicitly models HDR radiance, 3D scene flow, geometry, and tone-mapping, ensuring physical plausibility and global coherence. We further enhance robustness by (i) extending semantic-based optical flow with DINO features to achieve exposure-invariant motion estimation, and (ii) incorporating a generative prior as a regularizer to compensate for limited observation in monocular captures and saturation-induced information loss. To evaluate HDR space-time view synthesis, we present the first real-world HDR-GoPro dataset specifically designed for dynamic HDR scenes. Experiments demonstrate that HDR-NSFF recovers fine radiance details and coherent dynamics even under challenging exposure variations, thereby achieving state-of-the-art performance in novel space-time view synthesis. Project page: https://shin-dong-yeon.github.io/HDR-NSFF/
tldr: HDR-NSFF introduces a novel approach for reconstructing dynamic HDR radiance fields from monocular videos using a 4D spatio-temporal model, achieving state-of-the-art results in novel space-time view synthesis.
tldr_zh: HDR-NSFF 提出了一种新颖的方法，使用 4D 时空模型从单目视频重建动态 HDR 辐射场，并在新颖的时空视图合成中取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 真实世界场景的辐射率通常跨越远超标准相机所能捕捉的动态范围。虽然传统的HDR方法会融合交替曝光的帧，但这些方法本质上受限于2D像素级别的对齐，经常导致动态场景中的伪影和时间不一致性。为了解决这些限制，我们提出HDR-NSFF，一种从基于2D融合到4D时空建模的范式转变。我们的框架通过将场景表示为空间和时间的连续函数，从交替曝光的单目视频中重建动态HDR辐射场，并且兼容基于神经辐射场和基于4D高斯溅射（4DGS）的动态表示。这种统一的端到端流程显式地建模HDR辐射率、3D场景流、几何体和色调映射，确保物理上的合理性和全局一致性。我们通过以下方式进一步增强鲁棒性：（i）使用DINO特征扩展基于语义的光流，以实现曝光不变的运动估计，以及（ii）结合生成先验作为正则化项，以补偿单目捕获中的有限观测以及饱和引起的信息损失。为了评估HDR时空视图合成，我们提出了第一个专门为动态HDR场景设计的真实世界HDR-GoPro数据集。实验表明，HDR-NSFF即使在具有挑战性的曝光变化下，也能恢复精细的辐射率细节和连贯的动态，从而在新的时空视图合成中实现最先进的性能。项目主页：https://shin-dong-yeon.github.io/HDR-NSFF/

title: MV-Fashion: Towards Enabling Virtual Try-On and Size Estimation with Multi-View Paired Data
summary: Existing 4D human datasets fall short for fashion-specific research, lacking either realistic garment dynamics or task-specific annotations. Synthetic datasets suffer from a realism gap, whereas real-world captures lack the detailed annotations and paired data required for virtual try-on (VTON) and size estimation tasks. To bridge this gap, we introduce MV-Fashion, a large-scale, multi-view video dataset engineered for domain-specific fashion analysis. MV-Fashion features 3,273 sequences (72.5 million frames) from 80 diverse subjects wearing 3-10 outfits each. It is designed to capture complex, real-world garment dynamics, including multiple layers and varied styling (e.g. rolled sleeves, tucked shirt). A core contribution is a rich data representation that includes pixel-level semantic annotations, ground-truth material properties like elasticity, and 3D point clouds. Crucially for VTON applications, MV-Fashion provides paired data: multi-view synchronized captures of worn garments alongside their corresponding flat, catalogue images. We leverage this dataset to establish baselines for fashion-centric tasks, including virtual try-on, clothing size estimation, and novel view synthesis. The dataset is available at https://hunorlaczko.github.io/MV-Fashion .
tldr: The paper introduces MV-Fashion, a large-scale multi-view video dataset with rich annotations, including paired worn and flat garment images, designed for virtual try-on, size estimation, and novel view synthesis of clothing.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MV-Fashion，一个大规模多视角视频数据集，具有丰富的注释，包括穿着和平面服装图像的配对，专为虚拟试穿、尺寸估计和服装的新视角合成而设计。
summary_zh: 现有的4D人体数据集在针对时尚的特定研究方面存在不足，要么缺乏真实的服装动态效果，要么缺乏特定任务的标注。合成数据集存在真实性差距，而真实世界捕获的数据则缺乏虚拟试穿（VTON）和尺码估计任务所需的详细标注和配对数据。为了弥合这一差距，我们推出了 MV-Fashion，这是一个大规模的多视角视频数据集，专为特定领域的时尚分析而设计。MV-Fashion包含来自80个不同受试者的3273个序列（7250万帧），每个受试者穿着3-10套服装。它的设计目的是捕捉复杂的、真实的服装动态效果，包括多层服装和各种风格（例如卷起的袖子、塞进衬衫）。一个核心贡献是丰富的数据表示，包括像素级语义标注、真实的材料属性（如弹性）以及3D点云。对于 VTON 应用至关重要的是，MV-Fashion 提供了配对数据：穿着服装的多视角同步捕获，以及它们对应的平面目录图像。我们利用该数据集为以时尚为中心的任务建立基准，包括虚拟试穿、服装尺码估计和新视角合成。该数据集可在 https://hunorlaczko.github.io/MV-Fashion 上获取。

title: Extend Your Horizon: A Device-Agnostic Surgical Tool Tracking Framework with Multi-View Optimization for Augmented Reality
summary: Surgical navigation provides real-time guidance by estimating the pose of patient anatomy and surgical instruments to visualize relevant intraoperative information. In conventional systems, instruments are typically tracked using fiducial markers and stationary optical tracking systems (OTS). Augmented reality (AR) has further enabled intuitive visualization and motivated tracking using sensors embedded in head-mounted displays (HMDs). However, most existing approaches rely on a clear line of sight, which is difficult to maintain in dynamic operating room environments due to frequent occlusions caused by equipment, surgical tools, and personnel. This work introduces a framework for tracking surgical instruments under occlusion by fusing multiple sensing modalities within a dynamic scene graph representation. The proposed approach integrates tracking systems with different accuracy levels and motion characteristics while estimating tracking reliability in real time. Experimental results demonstrate improved robustness and enhanced consistency of AR visualization in the presence of occlusions.
tldr: This paper presents a device-agnostic surgical tool tracking framework using multi-view optimization and a dynamic scene graph representation to improve AR visualization robustness in operating rooms, particularly under occlusions.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种设备无关的手术工具跟踪框架，该框架使用多视图优化和动态场景图表示，以提高手术室中增强现实可视化的鲁棒性，尤其是在遮挡情况下。
summary_zh: 手术导航通过估计患者解剖结构和手术器械的姿态来提供实时引导，以可视化相关的术中信息。在传统系统中，器械通常利用基准标记和静态光学跟踪系统（OTS）进行跟踪。增强现实（AR）进一步实现了直观的可视化，并推动了使用头戴式显示器（HMD）中嵌入的传感器进行跟踪。然而，大多数现有方法依赖于清晰的视线，这在动态的手术室环境中难以维持，因为设备、手术器械和人员会频繁造成遮挡。本研究介绍了一种通过融合动态场景图表示中的多种传感模态来跟踪遮挡下手​​术器械的框架。所提出的方法集成了具有不同精度级别和运动特性的跟踪系统，同时实时估计跟踪的可靠性。实验结果表明，在存在遮挡的情况下，增强了鲁棒性并提高了AR可视化的连贯性。

title: RLPR: Radar-to-LiDAR Place Recognition via Two-Stage Asymmetric Cross-Modal Alignment for Autonomous Driving
summary: All-weather autonomy is critical for autonomous driving, which necessitates reliable localization across diverse scenarios. While LiDAR place recognition is widely deployed for this task, its performance degrades in adverse weather. Conversely, radar-based methods, though weather-resilient, are hindered by the general unavailability of radar maps. To bridge this gap, radar-to-LiDAR place recognition, which localizes radar scans within existing LiDAR maps, has garnered increasing interest. However, extracting discriminative and generalizable features shared between modalities remains challenging, compounded by the scarcity of large-scale paired training data and the signal heterogeneity across radar types. In this work, we propose RLPR, a robust radar-to-LiDAR place recognition framework compatible with single-chip, scanning, and 4D radars. We first design a dual-stream network to extract structural features that abstract away from sensor-specific signal properties (e.g., Doppler or RCS). Subsequently, motivated by our task-specific asymmetry observation between radar and LiDAR, we introduce a two-stage asymmetric cross-modal alignment (TACMA) strategy, which leverages the pre-trained radar branch as a discriminative anchor to guide the alignment process. Experiments on four datasets demonstrate that RLPR achieves state-of-the-art recognition accuracy with strong zero-shot generalization capabilities.
tldr: The paper introduces RLPR, a novel radar-to-LiDAR place recognition framework using a two-stage asymmetric cross-modal alignment (TACMA) strategy, demonstrating strong performance and zero-shot generalization across various radar types and datasets. It addresses the challenge of all-weather autonomous driving by localizing radar scans within LiDAR maps in adverse conditions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了RLPR，一种新颖的雷达-激光雷达位置识别框架，它使用两阶段非对称跨模态对齐（TACMA）策略，在各种雷达类型和数据集上表现出强大的性能和零样本泛化能力。它通过在恶劣条件下将雷达扫描定位在激光雷达地图中，解决了全天候自动驾驶的挑战。
summary_zh: 全天候自主性对于自动驾驶至关重要，这需要跨多种场景的可靠定位。激光雷达地点识别已被广泛部署于此任务，但其性能在恶劣天气下会下降。相反，基于雷达的方法虽然具有耐候性，但受到雷达地图普遍不可用的限制。为了弥合这一差距，雷达到激光雷达的地点识别，即将雷达扫描定位到现有的激光雷达地图中，已经引起了越来越多的关注。然而，提取在模态之间共享的具有区分性和泛化性的特征仍然具有挑战性，并且由于大规模配对训练数据的稀缺以及不同雷达类型之间的信号异质性而变得更加复杂。在这项工作中，我们提出了 RLPR，一个鲁棒的雷达到激光雷达地点识别框架，兼容单芯片、扫描式和 4D 雷达。我们首先设计了一个双流网络来提取结构特征，这些结构特征可以抽象掉传感器特定的信号属性（例如，多普勒或 RCS）。 随后，受我们雷达和激光雷达之间任务特定的不对称性观察的启发，我们引入了一种两阶段不对称跨模态对齐 (TACMA) 策略，该策略利用预训练的雷达分支作为区分性锚点来指导对齐过程。在四个数据集上的实验表明，RLPR 实现了最先进的识别精度，并具有强大的零样本泛化能力。

title: Context-free Self-Conditioned GAN for Trajectory Forecasting
summary: In this paper, we present a context-free unsupervised approach based on a self-conditioned GAN to learn different modes from 2D trajectories. Our intuition is that each mode indicates a different behavioral moving pattern in the discriminator's feature space. We apply this approach to the problem of trajectory forecasting. We present three different training settings based on self-conditioned GAN, which produce better forecasters. We test our method in two data sets: human motion and road agents. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms previous context-free methods in the least representative supervised labels while performing well in the remaining labels. In addition, our approach outperforms globally in human motion, while performing well in road agents.
tldr: The paper introduces a context-free self-conditioned GAN for trajectory forecasting, showing improved performance compared to other context-free methods, especially in human motion datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于轨迹预测的无上下文自条件 GAN，与其它无上下文方法相比，该方法表现出更好的性能，特别是在人体运动数据集上。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于自条件GAN的无监督、无上下文方法，用于从2D轨迹中学习不同的模式。我们的直觉是，每种模式都指示着判别器特征空间中一种不同的行为运动模式。我们将此方法应用于轨迹预测问题。我们提出了三种基于自条件GAN的不同训练设置，从而产生更好的预测器。我们在两个数据集上测试了我们的方法：人体运动和道路交通参与者。实验结果表明，我们的方法在最不具代表性的监督标签上优于先前的无上下文方法，同时在剩余标签上表现良好。此外，我们的方法在人体运动方面整体表现优于其他方法，同时在道路交通参与者方面表现良好。

title: Sequential Service Region Design with Capacity-Constrained Investment and Spillover Effect
summary: Service region design determines the geographic coverage of service networks, shaping long-term operational performance. Capital and operational constraints preclude simultaneous large-scale deployment, requiring expansion to proceed sequentially. The resulting challenge is to determine when and where to invest under demand uncertainty, balancing intertemporal trade-offs between early and delayed investment and accounting for network effects whereby each deployment reshapes future demand through inter-regional connectivity. This study addresses a sequential service region design (SSRD) problem incorporating two practical yet underexplored factors: a $k$-region constraint that limits the number of regions investable per period and a stochastic spillover effect linking investment decisions to demand evolution. The resulting problem requires sequencing regional portfolios under uncertainty, leading to a combinatorial explosion in feasible investment sequences. To address this challenge, we propose a solution framework that integrates real options analysis (ROA) with a Transformer-based Proximal Policy Optimization (TPPO) algorithm. ROA evaluates the intertemporal option value of investment sequences, while TPPO learns sequential policies that directly generate high option-value sequences without exhaustive enumeration. Numerical experiments on realistic multi-region settings demonstrate that TPPO converges faster than benchmark DRL methods and consistently identifies sequences with superior option value. Case studies and sensitivity analyses further confirm robustness and provide insights on investment concurrency, regional prioritization, and the increasing benefits of adaptive expansion via our approach under stronger spillovers and dynamic market conditions.
tldr: This paper introduces a Transformer-based Proximal Policy Optimization (TPPO) algorithm integrated with real options analysis (ROA) to solve the sequential service region design (SSRD) problem under demand uncertainty, showing faster convergence and superior option value compared to benchmark DRL methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于 Transformer 的近端策略优化 (TPPO) 算法，与实物期权分析 (ROA) 相结合，以解决需求不确定性下的顺序服务区域设计 (SSRD) 问题，与基准 DRL 方法相比，显示出更快的收敛速度和更高的期权价值。
summary_zh: 服务区域设计决定了服务网络的地理覆盖范围，塑造着长期运营绩效。资本和运营约束限制了大规模的同时部署，需要逐步扩展。由此产生的挑战是在需求不确定性下确定何时何地进行投资，平衡早期投资和延迟投资之间的跨期权衡，并考虑网络效应，即每次部署通过区域间连接重塑未来需求。本研究解决了一个考虑两个实用但未被充分探索的因素的序贯服务区域设计（SSRD）问题：一个 $k$ 区域约束，限制了每个时期可投资区域的数量；以及将投资决策与需求演变联系起来的随机溢出效应。由此产生的问题需要在不确定性下对区域投资组合进行排序，导致可行投资序列的组合爆炸。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个将实物期权分析（ROA）与基于Transformer的近端策略优化（TPPO）算法相结合的解决方案框架。ROA评估投资序列的跨期期权价值，而TPPO学习序贯策略，直接生成高期权价值序列，无需穷举枚举。在现实多区域环境下的数值实验表明，TPPO比基准DRL方法收敛更快，并且始终识别出具有卓越期权价值的序列。案例研究和敏感性分析进一步证实了稳健性，并提供了关于投资并发性、区域优先级排序以及通过我们的方法在更强的溢出效应和动态市场条件下进行自适应扩展的日益增长的效益的见解。

title: Local Constrained Bayesian Optimization
summary: Bayesian optimization (BO) for high-dimensional constrained problems remains a significant challenge due to the curse of dimensionality. We propose Local Constrained Bayesian Optimization (LCBO), a novel framework tailored for such settings. Unlike trust-region methods that are prone to premature shrinking when confronting tight or complex constraints, LCBO leverages the differentiable landscape of constraint-penalized surrogates to alternate between rapid local descent and uncertainty-driven exploration. Theoretically, we prove that LCBO achieves a convergence rate for the Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) residual that depends polynomially on the dimension $d$ for common kernels under mild assumptions, offering a rigorous alternative to global BO where regret bounds typically scale exponentially. Extensive evaluations on high-dimensional benchmarks (up to 100D) demonstrate that LCBO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces Local Constrained Bayesian Optimization (LCBO) for high-dimensional constrained optimization problems, demonstrating polynomial convergence rates and superior performance compared to existing methods in high-dimensional benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了局部约束贝叶斯优化（LCBO），用于解决高维约束优化问题。LCBO在常见核函数下实现了多项式收敛速度，并在高维基准测试中表现优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 对于高维约束问题，贝叶斯优化(BO)仍然面临维度灾难的重大挑战。我们提出了一种名为局部约束贝叶斯优化(LCBO)的新框架，专门为解决此类问题而设计。与在面对严格或复杂约束时容易过早收缩的信任域方法不同，LCBO利用约束惩罚代理模型的微分特性，在快速局部下降和不确定性驱动的探索之间交替进行。在理论上，我们证明了在温和假设下，对于常见核函数，LCBO实现了Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT)残差的收敛速度，其收敛速度以多项式形式依赖于维度$d$，为全局贝叶斯优化提供了一种严格的替代方案，全局贝叶斯优化的后悔界通常呈指数级增长。在高维基准（高达100维）上的广泛评估表明，LCBO始终优于最先进的基线方法。

title: MRDrive: An Open Source Mixed Reality Driving Simulator for Automotive User Research
summary: Designing and evaluating in-vehicle interfaces requires experimental platforms that combine ecological validity with experimental control. Driving simulators are widely used for this purpose. However, they face a fundamental trade-off: high-fidelity physical simulators are costly and difficult to adapt, while virtual reality simulators provide flexibility at the expense of physical interaction with the vehicle. In this work, we present MRDrive, an open mixed-reality driving simulator designed to support HCI research on in-vehicle interaction, attention, and explainability in manual and automated driving contexts. MRDrive enables drivers and passengers to interact with a real vehicle cabin while being fully immersed in a virtual driving environment. We demonstrate the capabilities of MRDrive through a small pilot study that illustrates how the simulator can be used to collect and analyze eye-tracking and touch interaction data in an automated driving scenario. MRDRive is available at: https://github.com/ciao-group/mrdrive
tldr: The paper introduces MRDrive, an open-source mixed-reality driving simulator that combines a real vehicle cabin with a virtual driving environment for HCI research related to in-vehicle interaction, attention, and explainability during automated and manual driving.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为MRDrive的开源混合现实驾驶模拟器，该模拟器将真实的车辆座舱与虚拟驾驶环境相结合，用于人机交互研究，重点关注在自动和手动驾驶模式下车内互动，注意力和可解释性。
summary_zh: 设计和评估车载界面需要兼顾生态效度和实验控制的实验平台。驾驶模拟器被广泛应用于此目的。然而，它们面临着一个根本性的权衡：高保真物理模拟器成本高昂且难以调整，而虚拟现实模拟器虽然提供了更高的灵活性，但却牺牲了与车辆的物理交互。在这项工作中，我们提出MRDrive，这是一个开放的混合现实驾驶模拟器，旨在支持关于手动和自动驾驶环境中车载交互、注意力和可解释性的人机交互研究。MRDrive使驾驶员和乘客能够在完全沉浸于虚拟驾驶环境中的同时，与真实的车辆座舱进行交互。我们通过一个小型的先导研究证明了MRDrive的功能，该研究展示了如何使用该模拟器在自动驾驶场景中收集和分析眼动追踪和触摸交互数据。MRDrive可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/ciao-group/mrdrive

title: Trajectory Tracking Control Design for Autonomous Helicopters with Guaranteed Error Bounds
summary: This paper presents a systematic framework for computing formally guaranteed trajectory tracking error bounds for autonomous helicopters based on Robust Positive Invariant (RPI) sets. The approach focuses on establishing a closed-loop translational error dynamics which is cast into polytopic linear parameter-varying form with bounded additive and state-dependent disturbances. Ellipsoidal RPI sets are computed, yielding explicit position error bounds suitable as certified buffer zones in upper-level trajectory planning. Three controller architectures are compared with respect to the conservatism of their error bounds and tracking performance. Simulation results on a nonlinear helicopter model demonstrate that all architectures respect the derived bounds, while highlighting trade-offs between dynamical fidelity and conservatism in invariant set computation.
tldr: This paper presents a framework for computing guaranteed trajectory tracking error bounds for autonomous helicopters using Robust Positive Invariant (RPI) sets, comparing different controller architectures in simulation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于鲁棒正不变 (RPI) 集的自主直升机轨迹跟踪误差界限计算框架，并在仿真中比较了不同的控制器架构。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于鲁棒正不变（RPI）集的自主直升机轨迹跟踪误差界限的形式化保证的计算系统框架。该方法重点在于建立一个闭环平移误差动力学模型，该模型被转化为具有有界加性扰动和状态相关扰动的多胞型线性参数变分形式。计算椭球RPI集，从而产生明确的位置误差界限，适于作为上层轨迹规划中认证的缓冲区域。比较了三种控制器架构，考察其误差界限的保守性和跟踪性能。在非线性直升机模型上的仿真结果表明，所有架构都满足推导出的界限，同时突出了动态保真度和不变集计算中的保守性之间的权衡。

title: Aero-Promptness: Drag-Aware Aerodynamic Manipulability for Propeller-driven Vehicles
summary: This work introduces the Drag-Aware Aerodynamic Manipulability (DAAM), a geometric framework for control allocation in redundant multirotors. By equipping the propeller spin-rate space with a Riemannian metric based on the remaining symmetric acceleration capacity of each motor, the formulation explicitly accounts for motor torque limits and aerodynamic drag. Mapping this metric through the nonlinear thrust law to the generalized force space yields a state-dependent manipulability volume. The log-determinant of this volume acts as a natural barrier function, strictly penalizing drag-induced saturation and low-spin thrust loss. Optimizing this volume along the allocation fibers provides a redundancy resolution strategy inherently invariant to arbitrary coordinate scaling in the generalized-force space. Analytically, we prove that the resulting optimal allocations locally form smooth embedded manifolds, and we geometrically characterize the global jump discontinuities that inevitably arise from physical actuator limits and spin-rate sign transitions.
tldr: This paper introduces a geometric framework (DAAM) for control allocation in multirotors, explicitly accounting for motor torque limits and aerodynamic drag to optimize motor control and prevent saturation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个用于多旋翼飞行器控制分配的几何框架（DAAM），该框架显式考虑了电机扭矩限制和空气动力阻力，以优化电机控制并防止饱和。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为“阻力感知气动可操纵性”（DAAM）的几何框架，用于冗余多旋翼飞行器的控制分配。通过赋予螺旋桨转速空间一个基于各电机剩余对称加速度能力的黎曼度量，该公式明确考虑了电机扭矩限制和气动阻力。将该度量通过非线性推力定律映射到广义力空间，产生一个状态相关的可操纵性体积。该体积的对数行列式充当自然的势垒函数，严格惩罚阻力引起的饱和和低转速推力损失。沿着分配纤维优化该体积提供了一种冗余解析策略，该策略天然地对广义力空间中的任意坐标缩放保持不变。在理论上，我们证明了由此产生的最优分配在局部形成光滑的嵌入流形，并从几何上刻画了由物理执行器限制和转速符号转换不可避免地产生的全局跳跃不连续性。

title: Efficient Policy Learning with Hybrid Evaluation-Based Genetic Programming for Uncertain Agile Earth Observation Satellite Scheduling
summary: The Uncertain Agile Earth Observation Satellite Scheduling Problem (UAEOSSP) is a novel combinatorial optimization problem and a practical engineering challenge that aligns with the current demands of space technology development. It incorporates uncertainties in profit, resource consumption, and visibility, which may render pre-planned schedules suboptimal or even infeasible. Genetic Programming Hyper-Heuristic (GPHH) shows promise for evolving interpretable scheduling policies; however, their simulation-based evaluation incurs high computational costs. Moreover, the design of the constructive method, denoted as Online Scheduling Algorithm (OSA), directly affects fitness assessment, resulting in evaluation-dependent local optima within the policy space. To address these issues, this paper proposes a Hybrid Evaluation-based Genetic Programming (HE-GP) for effectively solving UAEOSSP. A Hybrid Evaluation (HE) mechanism is integrated into the policy-driven OSA, combining exact and approximate filtering modes: exact mode ensures evaluation accuracy through elaborately designed constraint verification modules, while approximate mode reduces computational overhead via simplified logic. HE-GP dynamically switches between evaluation models based on real-time evolutionary state information. Experiments on 16 simulated instance sets demonstrate that HE-GP significantly outperforms handcrafted heuristics and single-evaluation based GPHH, achieving substantial reductions in computational cost while maintaining excellent scheduling performance across diverse scenarios. Specifically, the average training time of HE-GP was reduced by 17.77\% compared to GP employing exclusively exact evaluation, while the optimal policy generated by HE-GP achieved the highest average ranks across all scenarios.
tldr: This paper proposes a hybrid evaluation-based genetic programming (HE-GP) approach for solving the Uncertain Agile Earth Observation Satellite Scheduling Problem (UAEOSSP). It achieves significant reductions in computational cost while maintaining scheduling performance compared to handcrafted heuristics and single-evaluation GPHH.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于混合评估的遗传编程 (HE-GP) 方法，用于解决不确定敏捷地球观测卫星调度问题 (UAEOSSP)。与手工启发式方法和基于单一评估的 GPHH 相比，它在保持调度性能的同时，显著降低了计算成本。
summary_zh: 不确定敏捷地球观测卫星调度问题 (UAEOSSP) 是一种新型组合优化问题，也是一项顺应当前空间技术发展需求的实用工程挑战。它纳入了利润、资源消耗和可见性方面的不确定性，这可能导致预先制定的调度方案变得次优甚至不可行。遗传编程超启发式算法 (GPHH) 在演化可解释调度策略方面展现出潜力；然而，它们的基于仿真的评估会产生高昂的计算成本。此外，构造性方法 (称为在线调度算法 (OSA)) 的设计直接影响适应度评估，导致策略空间内出现依赖于评估的局部最优解。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种基于混合评估的遗传编程算法 (HE-GP)，用于有效解决 UAEOSSP。一种混合评估 (HE) 机制被集成到策略驱动的 OSA 中，结合了精确和近似过滤模式：精确模式通过精心设计的约束验证模块来确保评估准确性，而近似模式通过简化的逻辑来降低计算开销。HE-GP 根据实时进化状态信息在评估模型之间动态切换。在 16 个模拟实例集上的实验表明，HE-GP 明显优于手工设计的启发式算法和基于单一评估的 GPHH，在各种场景中实现了计算成本的大幅降低，同时保持了出色的调度性能。具体而言，与仅采用精确评估的 GP 相比，HE-GP 的平均训练时间减少了 17.77％，而 HE-GP 生成的最优策略在所有场景中都获得了最高的平均排名。

title: PSTNet: Physically-Structured Turbulence Network
summary: Reliable real-time estimation of atmospheric turbulence intensity remains an open challenge for aircraft operating across diverse altitude bands, particularly over oceanic, polar, and data-sparse regions that lack operational nowcasting infrastructure. Classical spectral models encode climatological averages rather than the instantaneous atmospheric state, and generic ML regressors offer adaptivity but provide no guarantee that predictions respect fundamental scaling laws. This paper introduces the Physically-Structured Turbulence Network (PSTNet), a lightweight architecture that embeds physics directly into its structure. PSTNet couples four components: (i) a zero-parameter backbone derived from Monin-Obukhov theory, (ii) a regime-gated mixture of specialist sub-networks supervised by Richardson-number-derived soft targets, (iii) Feature-wise Linear Modulation layers conditioning hidden representations on local air-density ratio, and (iv) a Kolmogorov output layer enforcing inertial-subrange scaling as an architectural constraint. The entire model contains only 552 learnable parameters, requiring fewer than 2.5 kB of storage and executing in under 12s on a Cortex-M7 microcontroller. We validate PSTNet on 340 paired six-degree-of-freedom guidance simulations spanning three vehicle classes (Mach 2.8, 4.5, and 8.0) and six operational categories with real-time satellite weather ingestion. PSTNet achieves a mean miss-distance improvement of +2.8% with a 78% win rate and a statistically significant effect size. Our results demonstrate that encoding domain physics as architectural priors yields a more efficient and interpretable path to turbulence estimation accuracy than scaling model capacity, establishing PSTNet as a viable drop-in replacement for legacy look-up tables in resource-constrained, safety-critical on-board guidance systems.
tldr: The paper introduces PSTNet, a physically-structured neural network for real-time atmospheric turbulence intensity estimation, achieving performance improvements over traditional methods while being highly resource-efficient. It encodes domain physics as architectural priors for efficient and interpretable turbulence estimation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为PSTNet的物理结构神经网络，用于实时估计大气湍流强度，与传统方法相比，在资源非常有限的情况下实现了性能提升。它将领域物理知识编码为架构先验，从而实现高效且可解释的湍流估计。
summary_zh: 大气湍流强度的可靠实时估计对于在不同高度带飞行的航空器来说仍然是一个公开挑战，尤其是在缺乏运行中的现况预报基础设施的海洋、极地和数据稀疏区域。经典的谱模型编码的是气候平均值，而不是瞬时大气状态，而通用的机器学习回归模型提供适应性，但不能保证预测符合基本尺度律。本文介绍了一种物理结构湍流网络（PSTNet），这是一种将物理直接嵌入其结构的轻量级架构。 PSTNet耦合了四个组件：（i）一个从莫宁-奥布霍夫理论导出的零参数骨干网络，（ii）一个由理查森数导出的软目标监督的、由专业子网络组成的、受状态门控的混合网络，（iii）特征级线性调制层，根据局部空气密度比调节隐藏表示，以及（iv）一个科尔莫戈罗夫输出层，强制惯性子区尺度作为架构约束。整个模型仅包含552个可学习参数，需要少于2.5 kB的存储空间，并在Cortex-M7微控制器上于12秒内执行。我们在跨越三个车辆类别（马赫数2.8、4.5和8.0）和六个具有实时卫星天气摄取的运行类别的340个配对的六自由度制导模拟中验证了PSTNet。PSTNet实现了+2.8%的平均未命中距离改进，胜率达到78%，并且效应量具有统计显著性。我们的结果表明，与扩展模型容量相比，将领域物理作为架构先验编码可以更有效地、更易于解释地提高湍流估计精度，从而使PSTNet成为资源受限、安全关键的机载制导系统中传统查找表的可行直接替代方案。

title: Online Sparse Synthetic Aperture Radar Imaging
summary: With modern defense applications increasingly relying on inexpensive, autonomous drones, lies the major challenge of designing computationally and memory-efficient onboard algorithms to fulfill mission objectives. This challenge is particularly significant in Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR), where large volumes of data must be collected and processed for downstream tasks. We propose an online reconstruction method, the Online Fast Iterative Shrinkage-Thresholding Algorithm (Online FISTA), which incrementally reconstructs a scene with limited data through sparse coding. Rather than requiring storage of all received signal data, the algorithm recursively updates storage matrices for each iteration, greatly reducing memory demands. Online SAR image reconstruction facilitates more complex downstream tasks, such as Automatic Target Recognition (ATR), in an online manner, resulting in a more versatile and integrated framework compared to existing post-collection reconstruction and ATR approaches.
tldr: The paper introduces an online sparse reconstruction method (Online FISTA) for Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) imaging, aiming to reduce memory demands and enable online Automatic Target Recognition (ATR) on autonomous drones.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于合成孔径雷达（SAR）成像的在线稀疏重建方法（Online FISTA），旨在降低内存需求，并实现自主无人机上的在线自动目标识别（ATR）。
summary_zh: 随着现代防御应用越来越依赖于低成本的自主无人机，设计计算和内存高效的机载算法以完成任务目标成为一项重大挑战。这种挑战在合成孔径雷达(SAR)领域尤为突出，因为需要收集和处理大量数据才能进行后续任务。我们提出了一种在线重建方法，即在线快速迭代收缩阈值算法（Online FISTA），该方法通过稀疏编码以有限的数据增量式地重建场景。该算法无需存储所有接收到的信号数据，而是递归地更新每次迭代的存储矩阵，从而大大降低了内存需求。在线SAR图像重建有助于更复杂的下游任务，例如自动目标识别（ATR），以在线方式进行，与现有的后采集重建和ATR方法相比，形成了一个更通用和集成的框架。

title: GarmentPainter: Efficient 3D Garment Texture Synthesis with Character-Guided Diffusion Model
summary: Generating high-fidelity, 3D-consistent garment textures remains a challenging problem due to the inherent complexities of garment structures and the stringent requirement for detailed, globally consistent texture synthesis. Existing approaches either rely on 2D-based diffusion models, which inherently struggle with 3D consistency, require expensive multi-step optimization or depend on strict spatial alignment between 2D reference images and 3D meshes, which limits their flexibility and scalability. In this work, we introduce GarmentPainter, a simple yet efficient framework for synthesizing high-quality, 3D-aware garment textures in UV space. Our method leverages a UV position map as the 3D structural guidance, ensuring texture consistency across the garment surface during texture generation. To enhance control and adaptability, we introduce a type selection module, enabling fine-grained texture generation for specific garment components based on a character reference image, without requiring alignment between the reference image and the 3D mesh. GarmentPainter efficiently integrates all guidance signals into the input of a diffusion model in a spatially aligned manner, without modifying the underlying UNet architecture. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GarmentPainter achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of visual fidelity, 3D consistency, and computational efficiency, outperforming existing methods in both qualitative and quantitative evaluations.
tldr: GarmentPainter introduces an efficient diffusion model framework for generating high-fidelity, 3D-consistent garment textures using UV position maps and character reference images, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
tldr_zh: GarmentPainter 提出了一种高效的扩散模型框架，利用 UV 位置图和人物参考图像生成高保真、3D 一致的服装纹理，实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 生成高保真、3D一致的服装纹理仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题，这归因于服装结构固有的复杂性以及对细节丰富、全局一致纹理合成的严格要求。现有方法要么依赖于基于2D的扩散模型，由于其内在的3D一致性不足而存在局限性；要么需要昂贵的多步优化；要么依赖于2D参考图像和3D网格之间的严格空间对齐，从而限制了其灵活性和可扩展性。在本文中，我们介绍GarmentPainter，一个简单而高效的框架，用于在UV空间中合成高质量、3D感知的服装纹理。我们的方法利用UV位置图作为3D结构指导，确保纹理生成过程中服装表面的纹理一致性。为了增强控制和适应性，我们引入了一个类型选择模块，能够基于角色参考图像对特定服装组件进行细粒度的纹理生成，而无需参考图像与3D网格之间的对齐。GarmentPainter以空间对齐的方式将所有指导信号有效地整合到扩散模型的输入中，而无需修改底层的UNet架构。大量实验表明，GarmentPainter在视觉保真度、3D一致性和计算效率方面均达到了最先进的性能，在定性和定量评估中均优于现有方法。

title: Airborne Magnetic Anomaly Navigation with Neural-Network-Augmented Online Calibration
summary: Airborne Magnetic Anomaly Navigation (MagNav) provides a jamming-resistant and robust alternative to satellite navigation but requires the real-time compensation of the aircraft platform's large and dynamic magnetic interference. State-of-the-art solutions often rely on extensive offline calibration flights or pre-training, creating a logistical barrier to operational deployment. We present a fully adaptive MagNav architecture featuring a "cold-start" capability that identifies and compensates for the aircraft's magnetic signature entirely in-flight. The proposed method utilizes an extended Kalman filter with an augmented state vector that simultaneously estimates the aircraft's kinematic states as well as the coefficients of the physics-based Tolles-Lawson calibration model and the parameters of a Neural Network to model aircraft interferences. The Kalman filter update is mathematically equivalent to an online Natural Gradient descent, integrating superior convergence and data efficiency of state-of-the-art second-order optimization directly into the navigation filter. To enhance operational robustness, the neural network is constrained to a residual learning role, modeling only the nonlinearities uncorrected by the explainable physics-based calibration baseline. Validated on the MagNav Challenge dataset, our framework effectively bounds inertial drift using a magnetometer-only feature set. The results demonstrate navigation accuracy comparable to state-of-the-art models trained offline, without requiring prior calibration flights or dedicated maneuvers.
tldr: This paper introduces an airborne magnetic anomaly navigation (MagNav) system with online calibration using a Kalman filter augmented with a neural network, achieving comparable accuracy to offline-trained models without requiring pre-training flights.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种机载磁异常导航（MagNav）系统，该系统使用卡尔曼滤波器和神经网络进行在线校准，无需预先训练飞行即可达到与离线训练模型相当的精度。
summary_zh: 机载磁异常导航(MagNav)为卫星导航提供了一种抗干扰且稳健的替代方案，但需要实时补偿飞机平台大而动态的磁场干扰。目前最先进的解决方案通常依赖于大量的离线校准飞行或预训练，从而为作战部署造成了后勤障碍。我们提出了一种完全自适应的MagNav架构，具有“冷启动”能力，可以在飞行中完全识别和补偿飞机的磁特征。所提出的方法利用扩展卡尔曼滤波器，该滤波器具有一个增广状态向量，可以同时估计飞机的运动学状态，以及基于物理的Tolles-Lawson校准模型的系数和用于建模飞机干扰的神经网络的参数。卡尔曼滤波器更新在数学上等价于在线自然梯度下降，将最先进的二阶优化的卓越收敛性和数据效率直接集成到导航滤波器中。为了增强操作鲁棒性，神经网络被限制为残差学习角色，仅对由可解释的基于物理的校准基线未校正的非线性进行建模。在MagNav挑战数据集上验证，我们的框架使用仅磁力计的特征集有效地约束了惯性漂移。结果表明，导航精度可与离线训练的最新模型相媲美，而无需事先进行校准飞行或专门的机动飞行。

title: Outlier-robust Autocovariance Least Square Estimation via Iteratively Reweighted Least Square
summary: The autocovariance least squares (ALS) method is a computationally efficient approach for estimating noise covariances in Kalman filters without requiring specific noise models. However, conventional ALS and its variants rely on the classic least mean squares (LMS) criterion, making them highly sensitive to measurement outliers and prone to severe performance degradation. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes a novel outlier-robust ALS algorithm, termed ALS-IRLS, based on the iteratively reweighted least squares (IRLS) framework. Specifically, the proposed approach introduces a two-tier robustification strategy. First, an innovation-level adaptive thresholding mechanism is employed to filter out heavily contaminated data. Second, the outlier-contaminated autocovariance is formulated using an $ε$-contamination model, where the standard LMS criterion is replaced by the Huber cost function. The IRLS method is then utilized to iteratively adjust data weights based on estimation deviations, effectively mitigating the influence of residual outliers. Comparative simulations demonstrate that ALS-IRLS reduces the root-mean-square error (RMSE) of noise covariance estimates by over two orders of magnitude compared to standard ALS. Furthermore, it significantly enhances downstream state estimation accuracy, outperforming existing outlier-robust Kalman filters and achieving performance nearly equivalent to the ideal Oracle lower bound in the presence of noisy and anomalous data.
tldr: The paper introduces an outlier-robust autocovariance least squares (ALS-IRLS) algorithm for Kalman filters, which significantly improves noise covariance and state estimation accuracy in environments with outliers by using iterative reweighted least squares and a two-tier robustification strategy.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于卡尔曼滤波器的抗异常值自协方差最小二乘法（ALS-IRLS）算法，该算法通过使用迭代重加权最小二乘法和双层鲁棒化策略，显著提高了存在异常值环境下的噪声协方差和状态估计精度。
summary_zh: 自协方差最小二乘(ALS)方法是一种计算高效的方法，用于估计卡尔曼滤波器中的噪声协方差，而无需特定的噪声模型。然而，传统的ALS及其变体依赖于经典的最小均方(LMS)准则，这使得它们对测量异常值高度敏感，并且容易出现严重的性能下降。为了克服这个限制，本文提出了一种新的具有离群值鲁棒性的ALS算法，称为ALS-IRLS，它基于迭代重加权最小二乘(IRLS)框架。具体而言，提出的方法引入了一个双层鲁棒化策略。首先，采用创新层面的自适应阈值机制来过滤掉严重污染的数据。其次，被离群值污染的自协方差用一个$ε$-污染模型来形式化，其中标准的LMS准则被Huber代价函数所取代。然后利用IRLS方法，根据估计偏差迭代调整数据权重，从而有效地减轻残余离群值的影响。比较仿真表明，与标准ALS相比，ALS-IRLS将噪声协方差估计的均方根误差(RMSE)降低了两个数量级以上。此外，它显著提高了下游状态估计的准确性，优于现有的离群值鲁棒性卡尔曼滤波器，并且在存在噪声和异常数据的情况下，实现了几乎等同于理想的Oracle下界的性能。

title: Explainable Condition Monitoring via Probabilistic Anomaly Detection Applied to Helicopter Transmissions
summary: We present a novel Explainable methodology for Condition Monitoring, relying on healthy data only. Since faults are rare events, we propose to focus on learning the probability distribution of healthy observations only, and detect Anomalies at runtime. This objective is achieved via the definition of probabilistic measures of deviation from nominality, which allow to detect and anticipate faults. The Bayesian perspective underpinning our approach allows us to perform Uncertainty Quantification to inform decisions. At the same time, we provide descriptive tools to enhance the interpretability of the results, supporting the deployment of the proposed strategy also in safety-critical applications. The methodology is validated experimentally on two use cases: a publicly available benchmark for Predictive Maintenance, and a real-world Helicopter Transmission dataset collected over multiple years. In both applications, the method achieves competitive detection performance with respect to state-of-the-art anomaly detection methods.
tldr: This paper presents an explainable condition monitoring methodology using probabilistic anomaly detection on healthy data, validated on helicopter transmission datasets. It achieves competitive performance while offering uncertainty quantification and interpretability.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种可解释的状态监测方法，该方法仅使用健康数据进行概率异常检测，并在直升机变速箱数据集上进行了验证。它在提供不确定性量化和可解释性的同时，实现了具有竞争力的性能。
summary_zh: 我们提出一种新颖的、仅依赖健康数据的可解释的状态监测方法。 鉴于故障是罕见事件，我们建议重点学习仅针对健康观测值的概率分布，并在运行时检测异常。 这一目标通过定义偏离标称值的概率度量来实现，从而能够检测和预测故障。 我们方法所依赖的贝叶斯视角使我们能够执行不确定性量化，进而为决策提供信息。 同时，我们提供描述性工具来增强结果的可解释性，从而支持所提出策略在安全关键型应用中的部署。 该方法已经在两个用例上通过实验进行了验证：一个公开的预测性维护基准测试和一个多年收集的真实直升机变速箱数据集。 在这两个应用中，该方法在检测性能方面与最先进的异常检测方法相比极具竞争力。
